## fal-ai/flux-vision-upscaler

**Title:** Flux Vision Upscaler
**Description:** Flux Vision Upscaler for magnify/upscaling images with high fidelity and creativity.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/flux-vision-upscaler`
**Category:** image-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `Input`
**Required fields:** `image_url`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to upscale.
- **`upscale_factor`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `2` вҖ” The upscale factor (1-4x).
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed to use for the upscale. If not provided, a random seed will be used.
- **`creativity`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.3` вҖ” The creativity of the model. The higher the creativity, the more the model will deviate from the original. Refers to the denoise strength of the sampling.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`guidance`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” CFG/guidance scale (1-4). Controls how closely the model follows the prompt.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `20` вҖ” Number of inference steps (4-50).
  Range: min: 4, max: 50
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`caption`** *(string)* вҖ” The VLM-generated caption used for upscaling.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used to generate the image.
- **`timings`** *(object)* вҖ” The timings of the different steps in the workflow.
- **`image`** *()* вҖ” The URL of the generated image.

---

## fal-ai/flux/dev/image-to-image

**Title:** FLUX.1 [dev]
**Description:** FLUX.1 Image-to-Image is a high-performance endpoint for the FLUX.1 [dev] model that enables rapid transformation of existing images, delivering high-quality style transfers and image modifications with the core FLUX capabilities.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/flux/dev/image-to-image`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** style transfer

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `BaseImageToInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`, `prompt`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to generate an image from.
- **`strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.95` вҖ” The strength of the initial image. Higher strength values are better for this model.
  Range: min: 0.01, max: 1
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `40` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 10, max: 50
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
        The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
        will output the same image every time.
    
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3.5` вҖ” 
        The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
        the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
    
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” The speed of the generation. The higher the speed, the faster the generation.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.

---

- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_4_3"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
        The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
        will output the same image every time.
    
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3.5` вҖ” 
        The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
        the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
    
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” The speed of the generation. The higher the speed, the faster the generation.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.

  Range: min: 0.01, max: 1

  Range: min: 10, max: 50

        The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
        the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
    
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” The speed of the generation. The higher the speed, the faster the generation.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`

## fal-ai/gemini-25-flash-image

**Title:** Gemini 2.5 Flash Image
**Description:** Google's famous original image generation and editing model, a.k.a Nano Banana
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/gemini-25-flash-image`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** image-editing

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `NanoBananaTextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt to generate an image from.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator.
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1:1"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated image.
  Possible values: `21:9`, `16:9`, `3:2`, `4:3`, `5:4`, `1:1`, `4:5`, `3:4`, `2:3`, `9:16`
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`
- **`safety_tolerance`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"4"` вҖ” The safety tolerance level for content moderation. 1 is the most strict (blocks most content), 6 is the least strict.
  Possible values: `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`, `6`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`limit_generations`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Experimental parameter to limit the number of generations from each round of prompting to 1. Set to `True` to to disregard any instructions in the prompt regarding the number of images to generate.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `NanoBananaTextToImageOutput`
- **`description`** *(string)* вҖ” The description of the generated images.
- **`images`** *(list<ImageFile>)* вҖ” The generated images.

---

## fal-ai/gemini-3-pro-image-preview

**Title:** Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview
**Description:** Gemini 3 Pro Image (a.k.a Nano Banana Pro) is Google's state-of-the-art high-fidelity image generation and editing model
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/gemini-3-pro-image-preview`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** realism, typography

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `NanoBananaTextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt to generate an image from.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator.
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"1:1"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated image.
  Possible values: `auto`, `21:9`, `16:9`, `3:2`, `4:3`, `5:4`, `1:1`, `4:5`, `3:4`, `2:3`, `9:16`
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`
- **`safety_tolerance`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"4"` вҖ” The safety tolerance level for content moderation. 1 is the most strict (blocks most content), 6 is the least strict.
  Possible values: `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`, `6`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1K"` вҖ” The resolution of the image to generate.
  Possible values: `1K`, `2K`, `4K`
- **`limit_generations`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Experimental parameter to limit the number of generations from each round of prompting to 1. Set to `True` to to disregard any instructions in the prompt regarding the number of images to generate.
- **`enable_web_search`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable web search for the image generation task. This will allow the model to use the latest information from the web to generate the image.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `NanoBananaTextToImageOutput`
- **`description`** *(string)* вҖ” The description of the generated images.
- **`images`** *(list<ImageFile>)* вҖ” The generated images.

---

## fal-ai/gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview

**Title:** Gemini 3.1 Flash Image Preview
**Description:** Gemini 3.1 Flash Image (a.k.a. Nano Banana 2) is Google's new state-of-the-art fast image generation and editing model
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview`
**Category:** image-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `NanoBanana2TextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt to generate an image from.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator.
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated image. Supports extreme ratios: 4:1, 1:4, 8:1, 1:8. Use "auto" to let the model decide based on the prompt.
  Possible values: `auto`, `21:9`, `16:9`, `3:2`, `4:3`, `5:4`, `1:1`, `4:5`, `3:4`, `2:3`, `9:16`, `4:1`, `1:4`, `8:1`, `1:8`
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`
- **`safety_tolerance`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"4"` вҖ” The safety tolerance level for content moderation. 1 is the most strict (blocks most content), 6 is the least strict.
  Possible values: `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`, `6`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1K"` вҖ” The resolution of the image to generate.
  Possible values: `0.5K`, `1K`, `2K`, `4K`
- **`limit_generations`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Experimental parameter to limit the number of generations from each round of prompting to 1. Set to `True` to to disregard any instructions in the prompt regarding the number of images to generate and ignore any intermediate images generated by the model. This may affect generation quality.
- **`enable_web_search`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable web search for the image generation task. This will allow the model to use the latest information from the web to generate the image.
- **`thinking_level`** *(string)* вҖ” When set, enables model thinking with the given level ('minimal' or 'high') and includes thoughts in the generation. Omit to disable.
  Possible values: `minimal`, `high`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `NanoBanana2TextToImageOutput`
- **`images`** *(list<ImageFile>)* вҖ” The generated images.
- **`description`** *(string)* вҖ” The description of the generated images.

---

## fal-ai/gemini-flash-edit

**Title:** Gemini Flash Edit Multi Image
**Description:** Gemini Flash Edit is a model that can edit single image using a text prompt and a reference image.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/gemini-flash-edit`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** editing

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `GeminiImageRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt for image generation or editing
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” Optional URL of an input image for editing. If not provided, generates a new image.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `GeminiImageOutput`
- **`description`** *(string)* вҖ” Text description or response from Gemini
- **`image`** *()* вҖ” The generated or edited image

---

## fal-ai/gemini-flash-edit/multi

**Title:** Gemini Flash Edit Multi Image
**Description:** Gemini Flash Edit Multi Image is a model that can edit multiple images using a text prompt and a reference image.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/gemini-flash-edit/multi`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** editing

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `GeminiMultiImageRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `input_image_urls`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt for image generation or editing
- **`input_image_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” List of URLs of input images for editing

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `GeminiImageOutput`
- **`description`** *(string)* вҖ” Text description or response from Gemini
- **`image`** *()* вҖ” The generated or edited image

---

## fal-ai/genfocus

**Title:** Genfocus
**Description:** GenFocus Model to Refocus Images
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/genfocus`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** image-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `RefocusInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to refocus.
- **`focus_point`** *(array)* вҖ” Default: `[0.5,0.5]` вҖ” The [x, y] coordinates of the focus point as fractions of image dimensions (0.0 to 1.0). For example, [0.5, 0.5] means center. If not provided, the center of the image is used.
- **`blur_strength`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `8` вҖ” Blur strength (K value). Higher values produce stronger bokeh/defocus. Set to 0 to only perform all-in-focus (deblur) estimation without bokeh.
  Range: min: 0, max: 50
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform. Lower values are faster but may reduce quality.
  Range: min: 25, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The same seed and the same input given to the same version of the model will output the same image every time.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`target_long_side`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `512` вҖ” Resize the image so the longer side matches this value (in pixels). If not set, the original resolution is used (aligned to 16px). Recommended range: 512 to 2000.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `GenfocusOutput`
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image(s).
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.

- **`target_long_side`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `512` вҖ” Resize the image so the longer side matches this value (in pixels). If not set, the original resolution is used (aligned to 16px). Recommended range: 512 to 2000.

## fal-ai/glm-image/image-to-image

**Title:** Glm Image
**Description:** Create high-quality images with accurate text rendering and rich knowledge detailsвҖ”supports editing, style transfer, and maintaining consistent characters across multiple images.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/glm-image/image-to-image`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** image-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `GlmImageToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_urls`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Text prompt for image generation.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” Output image size.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`, `portrait_3_2`, `landscape_3_2`, `portrait_hd`, `landscape_hd`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” Number of diffusion denoising steps. More steps generally produce higher quality images.
  Range: min: 10, max: 100
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1.5` вҖ” Classifier-free guidance scale. Higher values make the model follow the prompt more closely.
  Range: min: 1, max: 10
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. The same seed with the same prompt will produce the same image.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Enable NSFW safety checking on the generated images.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” Output image format.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If True, the image will be returned as a base64 data URI instead of a URL.
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If True, the prompt will be enhanced using an LLM for more detailed and higher quality results.
- **`image_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” URL(s) of the condition image(s) for image-to-image generation. Supports up to 4 URLs for multi-image references.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `GlmImageToImageOutput`
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” List of URLs to the generated images.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.

  Possible values: `auto`, `transparent`, `opaque`

  Possible values: `auto`, `low`, `medium`, `high`

  Possible values: `low`, `high`

## fal-ai/hidream-e1-1

**Title:** Hidream E1 1
**Description:** Edit images with natural language
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/hidream-e1-1`
**Category:** image-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `BaseInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`

- **`target_image_description`** *(string)* вҖ” The description of the target image after your edits have been made. Leave this blank to allow the model to use its own imagination.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"low resolution, blur"` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use. Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of an input image to edit.
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `50` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3.5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`image_guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `2` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your initial image when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.

---

## fal-ai/hidream-i1-full/image-to-image

**Title:** Hidream I1 Full
**Description:** HiDream-I1 full is a new open-source image generative foundation model with 17B parameters that achieves state-of-the-art image generation quality within seconds.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/hidream-i1-full/image-to-image`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** image-to-image, hidream

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `ImageToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use. Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image. Setting to None uses the input image's size.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `50` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`loras`** *(array)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” A list of LoRAs to apply to the model. Each LoRA specifies its path, scale, and optional weight name.
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The image URL to generate an image from.
- **`strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.75` вҖ” Denoising strength for image-to-image generation.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Img2ImgOutput`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated images

## fal-ai/hy-wu-edit

**Title:** Hy Wu Edit
**Description:** Image editing with HY-WU. Transfer outfits, swap faces, and blend textures instantlyвҖ”no finetuning needed, just describe what you want and provide reference images.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/hy-wu-edit`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** image-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `HYWUEditInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_urls`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt describing the desired edit. Supports both English and Chinese. Use specific instructions like 'Replace the clothing on figure 1 with the outfit from figure 2'.
- **`image_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” URLs of input images for editing. Typically 2 images: the base image and the reference image. Supports up to 3 images.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” The desired size of the generated image. If auto, image size will be determined by the model.
  Possible values: `auto`, `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” Number of diffusion denoising steps.
  Range: min: 1, max: 100
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducible results. If None, a random seed is used.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_thinking`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Enable thinking mode. The model reasons about the edit before generating, producing higher quality results at the cost of longer inference time. Disable for faster results on straightforward edits.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If True, the media will be returned as a data URI.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `HYWUEditOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.
- **`timings`** *(object)* вҖ” Default: `{}` вҖ” Performance timing breakdown.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” A list of the generated/edited images.

---

## fal-ai/iclight-v2

**Title:** IC-Light-v2 for Image Relighting
**Description:** An endpoint for re-lighting photos and changing their backgrounds per a given description
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/iclight-v2`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** relighting, editing

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `BaseInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Negative Prompt for the image
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of image to be used for relighting
- **`mask_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of mask to be used for ic-light conditioning image
- **`background_threshold`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.67` вҖ” Threshold for the background removal algorithm. A high threshold will produce sharper masks. Note: This parameter is currently deprecated and has no effect on the output.
  Range: min: 0.01, max: 1
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`initial_latent`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"None"` вҖ” 
            Provide lighting conditions for the model
        
  Possible values: `None`, `Left`, `Right`, `Top`, `Bottom`
- **`enable_hr_fix`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Use HR fix
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” 
            If set to true, the function will wait for the image to be generated and uploaded
            before returning the response. This will increase the latency of the function but
            it allows you to get the image directly in the response without going through the CDN.
        
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`cfg`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The real classifier-free-guidance scale for the generation.
  Range: min: 0.01, max: 5
- **`lowres_denoise`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.98` вҖ” Strength for low-resolution pass.
  Range: min: 0.01, max: 1
- **`highres_denoise`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.95` вҖ” Strength for high-resolution pass. Only used if enable_hr_fix is True.
  Range: min: 0.01, max: 1
- **`hr_downscale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5`
  Range: min: 0.01, max: 1
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        

---

## fal-ai/ideogram/character

**Title:** Ideogram V3 Character
**Description:** Generate consistent character appearances across multiple images. Maintain facial features, proportions, and distinctive traits for cohesive storytelling and branding
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ideogram/character`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** character-consistency, 

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `BaseCharacterInputV3`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `reference_image_urls`

- **`image_urls`** *(array)* вҖ” A set of images to use as style references (maximum total size 10MB across all style references). The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format
- **`rendering_speed`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"BALANCED"` вҖ” The rendering speed to use.
  Possible values: `TURBO`, `BALANCED`, `QUALITY`
- **`color_palette`** *(?)* вҖ” A color palette for generation, must EITHER be specified via one of the presets (name) or explicitly via hexadecimal representations of the color with optional weights (members)
- **`style_codes`** *(array)* вҖ” A list of 8 character hexadecimal codes representing the style of the image. Cannot be used in conjunction with style_reference_images or style
- **`style`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"AUTO"` вҖ” The style type to generate with. Cannot be used with style_codes.
  Possible values: `AUTO`, `REALISTIC`, `FICTION`
- **`expand_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Determine if MagicPrompt should be used in generating the request or not.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Seed for the random number generator
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to fill the masked part of the image.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated image
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Description of what to exclude from an image. Descriptions in the prompt take precedence to descriptions in the negative prompt.
- **`reference_image_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” A set of images to use as character references. Currently only 1 image is supported, rest will be ignored. (maximum total size 10MB across all character references). The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format
- **`reference_mask_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” A set of masks to apply to the character references. Currently only 1 mask is supported, rest will be ignored. (maximum total size 10MB across all character references). The masks should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `CharacterOutputV3`
- **`images`** *(list<File>)*
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Seed used for the random number generator

---

## fal-ai/ideogram/character/remix

**Title:** Ideogram V3 Character Remix
**Description:** Transform your consistent character into different art styles, settings, or scenarios while maintaining their distinctive appearance and identity
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ideogram/character/remix`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** character-consistency

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `CharacterRemixInputV3`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`, `reference_image_urls`

- **`image_urls`** *(array)* вҖ” A set of images to use as style references (maximum total size 10MB across all style references). The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format
- **`rendering_speed`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"BALANCED"` вҖ” The rendering speed to use.
  Possible values: `TURBO`, `BALANCED`, `QUALITY`
- **`color_palette`** *(?)* вҖ” A color palette for generation, must EITHER be specified via one of the presets (name) or explicitly via hexadecimal representations of the color with optional weights (members)
- **`style_codes`** *(array)* вҖ” A list of 8 character hexadecimal codes representing the style of the image. Cannot be used in conjunction with style_reference_images or style
- **`style`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"AUTO"` вҖ” The style type to generate with. Cannot be used with style_codes.
  Possible values: `AUTO`, `REALISTIC`, `FICTION`
- **`expand_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Determine if MagicPrompt should be used in generating the request or not.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Seed for the random number generator
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to remix the image with
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The image URL to remix
- **`strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.8` вҖ” Strength of the input image in the remix
  Range: min: 0.01, max: 1
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated image
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Description of what to exclude from an image. Descriptions in the prompt take precedence to descriptions in the negative prompt.
- **`reference_image_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” A set of images to use as character references. Currently only 1 image is supported, rest will be ignored. (maximum total size 10MB across all character references). The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format
- **`reference_mask_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” A set of masks to apply to the character references. Currently only 1 mask is supported, rest will be ignored. (maximum total size 10MB across all character references). The masks should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `CharacterRemixOutputV3`
- **`images`** *(list<File>)*
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Seed used for the random number generator

## fal-ai/ideogram/upscale

**Title:** Ideogram Upscale
**Description:** Ideogram Upscale enhances the resolution of the reference image by up to 2X and might enhance the reference image too. Optionally refine outputs with a prompt for guided improvements.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ideogram/upscale`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** upscaling, high-res

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `UpscaleImageInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The image URL to upscale
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” The prompt to upscale the image with
- **`resemblance`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `50` вҖ” The resemblance of the upscaled image to the original image
  Range: min: 1, max: 100
- **`detail`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `50` вҖ” The detail of the upscaled image
  Range: min: 1, max: 100
- **`expand_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to expand the prompt with MagicPrompt functionality.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Seed for the random number generator
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `UpscaleOutput`
- **`images`** *(list<File>)*
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Seed used for the random number generator

---

## fal-ai/ideogram/v2/remix

**Title:** Ideogram V2 Remix
**Description:** Reimagine existing images with Ideogram V2's remix feature. Create variations and adaptations while preserving core elements and adding new creative directions through prompt guidance.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ideogram/v2/remix`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** realism, typography

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `RemixImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to remix the image with
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The image URL to remix
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1:1"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated image
  Possible values: `10:16`, `16:10`, `9:16`, `16:9`, `4:3`, `3:4`, `1:1`, `1:3`, `3:1`, `3:2`, `2:3`
- **`strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.8` вҖ” Strength of the input image in the remix
  Range: min: 0.01, max: 1
- **`expand_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to expand the prompt with MagicPrompt functionality.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Seed for the random number generator
- **`style`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” The style of the generated image
  Possible values: `auto`, `general`, `realistic`, `design`, `render_3D`, `anime`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`images`** *(list<File>)*
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Seed used for the random number generator

## fal-ai/ideogram/v3/layerize-text

**Title:** Ideogram
**Description:** Ideogram Layerize takes an existing flat graphic, removes text, and returns structured text containers you can edit/recompose in html or json format.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ideogram/v3/layerize-text`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** stylized, transform, typography

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `LayerizeDesignInputV3`
**Required fields:** `image_url`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the flat graphic image to layerize. Must be JPEG, PNG, or WebP (max 10MB).
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Optional prompt to guide the layerization.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Seed for the random number generator.
- **`font_file_h1_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the font file to use for h1 text. Cannot be used with font_name_h1.
- **`font_name_h1`** *(string)* вҖ” Name of the font to use for h1 text. Cannot be used with font_file_h1_url.
- **`font_file_h2_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the font file to use for h2 text. Cannot be used with font_name_h2.
- **`font_name_h2`** *(string)* вҖ” Name of the font to use for h2 text. Cannot be used with font_file_h2_url.
- **`font_file_body_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the font file to use for body text. Cannot be used with font_name_body.
- **`font_name_body`** *(string)* вҖ” Name of the font to use for body text. Cannot be used with font_file_body_url.
- **`font_file_small_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the font file to use for small text. Cannot be used with font_name_small.
- **`font_name_small`** *(string)* вҖ” Name of the font to use for small text. Cannot be used with font_file_small_url.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `LayerizeDesignOutputV3`
- **`text_containers`** *(array)* вҖ” Structured text containers with hierarchical text data (container -> items -> spans).
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for layerization. May differ from the input prompt if MagicPrompt expanded it.
- **`text_html`** *(string)* вҖ” Rendered overlay HTML for compositing text over the background image.
- **`image_layers`** *(list<object>)* вҖ” Image layers extracted from the design.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Seed used for the random number generator.
- **`image`** *()* вҖ” The background image with text removed.

---

## fal-ai/ideogram/v3/reframe

**Title:** Ideogram
**Description:** Extend existing images with Ideogram V3's reframe feature. Create expanded versions and adaptations while preserving main image and adding new creative directions through prompt guidance.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ideogram/v3/reframe`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** realism, typography

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `ReframeImageInputV3`
**Required fields:** `image_url`, `image_size`

- **`image_urls`** *(array)* вҖ” A set of images to use as style references (maximum total size 10MB across all style references). The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format
- **`rendering_speed`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"BALANCED"` вҖ” The rendering speed to use.
  Possible values: `TURBO`, `BALANCED`, `QUALITY`
- **`color_palette`** *(?)* вҖ” A color palette for generation, must EITHER be specified via one of the presets (name) or explicitly via hexadecimal representations of the color with optional weights (members)
- **`style_codes`** *(array)* вҖ” A list of 8 character hexadecimal codes representing the style of the image. Cannot be used in conjunction with style_reference_images or style
- **`style`** *(string)* вҖ” The style type to generate with. Cannot be used with style_codes.
  Possible values: `AUTO`, `GENERAL`, `REALISTIC`, `DESIGN`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Seed for the random number generator
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`style_preset`** *(string)* вҖ” Style preset for generation. The chosen style preset will guide the generation.
  Possible values: `80S_ILLUSTRATION`, `90S_NOSTALGIA`, `ABSTRACT_ORGANIC`, `ANALOG_NOSTALGIA`, `ART_BRUT`, `ART_DECO`, `ART_POSTER`, `AURA`, `AVANT_GARDE`, `BAUHAUS`, `BLUEPRINT`, `BLURRY_MOTION`, `BRIGHT_ART`, `C4D_CARTOON`, `CHILDRENS_BOOK`, `COLLAGE`, `COLORING_BOOK_I`, `COLORING_BOOK_II`, `CUBISM`, `DARK_AURA`, `DOODLE`, `DOUBLE_EXPOSURE`, `DRAMATIC_CINEMA`, `EDITORIAL`, `EMOTIONAL_MINIMAL`, `ETHEREAL_PARTY`, `EXPIRED_FILM`, `FLAT_ART`, `FLAT_VECTOR`, `FOREST_REVERIE`, `GEO_MINIMALIST`, `GLASS_PRISM`, `GOLDEN_HOUR`, `GRAFFITI_I`, `GRAFFITI_II`, `HALFTONE_PRINT`, `HIGH_CONTRAST`, `HIPPIE_ERA`, `ICONIC`, `JAPANDI_FUSION`, `JAZZY`, `LONG_EXPOSURE`, `MAGAZINE_EDITORIAL`, `MINIMAL_ILLUSTRATION`, `MIXED_MEDIA`, `MONOCHROME`, `NIGHTLIFE`, `OIL_PAINTING`, `OLD_CARTOONS`, `PAINT_GESTURE`, `POP_ART`, `RETRO_ETCHING`, `RIVIERA_POP`, `SPOTLIGHT_80S`, `STYLIZED_RED`, `SURREAL_COLLAGE`, `TRAVEL_POSTER`, `VINTAGE_GEO`, `VINTAGE_POSTER`, `WATERCOLOR`, `WEIRD`, `WOODBLOCK_PRINT`
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The image URL to reframe
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The resolution for the reframed output image
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `ReframeOutputV3`
- **`images`** *(list<File>)*
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Seed used for the random number generator

  Possible values: `80S_ILLUSTRATION`, `90S_NOSTALGIA`, `ABSTRACT_ORGANIC`, `ANALOG_NOSTALGIA`, `ART_BRUT`, `ART_DECO`, `ART_POSTER`, `AURA`, `AVANT_GARDE`, `BAUHAUS`, `BLUEPRINT`, `BLURRY_MOTION`, `BRIGHT_ART`, `C4D_CARTOON`, `CHILDRENS_BOOK`, `COLLAGE`, `COLORING_BOOK_I`, `COLORING_BOOK_II`, `CUBISM`, `DARK_AURA`, `DOODLE`, `DOUBLE_EXPOSURE`, `DRAMATIC_CINEMA`, `EDITORIAL`, `EMOTIONAL_MINIMAL`, `ETHEREAL_PARTY`, `EXPIRED_FILM`, `FLAT_ART`, `FLAT_VECTOR`, `FOREST_REVERIE`, `GEO_MINIMALIST`, `GLASS_PRISM`, `GOLDEN_HOUR`, `GRAFFITI_I`, `GRAFFITI_II`, `HALFTONE_PRINT`, `HIGH_CONTRAST`, `HIPPIE_ERA`, `ICONIC`, `JAPANDI_FUSION`, `JAZZY`, `LONG_EXPOSURE`, `MAGAZINE_EDITORIAL`, `MINIMAL_ILLUSTRATION`, `MIXED_MEDIA`, `MONOCHROME`, `NIGHTLIFE`, `OIL_PAINTING`, `OLD_CARTOONS`, `PAINT_GESTURE`, `POP_ART`, `RETRO_ETCHING`, `RIVIERA_POP`, `SPOTLIGHT_80S`, `STYLIZED_RED`, `SURREAL_COLLAGE`, `TRAVEL_POSTER`, `VINTAGE_GEO`, `VINTAGE_POSTER`, `WATERCOLOR`, `WEIRD`, `WOODBLOCK_PRINT`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Cyber punk city with neon lights and skyscrappers
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The image URL whose background needs to be replaced

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `ReplaceBackgroundOutputV3`
- **`images`** *(list<File>)*
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Seed used for the random number generator

  Range: min: 6, max: 100
- **`preserve_identity`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *()* вҖ” Aspect ratio for 4K output (default: 3:4 for portraits)

## fal-ai/image-apps-v2/outpaint

**Title:** Image Outpaint
**Description:** Directional outpainting. Choose edges to expand. left, right, top, or center (uniform all sides). Only expanded areas are generated; an optional zoom-out pulls the frame back by the chosen amount.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/image-apps-v2/outpaint`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** outpainting

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `OutpaintInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” Image URL to outpaint
- **`expand_left`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Number of pixels to add as black margin on the left side (0-700).
  Range: min: 0, max: 700
- **`expand_right`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Number of pixels to add as black margin on the right side (0-700).
  Range: min: 0, max: 700
- **`expand_top`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Number of pixels to add as black margin on the top side (0-700).
  Range: min: 0, max: 700
- **`expand_bottom`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Number of pixels to add as black margin on the bottom side (0-700).
  Range: min: 0, max: 700
- **`zoom_out_percentage`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `20` вҖ” Percentage to zoom out the image. If set, the image will be scaled down by this percentage and black margins will be added to maintain original size. Example: 50 means the image will be 50% of original size with black margins filling the rest.
  Range: min: 0, max: 90
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Optional prompt to guide the outpainting. If provided, it will be appended to the base outpaint instruction. Example: 'with a beautiful sunset in the background'
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model will output the same image every time.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If True, the function will wait for the image to be generated and uploaded before returning the response. If False, the function will return immediately and the image will be generated asynchronously.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the output image.
  Possible values: `png`, `jpeg`, `jpg`, `webp`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `OutpaintOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” Outpainted image with extended scene

---

## fal-ai/image-editing/age-progression

**Title:** Image Editing
**Description:** See how you or others might look at different ages, from younger to older, while preserving core facial features.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/image-editing/age-progression`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** stylized, transform

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `AgeProgressionInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” Image prompt for the omni model.
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3.5` вҖ” The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” Number of inference steps for sampling.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`safety_tolerance`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"2"` вҖ” The safety tolerance level for the generated image. 1 being the most strict and 6 being the most permissive.
  Possible values: `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`, `6`
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(string)* вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated image.
  Possible values: `21:9`, `16:9`, `4:3`, `3:2`, `1:1`, `2:3`, `3:4`, `9:16`, `9:21`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model will output the same image every time.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"20 years older"` вҖ” The age change to apply.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `AgeProgressionOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)*
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)*

---

- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” Number of inference steps for sampling.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50

  Possible values: `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`, `6`
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(string)* вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated image.
  Possible values: `21:9`, `16:9`, `4:3`, `3:2`, `1:1`, `2:3`, `3:4`, `9:16`, `9:21`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model will output the same image every time.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.

## fal-ai/image-editing/background-change

**Title:** Image Editing
**Description:** Replace your photo's background with any scene you desire, from beach sunsets to urban landscapes, with perfect lighting and shadows
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/image-editing/background-change`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** stylized, transform

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `BackgroundChangeInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” Image prompt for the omni model.
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3.5` вҖ” The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” Number of inference steps for sampling.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`safety_tolerance`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"2"` вҖ” The safety tolerance level for the generated image. 1 being the most strict and 6 being the most permissive.
  Possible values: `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`, `6`
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(string)* вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated image.
  Possible values: `21:9`, `16:9`, `4:3`, `3:2`, `1:1`, `2:3`, `3:4`, `9:16`, `9:21`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model will output the same image every time.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"beach sunset with palm trees"` вҖ” The desired background to apply.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `BackgroundChangeOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)*
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)*

**Title:** Image Editing
**Description:** Place your subject in any scene you imagine, from enchanted forests to urban settings, with professional composition and lighting
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/image-editing/scene-composition`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** stylized, transform

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `SceneCompositionInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” Image prompt for the omni model.
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3.5` вҖ” The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” Number of inference steps for sampling.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`safety_tolerance`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"2"` вҖ” The safety tolerance level for the generated image. 1 being the most strict and 6 being the most permissive.
  Possible values: `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`, `6`
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(string)* вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated image.
  Possible values: `21:9`, `16:9`, `4:3`, `3:2`, `1:1`, `2:3`, `3:4`, `9:16`, `9:21`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model will output the same image every time.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"enchanted forest"` вҖ” Describe the scene where you want to place the subject.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `SceneCompositionOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)*
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)*

---

**Description:** Holistically-Nested Edge Detection (HED) preprocessor.

- **`safe`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to use the safe version of the HED detector
- **`scribble`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to use the scribble version of the HED detector

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `HEDOutput`
- **`image`** *()* вҖ” Image with lines detected using the HED detector

## fal-ai/image2pixel

**Title:** Image2Pixel
**Description:** Turn images into pixel-perfect retro art
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/image2pixel`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** post-processing, pixel-art

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `Image2PixelInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The image URL to process into improved pixel art
- **`max_colors`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `32` вҖ” Maximum number of colors in the output palette. Set None to disable limit.
- **`auto_color_detect`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable automatic detection of optimal number of colors.
- **`fixed_palette`** *(array)* вҖ” Optional fixed color palette as hex strings (e.g., ['#000000', '#ffffff']).
- **`detect_method`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” Scale detection method to use.
  Possible values: `auto`, `runs`, `edge`
- **`scale`** *(integer)* вҖ” Force a specific pixel scale. If None, auto-detect.
- **`downscale_method`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"dominant"` вҖ” Downscaling method to produce the pixel-art output.
  Possible values: `dominant`, `median`, `mode`, `mean`, `content-adaptive`
- **`trim_borders`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Trim borders of the image.
- **`transparent_background`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Remove background of the image. This will check for contiguous color regions from the edges after correction and make them transparent.
- **`cleanup_morph`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Apply morphological operations to remove noise.
- **`cleanup_jaggy`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Remove isolated diagonal pixels (jaggy edge cleanup).
- **`snap_grid`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Align output to the pixel grid.
- **`alpha_threshold`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `128` вҖ” Alpha binarization threshold (0-255).
  Range: min: 0, max: 255
- **`dominant_color_threshold`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.05` вҖ” Dominant color threshold (0.0-1.0).
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`background_tolerance`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Background tolerance (0-255).
  Range: min: 0, max: 255
- **`background_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"corners"` вҖ” Controls where to flood-fill from when removing the background.
  Possible values: `edges`, `corners`, `midpoints`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Image2PixelOutput`
- **`pixel_scale`** *(integer)* вҖ” The detected pixel scale of the input.
- **`images`** *(list<ImageFile>)* вҖ” The processed pixel-art image (PNG) and the scaled image (PNG).
- **`num_colors`** *(integer)* вҖ” The number of colors in the processed media.
- **`palette`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” The palette of the processed media.

---

## fal-ai/image2svg

**Title:** Image2svg
**Description:** Image2SVG transforms raster images into clean vector graphics, preserving visual quality while enabling scalable, customizable SVG outputs with precise control over detail levels.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/image2svg`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** utility, editing

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `Image2SVGInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The image to convert to SVG
- **`colormode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"color"` вҖ” Choose between color or binary (black and white) output
  Possible values: `color`, `binary`
- **`hierarchical`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"stacked"` вҖ” Hierarchical mode: stacked or cutout
  Possible values: `stacked`, `cutout`
- **`mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"spline"` вҖ” Mode: spline (curved) or polygon (straight lines)
  Possible values: `spline`, `polygon`
- **`filter_speckle`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” Filter out small speckles and noise
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`color_precision`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `6` вҖ” Color quantization level
  Range: min: 1, max: 10
- **`layer_difference`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `16` вҖ” Layer difference threshold for hierarchical mode
  Range: min: 1, max: 32
- **`corner_threshold`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `60` вҖ” Corner detection threshold in degrees
  Range: min: 0, max: 180
- **`length_threshold`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” Length threshold for curves/lines
  Range: min: 0, max: 10
- **`max_iterations`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `10` вҖ” Maximum number of iterations for optimization
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`splice_threshold`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `45` вҖ” Splice threshold for joining paths
  Range: min: 0, max: 90
- **`path_precision`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `3` вҖ” Decimal precision for path coordinates
  Range: min: 1, max: 10

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Image2SVGOutput`
- **`images`** *(list<File>)* вҖ” The converted SVG file

---

## fal-ai/imageutils/depth

**Title:** Midas Depth Estimation
**Description:** Create depth maps using Midas depth estimation.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/imageutils/depth`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** depth, utility

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `DepthMapInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” Input image url.
- **`a`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `6.283185307179586` вҖ” a
- **`bg_th`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.1` вҖ” bg_th
- **`depth_and_normal`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” depth_and_normal

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `DepthMapOutput`
- **`image`** *()* вҖ” The depth map.

---

## fal-ai/imageutils/marigold-depth

**Title:** Marigold Depth Estimation
**Description:** Create depth maps using Marigold depth estimation.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/imageutils/marigold-depth`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** depth, utility

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `MarigoldDepthMapInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” Input image url.
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `10` вҖ” Number of denoising steps. Defaults to `10`. The higher the number, the more accurate the result, but the slower the inference.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50
- **`ensemble_size`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `10` вҖ” Number of predictions to average over. Defaults to `10`. The higher the number, the more accurate the result, but the slower the inference.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50
- **`processing_res`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Maximum processing resolution. Defaults `0` which means it uses the size of the input image.
  Range: min: 0, max: 2048

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `MarigoldDepthMapOutput`
- **`image`** *()* вҖ” The depth map.

---

## fal-ai/imageutils/rembg

**Title:** Remove Background
**Description:** Remove the background from an image.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/imageutils/rembg`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** background removal, utility, editing

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `RemoveBackgroundInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” Input image url.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`crop_to_bbox`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” 
            If set to true, the resulting image be cropped to a bounding box around the subject
        

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `RemoveBackgroundOutput`
- **`image`** *()* вҖ” Background removed image.

---

## fal-ai/inpaint

**Title:** Inpainting sdxl and sd
**Description:** Inpaint images with SD and SDXL
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/inpaint`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** editing, diffusion

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `InpaintInput`
**Required fields:** `model_name`, `prompt`, `image_url`, `mask_url`

- **`model_name`** *(string)* вҖ” URL or HuggingFace ID of the base model to generate the image.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use. Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” Input image for img2img or inpaint mode
- **`mask_url`** *(string)* вҖ” Input mask for inpaint mode. Black areas will be preserved, white areas will be inpainted.
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” 
            Increasing the amount of steps tells Stable Diffusion that it should take more steps
            to generate your final result which can increase the amount of detail in your image.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 150
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `7.5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
        

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `InpaintOutput`
- **`image`** *()* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        

---

## fal-ai/instant-character

**Title:** Instant Character
**Description:** InstantCharacter creates high-quality, consistent characters from text prompts, supporting diverse poses, styles, and appearances with strong identity control.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/instant-character`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** personalization, customization

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The image URL to generate an image from. Needs to match the dimensions of the mask.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The scale of the subject image. Higher values will make the subject image more prominent in the generated image.
  Range: min: 0, max: 2
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use. Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3.5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `ImageOutput`
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated images
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.

---

## fal-ai/invisible-watermark

**Title:** Invisible Watermark
**Description:** Invisible Watermark is a model that can add an invisible watermark to an image.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/invisible-watermark`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** utility, editing

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `WatermarkInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of image to be watermarked or decoded
- **`watermark`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"watermark"` вҖ” Text to use as watermark (for encoding only)
- **`decode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to decode a watermark from the image instead of encoding
- **`length`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Length of watermark bits to decode (required when decode=True)

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `WatermarkOutput`
- **`extracted_watermark`** *(string)* вҖ” The extracted watermark text (when decoding)
- **`length`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Length of the watermark bits used (helpful for future decoding)
- **`image`** *()* вҖ” The watermarked image file info (when encoding)

---

## fal-ai/ip-adapter-face-id

**Title:** IP Adapter Face ID
**Description:** High quality zero-shot personalization
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ip-adapter-face-id`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** ip-adapter, personalization, customization, editing

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `IpAdapterFaceIdInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`model_type`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1_5-v1"` вҖ” The model type to use. 1_5 is the default and is recommended for most use cases.
  Possible values: `1_5-v1`, `1_5-v1-plus`, `1_5-v2-plus`, `SDXL-v1`, `SDXL-v2-plus`, `1_5-auraface-v1`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
- **`face_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” An image of a face to match. If an image with a size of 640x640 is not provided, it will be scaled and cropped to that size.
- **`face_images_data_url`** *(string)* вҖ” 
            URL to zip archive with images of faces. The images embedding will be averaged to
            create a more accurate face id.
        
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"blurry, low resolution, bad, ugly, low quality, pixelated, interpolated, compression artifacts, noisey, grainy"` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use.Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `7.5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 16
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `50` вҖ” 
            The number of inference steps to use for generating the image. The more steps
            the better the image will be but it will also take longer to generate.
        
  Range: min: 1, max: 200
- **`num_samples`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” 
            The number of samples for face id. The more samples the better the image will
            be but it will also take longer to generate. Default is 4.
        
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`width`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `512` вҖ” 
            The width of the generated image.
        
  Range: min: 512, max: 1024
- **`height`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `512` вҖ” 
            The height of the generated image.
        
  Range: min: 512, max: 1024
- **`face_id_det_size`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `640` вҖ” 
            The size of the face detection model. The higher the number the more accurate
            the detection will be but it will also take longer to run. The higher the number the more
            likely it will fail to find a face as well. Lower it if you are having trouble
            finding a face in the image.
        
  Range: min: 64, max: 640
- **`base_1_5_model_repo`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"SG161222/Realistic_Vision_V4.0_noVAE"` вҖ” The URL to the base 1.5 model. Default is SG161222/Realistic_Vision_V4.0_noVAE
- **`base_sdxl_model_repo`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"SG161222/RealVisXL_V3.0"` вҖ” The URL to the base SDXL model. Default is SG161222/RealVisXL_V3.0

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `IpAdapterFaceIdOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`image`** *()* вҖ” The generated image file info.

---

## fal-ai/joyai-image-edit

**Title:** Joyai Image Edit
**Description:** All-in-one image AI with JoyAI-Image. Understand, create, and edit images through natural languageвҖ”the model's deep visual understanding powers more accurate generation and precise editing in a unified system.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/joyai-image-edit`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** image-to-image, image-editing

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `JoyAIImageEditInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The edit instruction describing what changes to make to the image.
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the input image to edit.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Text describing what should not appear in the output image.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility.
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” Number of denoising steps.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” Controls how closely the output follows the edit instruction.
  Range: min: 1, max: 15
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Enable safety checking on input and output.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” Output image format.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If True, return image as data URI.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `JoyAIImageEditOutput`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The edited output image.
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
