## fal-ai/photomaker

**Title:** PhotoMaker
**Description:** Customizing Realistic Human Photos via Stacked ID Embedding
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/photomaker`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** editing, customization, realism, personalization

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `PhotoMakerInput`
**Required fields:** `image_archive_url`, `prompt`

- **`image_archive_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image archive containing the images you want to use.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
- **`base_pipeline`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"photomaker"` вҖ” The base pipeline to use for generating the image.
  Possible values: `photomaker`, `photomaker-style`
- **`initial_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” Optional initial image for img2img
- **`initial_image_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” How much noise to add to the latent image. O for no noise, 1 for maximum noise.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`style`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"Photographic"`
  Possible values: `(No style)`, `Cinematic`, `Disney Character`, `Digital Art`, `Photographic`, `Fantasy art`, `Neonpunk`, `Enhance`, `Comic book`, `Lowpoly`, `Line art`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use.Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `50` вҖ” 
            Increasing the amount of steps tells Stable Diffusion that it should take more steps
            to generate your final result which can increase the amount of detail in your image.
        
  Range: min: 20, max: 100
- **`style_strength`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `20`
  Range: min: 15, max: 50
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” 
            Number of images to generate in one request. Note that the higher the batch size,
            the longer it will take to generate the images.
        
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0.1, max: 10
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
        

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `PhotoMakerOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)*
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)*

---

## fal-ai/physic-edit

**Title:** Physic Edit
**Description:** Physics-aware image editing with PhysicEdit. Make realistic edits that follow real-world physicsвҖ”handles complex effects like refraction, material changes, and deformation with physically plausible results.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/physic-edit`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** image-editing

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `PhysicEditInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`, `prompt`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the image to edit with physics-aware transformations.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The editing instruction describing the physical transformation to apply.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Description of unwanted elements in the output.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. Same seed and prompt produce identical output.
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `40` вҖ” Number of denoising steps. More steps generally produce higher quality but take longer.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” Classifier-free guidance scale. Higher values follow the prompt more closely.
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If True, the image will be returned as a data URI.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Enable content safety checking on the output.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `PhysicEditOutput`
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The edited images.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        

---

## fal-ai/playground-v25/image-to-image

**Title:** Playground v2.5
**Description:** State-of-the-art open-source model in aesthetic quality
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/playground-v25/image-to-image`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** artistic, style

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `ImageToImagePlaygroundv25Input`
**Required fields:** `image_url`, `prompt`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to use as a starting point for the generation.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use.Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `25` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 65
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.95` вҖ” determines how much the generated image resembles the initial image
  Range: min: 0.05, max: 1
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`embeddings`** *(list<Embedding>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” The list of embeddings to use.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`safety_checker_version`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"v1"` вҖ” The version of the safety checker to use. v1 is the default CompVis safety checker. v2 uses a custom ViT model.
  Possible values: `v1`, `v2`
- **`expand_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the prompt will be expanded with additional prompts.
- **`format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`guidance_rescale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” The rescale factor for the CFG.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`request_id`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            An id bound to a request, can be used with response to identify the request
            itself.
        
- **`preserve_aspect_ratio`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” 
        If set to true, the aspect ratio of the generated image will be preserved even
        if the image size is too large. However, if the image is not a multiple of 32
        in width or height, it will be resized to the nearest multiple of 32. By default,
        this snapping to the nearest multiple of 32 will not preserve the aspect ratio.
        Set crop_output to True, to crop the output to the proper aspect ratio
        after generating.
        
- **`crop_output`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” 
        If set to true, the output cropped to the proper aspect ratio after generating.
        

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        

---

## fal-ai/playground-v25/inpainting

**Title:** Playground v2.5
**Description:** State-of-the-art open-source model in aesthetic quality
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/playground-v25/inpainting`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** inpaint, artistic, style

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `InpaintingPlaygroundv25Input`
**Required fields:** `image_url`, `mask_url`, `prompt`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to use as a starting point for the generation.
- **`mask_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the mask to use for inpainting.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use.Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `25` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 65
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.95` вҖ” determines how much the generated image resembles the initial image
  Range: min: 0.01, max: 1
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`embeddings`** *(list<Embedding>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” The list of embeddings to use.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`safety_checker_version`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"v1"` вҖ” The version of the safety checker to use. v1 is the default CompVis safety checker. v2 uses a custom ViT model.
  Possible values: `v1`, `v2`
- **`expand_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the prompt will be expanded with additional prompts.
- **`format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`guidance_rescale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” The rescale factor for the CFG.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`request_id`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            An id bound to a request, can be used with response to identify the request
            itself.
        

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        

---

## fal-ai/plushify

**Title:** Plushify
**Description:** Turn any image into a cute plushie!
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/plushify`
**Category:** image-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `PlushifyInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the image to apply cartoon style to
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Prompt for the generation. Default is empty which is usually best, but sometimes it can help to add a description of the subject.
- **`scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Scale factor for the Cartoon effect
  Range: min: 0.1, max: 2
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3.5` вҖ” Guidance scale for the generation
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” Number of inference steps
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker
- **`use_cfg_zero`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to use CFG zero
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for image generation. Same seed with same parameters will generate same image.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate
  Range: min: 1, max: 4

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.

---

## fal-ai/post-processing

**Title:** Post Processing
**Description:** Post Processing is an endpoint that can enhance images using a variety of techniques including grain, blur, sharpen, and more.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/post-processing`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** stylized, utility

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `ImageProcessingInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of image to process
- **`enable_grain`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable film grain effect
- **`grain_intensity`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.4` вҖ” Film grain intensity (when enabled)
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`grain_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `10` вҖ” Film grain scale (when enabled)
  Range: min: 1, max: 100
- **`grain_style`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"modern"` вҖ” Style of film grain to apply
  Possible values: `modern`, `analog`, `kodak`, `fuji`, `cinematic`, `newspaper`
- **`enable_color_correction`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable color correction
- **`temperature`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Color temperature adjustment
  Range: min: -100, max: 100
- **`brightness`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Brightness adjustment
  Range: min: -100, max: 100
- **`contrast`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Contrast adjustment
  Range: min: -100, max: 100
- **`saturation`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Saturation adjustment
  Range: min: -100, max: 100
- **`gamma`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Gamma adjustment
  Range: min: 0.2, max: 2.2
- **`enable_chromatic`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable chromatic aberration
- **`red_shift`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Red channel shift amount
  Range: min: -20, max: 20
- **`red_direction`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"horizontal"` вҖ” Red channel shift direction
  Possible values: `horizontal`, `vertical`
- **`green_shift`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Green channel shift amount
  Range: min: -20, max: 20
- **`green_direction`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"horizontal"` вҖ” Green channel shift direction
  Possible values: `horizontal`, `vertical`
- **`blue_shift`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Blue channel shift amount
  Range: min: -20, max: 20
- **`blue_direction`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"horizontal"` вҖ” Blue channel shift direction
  Possible values: `horizontal`, `vertical`
- **`enable_blur`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable blur effect
- **`blur_type`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"gaussian"` вҖ” Type of blur to apply
  Possible values: `gaussian`, `kuwahara`
- **`blur_radius`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `3` вҖ” Blur radius
  Range: min: 0, max: 31
- **`blur_sigma`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Sigma for Gaussian blur
  Range: min: 0.1, max: 10
- **`enable_vignette`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable vignette effect
- **`vignette_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” Vignette strength (when enabled)
  Range: min: 0, max: 10
- **`enable_parabolize`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable parabolize effect
- **`parabolize_coeff`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Parabolize coefficient
  Range: min: -10, max: 10
- **`vertex_x`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” Vertex X position
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`vertex_y`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” Vertex Y position
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`enable_tint`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable color tint effect
- **`tint_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Tint strength
  Range: min: 0.1, max: 1
- **`tint_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"sepia"` вҖ” Tint color mode
  Possible values: `sepia`, `red`, `green`, `blue`, `cyan`, `magenta`, `yellow`, `purple`, `orange`, `warm`, `cool`, `lime`, `navy`, `vintage`, `rose`, `teal`, `maroon`, `peach`, `lavender`, `olive`
- **`enable_dissolve`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable dissolve effect
- **`dissolve_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” URL of second image for dissolve
- **`dissolve_factor`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” Dissolve blend factor
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`enable_dodge_burn`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable dodge and burn effect
- **`dodge_burn_intensity`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” Dodge and burn intensity
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`dodge_burn_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"dodge"` вҖ” Dodge and burn mode
  Possible values: `dodge`, `burn`, `dodge_and_burn`, `burn_and_dodge`, `color_dodge`, `color_burn`, `linear_dodge`, `linear_burn`
- **`enable_glow`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable glow effect
- **`glow_intensity`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Glow intensity
  Range: min: 0, max: 5
- **`glow_radius`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” Glow blur radius
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`enable_sharpen`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable sharpen effect
- **`sharpen_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"basic"` вҖ” Type of sharpening to apply
  Possible values: `basic`, `smart`, `cas`
- **`sharpen_radius`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Sharpen radius (for basic mode)
  Range: min: 1, max: 15
- **`sharpen_alpha`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Sharpen strength (for basic mode)
  Range: min: 0.1, max: 5
- **`noise_radius`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `7` вҖ” Noise radius for smart sharpen
  Range: min: 1, max: 25
- **`preserve_edges`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.75` вҖ” Edge preservation factor
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`smart_sharpen_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” Smart sharpen strength
  Range: min: 0, max: 25
- **`smart_sharpen_ratio`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” Smart sharpen blend ratio
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`cas_amount`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.8` вҖ” CAS sharpening amount
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`enable_solarize`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable solarize effect
- **`solarize_threshold`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” Solarize threshold
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`enable_desaturate`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable desaturation effect
- **`desaturate_factor`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Desaturation factor
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`desaturate_method`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"luminance (Rec.709)"` вҖ” Desaturation method
  Possible values: `luminance (Rec.709)`, `luminance (Rec.601)`, `average`, `lightness`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `ProcessedOutput`
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The processed images

- **`green_shift`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Green channel shift amount
  Range: min: -20, max: 20
- **`green_direction`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"horizontal"` вҖ” Green channel shift direction
  Possible values: `horizontal`, `vertical`
- **`blue_shift`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Blue channel shift amount
  Range: min: -20, max: 20

## fal-ai/post-processing/sharpen

**Title:** Post Processing
**Description:** Apply sharpening effects with three modes: basic unsharp mask, smart sharpening with edge preservation, and Contrast Adaptive Sharpening (CAS).
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/post-processing/sharpen`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** stylized, transform

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `SharpenInput`

  Possible values: `basic`, `smart`, `cas`
- **`sharpen_radius`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Sharpen radius (for basic mode)
  Range: min: 1, max: 15
- **`sharpen_alpha`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Sharpen strength (for basic mode)
  Range: min: 0.1, max: 5
- **`noise_radius`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `7` вҖ” Noise radius for smart sharpen
  Range: min: 1, max: 25
- **`preserve_edges`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.75` вҖ” Edge preservation factor
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`smart_sharpen_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” Smart sharpen strength
  Range: min: 0, max: 25
- **`smart_sharpen_ratio`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” Smart sharpen blend ratio
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`cas_amount`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.8` вҖ” CAS sharpening amount
  Range: min: 0, max: 1

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `SharpenOutput`
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The processed images with sharpen effect

## fal-ai/pulid

**Title:** PuLID
**Description:** Tuning-free ID customization.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/pulid`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** editing, customization, personalization

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `InputModel`
**Required fields:** `reference_images`, `prompt`

- **`reference_images`** *(list<ReferenceFace>)* вҖ” List of reference faces, ideally 4 images.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Prompt to generate the face from
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"flaws in the eyes, flaws in the face, flaws, lowres, non-HDRi, low quality, worst quality,artifacts noise, text, watermark, glitch, deformed, mutated, ugly, disfigured, hands, low resolution, partially rendered objects,  deformed or partially rendered eyes, deformed, deformed eyeballs, cross-eyed,blurry"` вҖ” Negative prompt to generate the face from
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1.2` вҖ” Guidance scale
  Range: min: 1, max: 1.5
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” Number of steps to take
  Range: min: 1, max: 12
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `{"height":1024,"width":768}` вҖ” Size of the generated image
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`id_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.8` вҖ” ID scale
  Range: max: 5
- **`mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"fidelity"` вҖ” Mode of generation
  Possible values: `fidelity`, `extreme style`
- **`id_mix`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” if you want to mix two ID image, please turn this on, otherwise, turn this off

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `OutputModel`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed used for reproducibility
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” List of generated images

## fal-ai/qwen-image-edit

**Title:** Qwen Image Edit
**Description:** Endpoint for Qwen's Image Editing model. Has superior text editing capabilities.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/qwen-image-edit`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** image-editing, image-to-image, high-quality-text

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `BaseQwenEditImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate the image with
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to edit.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `" "` вҖ” The negative prompt for the generation
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” Acceleration level for image generation. Options: 'none', 'regular'. Higher acceleration increases speed. 'regular' balances speed and quality.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `QwenImageOutput`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`timings`** *(object)*

---

- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.

            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`

- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `" "` вҖ” The negative prompt for the generation
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” Acceleration level for image generation. Options: 'none', 'regular'. Higher acceleration increases speed. 'regular' balances speed and quality.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`
- **`loras`** *(list<LoraWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” 
            The LoRAs to use for the image generation. You can use up to 3 LoRAs
            and they will be merged together to generate the final image.

## fal-ai/qwen-image-edit-2509-lora-gallery/add-background

**Title:** Qwen Image Edit 2509 Lora Gallery
**Description:** Add a realistic scene behind the object with white background
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/qwen-image-edit-2509-lora-gallery/add-background`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** stylized, transform

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `AddBackgroundInput`
**Required fields:** `image_urls`

- **`image_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” The URLs of the images to edit. Provide an image with a white or clean background.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image. If not provided, the size of the final input image will be used.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale. Controls how closely the model follows the prompt.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `6` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” Acceleration level for image generation. 'regular' balances speed and quality.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `" "` вҖ” The negative prompt for the generation
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. Same seed with same prompt will produce same result.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and won't be saved in history.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker for the generated image.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the output image
  Possible values: `png`, `jpeg`, `webp`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"Remove white background and add a realistic scene behind the object"` вҖ” Describe the background/scene you want to add behind the object. The model will remove the white background and add the specified environment.
- **`lora_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The scale factor for the LoRA model. Controls the strength of the LoRA effect.
  Range: min: 0, max: 4

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `AddBackgroundOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated/edited images

**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** stylized, transform

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `MultipleAnglesInput`
**Required fields:** `image_urls`

- **`image_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” The URL of the image to adjust camera angle for.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image. If not provided, the size of the final input image will be used.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale. Controls how closely the model follows the prompt.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `6` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” Acceleration level for image generation. 'regular' balances speed and quality.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `" "` вҖ” The negative prompt for the generation
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. Same seed with same prompt will produce same result.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and won't be saved in history.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker for the generated image.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the output image
  Possible values: `png`, `jpeg`, `webp`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`rotate_right_left`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Rotate camera left (positive) or right (negative) in degrees. Positive values rotate left, negative values rotate right.
  Range: min: -90, max: 90
- **`move_forward`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Move camera forward (0=no movement, 10=close-up)
  Range: min: 0, max: 10
- **`vertical_angle`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Adjust vertical camera angle (-1=bird's-eye view/looking down, 0=neutral, 1=worm's-eye view/looking up)
  Range: min: -1, max: 1
- **`wide_angle_lens`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable wide-angle lens effect
- **`lora_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1.25` вҖ” The scale factor for the LoRA model. Controls the strength of the camera control effect.
  Range: min: 0, max: 4

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `MultipleAnglesOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated/edited images

---

## fal-ai/qwen-image-edit-2509-lora-gallery/next-scene

**Title:** Qwen Image Edit 2509 Lora Gallery
**Description:** Create cinematic transitions and scene progressions (camera movements, framing changes)
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/qwen-image-edit-2509-lora-gallery/next-scene`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** stylized, transform

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `NextSceneInput`
**Required fields:** `image_urls`

- **`image_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” The URL of the image to create the next scene from.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image. If not provided, the size of the final input image will be used.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale. Controls how closely the model follows the prompt.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `6` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” Acceleration level for image generation. 'regular' balances speed and quality.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `" "` вҖ” The negative prompt for the generation
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. Same seed with same prompt will produce same result.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and won't be saved in history.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker for the generated image.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the output image
  Possible values: `png`, `jpeg`, `webp`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"Next Scene: The camera moves forward revealing more of the scene"` вҖ” Describe the camera movement, framing change, or scene transition. Start with 'Next Scene:' for best results. Examples: camera movements (dolly, push-in, pull-back), framing changes (wide to close-up), new elements entering frame.
- **`lora_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The scale factor for the LoRA model. Controls the strength of the LoRA effect.
  Range: min: 0, max: 4

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `NextSceneOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated/edited images

---

- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker for the generated image.

  Possible values: `png`, `jpeg`, `webp`

## fal-ai/qwen-image-edit-2511

**Title:** Qwen Image Edit 2511
**Description:** Endpoint for Qwen's Image Editing 2511 model.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/qwen-image-edit-2511`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** stylized, transform

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `EditImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_urls`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to edit the image with.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” The negative prompt to generate an image from.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image. If None, uses the input image dimensions.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`image_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” The URLs of the images to edit.
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `4.5` вҖ” The guidance scale to use for the image generation.
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model will output the same image every time.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” The acceleration level to use.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `ImageToImageOutput`
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.

---

## fal-ai/qwen-image-edit-2511-multiple-angles

**Title:** Qwen Image Edit 2511 Multiple Angles
**Description:** Generates same scene from different angles (azimuth/elevation) with Qwen image Edit 2511 and the Lora Multiple Angles
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/qwen-image-edit-2511-multiple-angles`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** stylized, transform, lora, multi-angles, multiples, angles

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `MultipleAnglesInput`
**Required fields:** `image_urls`

- **`image_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” The URL of the image to adjust camera angle for.
- **`horizontal_angle`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Horizontal rotation angle around the object in degrees. 0В°=front view, 90В°=right side, 180В°=back view, 270В°=left side, 360В°=front view again.
  Range: min: 0, max: 360
- **`vertical_angle`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Vertical camera angle in degrees. -30В°=low-angle shot (looking up), 0В°=eye-level, 30В°=elevated, 60В°=high-angle, 90В°=bird's-eye view (looking down).
  Range: min: -30, max: 90
- **`zoom`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” Camera zoom/distance. 0=wide shot (far away), 5=medium shot (normal), 10=close-up (very close).
  Range: min: 0, max: 10
- **`additional_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Additional text to append to the automatically generated prompt.
- **`lora_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The scale factor for the LoRA model. Controls the strength of the camera control effect.
  Range: min: 0, max: 4
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image. If not provided, the size of the input image will be used.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `4.5` вҖ” The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale.
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” Acceleration level for image generation.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” The negative prompt for the generation
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the output image
  Possible values: `png`, `jpeg`, `webp`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate
  Range: min: 1, max: 4

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `MultipleAnglesOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The constructed prompt used for generation
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated/edited images

---

- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” The negative prompt to generate an image from.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image. If None, uses the input image dimensions.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`

  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” The acceleration level to use.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`

## fal-ai/qwen-image-edit-lora

**Title:** Qwen Image Edit Lora
**Description:** LoRA inference endpoint for the Qwen Image Editing model.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/qwen-image-edit-lora`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** image-to-image, image-editing, lora

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `BaseQwenEditImageLoRAInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate the image with
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to edit.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `" "` вҖ” The negative prompt for the generation
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” Acceleration level for image generation. Options: 'none', 'regular'. Higher acceleration increases speed. 'regular' balances speed and quality.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`
- **`loras`** *(list<LoraWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” 
            The LoRAs to use for the image generation. You can use up to 3 LoRAs
            and they will be merged together to generate the final image.
        

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `QwenImageOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.

            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.

---

## fal-ai/qwen-image-edit-plus-lora

**Title:** Qwen Image Edit Plus Lora
**Description:** LoRA endpoint for the Qwen Image Edit Plus model.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/qwen-image-edit-plus-lora`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** image-to-image, image-editing

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `BaseQwenEditImagePlusLoRAInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_urls`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate the image with
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image. If not provided, the size of the final input image will be used to calculate the size of the output image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`image_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” The URLs of the images to edit.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `" "` вҖ” The negative prompt for the generation
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” Acceleration level for image generation. Options: 'none', 'regular'. Higher acceleration increases speed. 'regular' balances speed and quality.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`
- **`loras`** *(list<LoraWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” 
            The LoRAs to use for the image generation. You can use up to 3 LoRAs
            and they will be merged together to generate the final image.
        

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `QwenImageOutput`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.

---

## fal-ai/qwen-image-edit-plus-lora-gallery/add-background

**Title:** Qwen Image Edit Plus Lora Gallery
**Description:** Add a realistic scene behind the object with white background
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/qwen-image-edit-plus-lora-gallery/add-background`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** stylized, transform

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `AddBackgroundInput`
**Required fields:** `image_urls`

- **`image_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” The URLs of the images to edit. Provide an image with a white or clean background.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image. If not provided, the size of the final input image will be used.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale. Controls how closely the model follows the prompt.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `6` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” Acceleration level for image generation. 'regular' balances speed and quality.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `" "` вҖ” The negative prompt for the generation
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. Same seed with same prompt will produce same result.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and won't be saved in history.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker for the generated image.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the output image
  Possible values: `png`, `jpeg`, `webp`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"Remove white background and add a realistic scene behind the object"` вҖ” Describe the background/scene you want to add behind the object. The model will remove the white background and add the specified environment.
- **`lora_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The scale factor for the LoRA model. Controls the strength of the LoRA effect.
  Range: min: 0, max: 4

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `AddBackgroundOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated/edited images

## fal-ai/qwen-image-edit-plus-lora-gallery/multiple-angles

**Title:** Qwen Image Edit Plus Lora Gallery
**Description:** Precise camera position and angle control (rotation, zoom, vertical movement)
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/qwen-image-edit-plus-lora-gallery/multiple-angles`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** stylized, transform

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `MultipleAnglesInput`
**Required fields:** `image_urls`

- **`image_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” The URL of the image to adjust camera angle for.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image. If not provided, the size of the final input image will be used.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale. Controls how closely the model follows the prompt.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `6` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” Acceleration level for image generation. 'regular' balances speed and quality.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `" "` вҖ” The negative prompt for the generation
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. Same seed with same prompt will produce same result.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and won't be saved in history.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker for the generated image.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the output image
  Possible values: `png`, `jpeg`, `webp`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`rotate_right_left`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Rotate camera left (positive) or right (negative) in degrees. Positive values rotate left, negative values rotate right.
  Range: min: -90, max: 90
- **`move_forward`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Move camera forward (0=no movement, 10=close-up)
  Range: min: 0, max: 10
- **`vertical_angle`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Adjust vertical camera angle (-1=bird's-eye view/looking down, 0=neutral, 1=worm's-eye view/looking up)
  Range: min: -1, max: 1
- **`wide_angle_lens`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable wide-angle lens effect
- **`lora_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1.25` вҖ” The scale factor for the LoRA model. Controls the strength of the camera control effect.
  Range: min: 0, max: 4

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `MultipleAnglesOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated/edited images

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `RemoveLightingInput`
**Required fields:** `image_urls`

- **`image_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” The URL of the image with lighting/shadows to remove.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image. If not provided, the size of the final input image will be used.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale. Controls how closely the model follows the prompt.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `6` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” Acceleration level for image generation. 'regular' balances speed and quality.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `" "` вҖ” The negative prompt for the generation
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. Same seed with same prompt will produce same result.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and won't be saved in history.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker for the generated image.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the output image
  Possible values: `png`, `jpeg`, `webp`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate
  Range: min: 1, max: 4

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `RemoveLightingOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated/edited images

---

**Title:** Qwen Image Edit Plus Lora Gallery
**Description:** Apply designs/graphics onto people's shirts
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/qwen-image-edit-plus-lora-gallery/shirt-design`

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `ShirtDesignInput`
**Required fields:** `image_urls`

- **`image_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” The URLs of the images: first image is the person wearing a shirt, second image is the design/logo to put on the shirt.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image. If not provided, the size of the final input image will be used.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale. Controls how closely the model follows the prompt.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `6` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” Acceleration level for image generation. 'regular' balances speed and quality.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `" "` вҖ” The negative prompt for the generation
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. Same seed with same prompt will produce same result.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and won't be saved in history.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker for the generated image.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the output image
  Possible values: `png`, `jpeg`, `webp`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"Put this design on their shirt"` вҖ” Describe what design to put on the shirt. The model will apply the design from your input image onto the person's shirt.
- **`lora_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The scale factor for the LoRA model. Controls the strength of the LoRA effect.
  Range: min: 0, max: 4

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `ShirtDesignOutput`

- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated/edited images

## fal-ai/qwen-image-edit/image-to-image

**Title:** Qwen Image Edit
**Description:** Image to Image Endpoint for Qwen's Image Editing model. Has superior text editing capabilities.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/qwen-image-edit/image-to-image`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** stylized, transform

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `BaseQwenEditImg2ImgInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate the image with
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to edit.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `" "` вҖ” The negative prompt for the generation
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” Acceleration level for image generation. Options: 'none', 'regular'. Higher acceleration increases speed. 'regular' balances speed and quality.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`
- **`strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.94` вҖ” Strength of the image-to-image transformation. Lower values preserve more of the original image.
  Range: min: 0.01, max: 1

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `QwenImageOutput`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`timings`** *(object)*

---

- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to edit.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `" "` вҖ” The negative prompt for the generation
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” Acceleration level for image generation. Options: 'none', 'regular'. Higher acceleration increases speed. 'regular' balances speed and quality.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`
- **`mask_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the mask for inpainting
- **`strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.93` вҖ” Strength of noising process for inpainting
  Range: min: 0.01, max: 1

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `QwenImageInpaintOutput`

- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ”

            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`timings`** *(object)*

## fal-ai/qwen-image-layered

**Title:** Qwen Image Layered
**Description:** Qwen-Image-Layered is a model capable of decomposing an image into multiple RGBA layers.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/qwen-image-layered`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** qwen, layer

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” A caption for the input image.
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the input image.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” The negative prompt to generate an image from.
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” The guidance scale to use for the image generation.
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_layers`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” The number of layers to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 10
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `png`, `webp`
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” The acceleration level to use.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `QwenImageLayeredOutput`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used to generate the image.
- **`images`** *(list<ImageFile>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`timings`** *(object)*

---

## fal-ai/qwen-image-layered/lora

**Title:** Qwen Image Layered
**Description:** Qwen-Image-Layered is a model capable of decomposing an image into multiple RGBA layers. Use loras to get your custom outputs.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/qwen-image-layered/lora`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** qwen, lora

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToImageLoRAInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” A caption for the input image.
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the input image.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” The negative prompt to generate an image from.
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” The guidance scale to use for the image generation.
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_layers`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” The number of layers to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 10
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `png`, `webp`
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” The acceleration level to use.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`
- **`loras`** *(list<LoRAInput>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” List of LoRA weights to apply (maximum 3).

            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.

## fal-ai/qwen-image/image-to-image

**Title:** Qwen Image
**Description:** Qwen-Image (Image-to-Image) transforms and edits input images with high fidelity, enabling precise style transfer, enhancement, and creative modification.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/qwen-image/image-to-image`
**Category:** image-to-image
**Tags:** image-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `QwenImageI2IInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate the image with
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image. By default, we will use the provided image for determining the image_size.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 2, max: 250
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `2.5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `" "` вҖ” The negative prompt for the generation
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” Acceleration level for image generation. Options: 'none', 'regular', 'high'. Higher acceleration increases speed. 'regular' balances speed and quality. 'high' is recommended for images without text.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`
- **`loras`** *(list<LoraWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” 
            The LoRAs to use for the image generation. You can use up to 3 LoRAs
            and they will be merged together to generate the final image.
        
- **`use_turbo`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable turbo mode for faster generation with high quality. When enabled, uses optimized settings (10 steps, CFG=1.2).
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The reference image to guide the generation.
- **`strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.6` вҖ” Denoising strength. 1.0 = fully remake; 0.0 = preserve original.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `QwenImageI2IOutput`
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.

---

- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `UpscaleOutput`
- **`image`** *()* вҖ” The upscaled image.

- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
