## fal-ai/ltx-2-19b/distilled/image-to-video

**Title:** LTX-2 19B Distilled
**Description:** Generate video with audio from images using LTX-2 Distilled
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ltx-2-19b/distilled/image-to-video`
**Category:** image-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `LTX2DistilledImageToVideoInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for the generation.
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to generate the video from.
- **`end_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to use as the end of the video.
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `121` вҖ” The number of frames to generate.
  Range: min: 9, max: 481
- **`video_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” The size of the generated video.
  Possible values: `auto`, `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`generate_audio`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to generate audio for the video.
- **`use_multiscale`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to use multi-scale generation. If True, the model will generate the video at a smaller scale first, then use the smaller video to guide the generation of a video at or above your requested size. This results in better coherence and details.
- **`fps`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `25` вҖ” The frames per second of the generated video.
  Range: min: 1, max: 60
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” The acceleration level to use.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`, `full`
- **`camera_lora`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” The camera LoRA to use. This allows you to control the camera movement of the generated video more accurately than just prompting the model to move the camera.
  Possible values: `dolly_in`, `dolly_out`, `dolly_left`, `dolly_right`, `jib_up`, `jib_down`, `static`, `none`
- **`camera_lora_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The scale of the camera LoRA to use. This allows you to control the camera movement of the generated video more accurately than just prompting the model to move the camera.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"blurry, out of focus, overexposed, underexposed, low contrast, washed out colors, excessive noise, grainy texture, poor lighting, flickering, motion blur, distorted proportions, unnatural skin tones, deformed facial features, asymmetrical face, missing facial features, extra limbs, disfigured hands, wrong hand count, artifacts around text, inconsistent perspective, camera shake, incorrect depth of field, background too sharp, background clutter, distracting reflections, harsh shadows, inconsistent lighting direction, color banding, cartoonish rendering, 3D CGI look, unrealistic materials, uncanny valley effect, incorrect ethnicity, wrong gender, exaggerated expressions, wrong gaze direction, mismatched lip sync, silent or muted audio, distorted voice, robotic voice, echo, background noise, off-sync audio,incorrect dialogue, added dialogue, repetitive speech, jittery movement, awkward pauses, incorrect timing, unnatural transitions, inconsistent framing, tilted camera, flat lighting, inconsistent tone, cinematic oversaturation, stylized filters, or AI artifacts."` вҖ” The negative prompt to generate the video from.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator.
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable prompt expansion.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker.
- **`video_output_type`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"X264 (.mp4)"` вҖ” The output type of the generated video.
  Possible values: `X264 (.mp4)`, `VP9 (.webm)`, `PRORES4444 (.mov)`, `GIF (.gif)`
- **`video_quality`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"high"` вҖ” The quality of the generated video.
  Possible values: `low`, `medium`, `high`, `maximum`
- **`video_write_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"balanced"` вҖ” The write mode of the generated video.
  Possible values: `fast`, `balanced`, `small`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`interpolation_direction`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"forward"` вҖ” The direction to interpolate the image sequence in. 'Forward' goes from the start image to the end image, 'Backward' goes from the end image to the start image.
  Possible values: `forward`, `backward`
- **`image_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The strength of the image to use for the video generation.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`end_image_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The strength of the end image to use for the video generation.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `LTX2ImageToVideoOutput`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for the generation.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for the random number generator.
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video.

## fal-ai/ltx-2-19b/distilled/image-to-video/lora

**Title:** LTX-2 19B Distilled
**Description:** Generate video with audio from images using LTX-2 Distilled and custom LoRA
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ltx-2-19b/distilled/image-to-video/lora`
**Category:** image-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `LTX2LoRADistilledImageToVideoInput`
**Required fields:** `loras`, `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for the generation.
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to generate the video from.
- **`end_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to use as the end of the video.
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `121` вҖ” The number of frames to generate.
  Range: min: 9, max: 481
- **`video_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” The size of the generated video.
  Possible values: `auto`, `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`generate_audio`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to generate audio for the video.
- **`use_multiscale`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to use multi-scale generation. If True, the model will generate the video at a smaller scale first, then use the smaller video to guide the generation of a video at or above your requested size. This results in better coherence and details.
- **`fps`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `25` вҖ” The frames per second of the generated video.
  Range: min: 1, max: 60
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” The acceleration level to use.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`, `full`
- **`camera_lora`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” The camera LoRA to use. This allows you to control the camera movement of the generated video more accurately than just prompting the model to move the camera.
  Possible values: `dolly_in`, `dolly_out`, `dolly_left`, `dolly_right`, `jib_up`, `jib_down`, `static`, `none`
- **`camera_lora_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The scale of the camera LoRA to use. This allows you to control the camera movement of the generated video more accurately than just prompting the model to move the camera.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"blurry, out of focus, overexposed, underexposed, low contrast, washed out colors, excessive noise, grainy texture, poor lighting, flickering, motion blur, distorted proportions, unnatural skin tones, deformed facial features, asymmetrical face, missing facial features, extra limbs, disfigured hands, wrong hand count, artifacts around text, inconsistent perspective, camera shake, incorrect depth of field, background too sharp, background clutter, distracting reflections, harsh shadows, inconsistent lighting direction, color banding, cartoonish rendering, 3D CGI look, unrealistic materials, uncanny valley effect, incorrect ethnicity, wrong gender, exaggerated expressions, wrong gaze direction, mismatched lip sync, silent or muted audio, distorted voice, robotic voice, echo, background noise, off-sync audio,incorrect dialogue, added dialogue, repetitive speech, jittery movement, awkward pauses, incorrect timing, unnatural transitions, inconsistent framing, tilted camera, flat lighting, inconsistent tone, cinematic oversaturation, stylized filters, or AI artifacts."` вҖ” The negative prompt to generate the video from.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator.
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable prompt expansion.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker.
- **`video_output_type`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"X264 (.mp4)"` вҖ” The output type of the generated video.
  Possible values: `X264 (.mp4)`, `VP9 (.webm)`, `PRORES4444 (.mov)`, `GIF (.gif)`
- **`video_quality`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"high"` вҖ” The quality of the generated video.
  Possible values: `low`, `medium`, `high`, `maximum`
- **`video_write_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"balanced"` вҖ” The write mode of the generated video.
  Possible values: `fast`, `balanced`, `small`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`loras`** *(list<LoRAInput>)* вҖ” The LoRAs to use for the generation.
- **`interpolation_direction`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"forward"` вҖ” The direction to interpolate the image sequence in. 'Forward' goes from the start image to the end image, 'Backward' goes from the end image to the start image.
  Possible values: `forward`, `backward`
- **`image_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The strength of the image to use for the video generation.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`end_image_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The strength of the end image to use for the video generation.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `LTX2ImageToVideoOutput`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for the generation.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for the random number generator.
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video.

## fal-ai/ltx-2.3-22b/distilled/image-to-video

**Title:** LTX-2.3 22B Distilled
**Description:** Generate video with audio from images using LTX-2.3 Distilled
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ltx-2.3-22b/distilled/image-to-video`
**Category:** image-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `LTX23DistilledImageToVideoInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for the generation.
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to generate the video from.
- **`end_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to use as the end of the video.
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `121` вҖ” The number of frames to generate.
  Range: min: 9, max: 481
- **`video_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” The size of the generated video.
  Possible values: `auto`, `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`generate_audio`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to generate audio for the video.
- **`use_multiscale`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to use multi-scale generation. If True, the model will generate the video at a smaller scale first, then use the smaller video to guide the generation of a video at or above your requested size. This results in better coherence and details.
- **`fps`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `24` вҖ” The frames per second of the generated video.
  Range: min: 1, max: 60
- **`scheduler`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"ltx2"` вҖ” The scheduler to use.
  Possible values: `ltx2`, `linear_quadratic`, `beta`
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” The acceleration level to use.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`, `full`
- **`camera_lora`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” The camera LoRA to use. This allows you to control the camera movement of the generated video more accurately than just prompting the model to move the camera.
  Possible values: `dolly_in`, `dolly_out`, `dolly_left`, `dolly_right`, `jib_up`, `jib_down`, `static`, `none`
- **`camera_lora_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The scale of the camera LoRA to use. This allows you to control the camera movement of the generated video more accurately than just prompting the model to move the camera.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"news broadcast, 3d animation, computer graphics, pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, watermark, logo, text, on screen text, subtitles, titles, signature, slowmo, static"` вҖ” The negative prompt to generate the video from.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator.
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable prompt expansion.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker.
- **`video_output_type`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"X264 (.mp4)"` вҖ” The output type of the generated video.
  Possible values: `X264 (.mp4)`, `VP9 (.webm)`, `PRORES4444 (.mov)`, `GIF (.gif)`
- **`video_quality`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"high"` вҖ” The quality of the generated video.
  Possible values: `low`, `medium`, `high`, `maximum`
- **`video_write_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"balanced"` вҖ” The write mode of the generated video.
  Possible values: `fast`, `balanced`, `small`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`distill_lora_second_pass_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” The scale of the distill LoRA to use for the second and subsequent passes.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`interpolation_direction`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"forward"` вҖ” The direction to interpolate the image sequence in. 'Forward' goes from the start image to the end image, 'Backward' goes from the end image to the start image.
  Possible values: `forward`, `backward`
- **`image_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The strength of the image to use for the video generation.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`end_image_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The strength of the end image to use for the video generation.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `LTX23ImageToVideoOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for the random number generator.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for the generation.

- **`distill_lora_second_pass_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” The scale of the distill LoRA to use for the second and subsequent passes.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`interpolation_direction`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"forward"` вҖ” The direction to interpolate the image sequence in. 'Forward' goes from the start image to the end image, 'Backward' goes from the end image to the start image.
  Possible values: `forward`, `backward`
- **`image_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The strength of the image to use for the video generation.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`end_image_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The strength of the end image to use for the video generation.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `LTX23ImageToVideoOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for the random number generator.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for the generation.

---

## fal-ai/ltx-2.3-22b/image-to-video

**Title:** LTX-2.3 22B
**Description:** Generate video with audio from images using LTX-2.3
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ltx-2.3-22b/image-to-video`
**Category:** image-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `LTX23ImageToVideoInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for the generation.
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to generate the video from.
- **`end_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to use as the end of the video.
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `121` вҖ” The number of frames to generate.
  Range: min: 9, max: 481
- **`video_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” The size of the generated video.
  Possible values: `auto`, `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`generate_audio`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to generate audio for the video.
- **`use_multiscale`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to use multi-scale generation. If True, the model will generate the video at a smaller scale first, then use the smaller video to guide the generation of a video at or above your requested size. This results in better coherence and details.
- **`fps`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `24` вҖ” The frames per second of the generated video.
  Range: min: 1, max: 60
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `40` вҖ” The number of inference steps to use.
  Range: min: 8, max: 50
- **`video_cfg_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3` вҖ” The Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) scale for the video. Higher values result in more consistent and focused video content.
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`video_stg_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” The Spatiotemporal Guidance (STG) scale for the video. Higher values result in more consistent and focused video content.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`video_rescaling_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.7` вҖ” The rescaling scale for the video. Controls the ratio between classifier-free guidance and spatiotemporal guidance.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`video_modality_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3` вҖ” The modality scale for the video. Controls the ratio between video and audio modalities.
  Range: min: 0, max: 10
- **`audio_cfg_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `7` вҖ” The Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) scale for the audio. Higher values result in more consistent and focused audio content.
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`audio_stg_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” The Spatiotemporal Guidance (STG) scale for the audio. Higher values result in more consistent and focused audio content.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`audio_rescaling_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.7` вҖ” The rescaling scale for the audio. Controls the ratio between classifier-free guidance and spatiotemporal guidance.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`audio_modality_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3` вҖ” The modality scale for the audio. Controls the ratio between video and audio modalities.
  Range: min: 0, max: 10
- **`gradient_estimation_gamma`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `2` вҖ” The gamma of gradient estimation during denoising. Set to 0 to disable.
  Range: min: 0, max: 10
- **`use_restart_sampling`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to use restart sampling. This will inject a small amount of noise during each denoising step, which can help improve the quality of the generated video.
- **`scheduler`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"ltx2"` вҖ” The scheduler to use.
  Possible values: `ltx2`, `linear_quadratic`, `beta`
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” The acceleration level to use.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`, `full`
- **`camera_lora`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” The camera LoRA to use. This allows you to control the camera movement of the generated video more accurately than just prompting the model to move the camera.
  Possible values: `dolly_in`, `dolly_out`, `dolly_left`, `dolly_right`, `jib_up`, `jib_down`, `static`, `none`
- **`camera_lora_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The scale of the camera LoRA to use. This allows you to control the camera movement of the generated video more accurately than just prompting the model to move the camera.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"news broadcast, 3d animation, computer graphics, pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, watermark, logo, text, on screen text, subtitles, titles, signature, slowmo, static"` вҖ” The negative prompt to generate the video from.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator.
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable prompt expansion.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker.
- **`video_output_type`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"X264 (.mp4)"` вҖ” The output type of the generated video.
  Possible values: `X264 (.mp4)`, `VP9 (.webm)`, `PRORES4444 (.mov)`, `GIF (.gif)`
- **`video_quality`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"high"` вҖ” The quality of the generated video.
  Possible values: `low`, `medium`, `high`, `maximum`
- **`video_write_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"balanced"` вҖ” The write mode of the generated video.
  Possible values: `fast`, `balanced`, `small`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`distill_lora_first_pass_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.2` вҖ” The scale of the distill LoRA to use for the first pass. Set to 0 to disable.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`distill_lora_second_pass_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” The scale of the distill LoRA to use for the second and subsequent passes.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`interpolation_direction`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"forward"` вҖ” The direction to interpolate the image sequence in. 'Forward' goes from the start image to the end image, 'Backward' goes from the end image to the start image.
  Possible values: `forward`, `backward`
- **`image_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The strength of the image to use for the video generation.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`end_image_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The strength of the end image to use for the video generation.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `LTX23ImageToVideoOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for the random number generator.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for the generation.

---

## fal-ai/ltx-2.3/image-to-video

**Title:** LTX 2.3 Video Pro
**Description:** LTX-2.3 is a high-quality, fast AI video model available in Pro and Fast variants for text-to-video, image-to-video, and audio-to-video.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ltx-2.3/image-to-video`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** stylized, transform, lipsync

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `LTXV23ImageToVideoRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the start image to use for the generated video.
- **`end_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the end image to use for the generated video. When provided, generates a transition video between start and end frames.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to use for the generated video
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `6` вҖ” The duration of the generated video in seconds
  Possible values: `6`, `8`, `10`
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1080p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `1080p`, `1440p`, `2160p`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video. If 'auto', the aspect ratio will be determined automatically based on the input image.
  Possible values: `auto`, `16:9`, `9:16`
- **`fps`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `25` вҖ” The frames per second of the generated video
  Possible values: `24`, `25`, `48`, `50`
- **`generate_audio`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to generate audio for the generated video

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `LTXV23ImageToVideoResponse`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file

---

## fal-ai/ltx-2.3/image-to-video/fast

**Title:** LTX 2.3 Video Fast
**Description:** LTX-2.3 is a high-quality, fast AI video model available in Pro and Fast variants for text-to-video, image-to-video, and audio-to-video.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ltx-2.3/image-to-video/fast`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** stylized, transform, lipsync

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `LTXV23ImageToVideoFastRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the image to generate the video from. Must be publicly accessible or base64 data URI. Supports PNG, JPEG, WebP, AVIF, and HEIF formats.
- **`end_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the end image to use for the generated video. When provided, generates a transition video between start and end frames.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate the video from
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `6` вҖ” The duration of the generated video in seconds. The fast model supports 6-20 seconds. Note: Durations longer than 10 seconds (12, 14, 16, 18, 20) are only supported with 25 FPS and 1080p resolution.
  Possible values: `6`, `8`, `10`, `12`, `14`, `16`, `18`, `20`
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1080p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `1080p`, `1440p`, `2160p`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `auto`, `16:9`, `9:16`
- **`fps`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `25` вҖ” The frames per second of the generated video
  Possible values: `24`, `25`, `48`, `50`
- **`generate_audio`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to generate audio for the generated video

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `LTXV23ImageToVideoFastResponse`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file

---

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate the video from
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `6` вҖ” The duration of the generated video in seconds
  Possible values: `6`, `8`, `10`
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1080p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `1080p`, `1440p`, `2160p`
- **`fps`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `25` вҖ” The frames per second of the generated video
  Possible values: `25`, `50`
- **`generate_audio`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to generate audio for the generated video

**Category:** image-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `LTXV20ImageToVideoFastRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the image to generate the video from. Must be publicly accessible or base64 data URI. Supports PNG, JPEG, WebP, AVIF, and HEIF formats.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate the video from
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `6` вҖ” The duration of the generated video in seconds. The fast model supports 6-20 seconds. Note: Durations longer than 10 seconds (12, 14, 16, 18, 20) are only supported with 25 FPS and 1080p resolution.
  Possible values: `6`, `8`, `10`, `12`, `14`, `16`, `18`, `20`
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1080p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `1080p`, `1440p`, `2160p`
- **`fps`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `25` вҖ” The frames per second of the generated video
  Possible values: `25`, `50`
- **`generate_audio`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to generate audio for the generated video

## fal-ai/ltx-video-13b-dev/image-to-video

**Title:** LTX Video-0.9.7 13B
**Description:** Generate videos from prompts and images using LTX Video-0.9.7 13B and custom LoRA
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ltx-video-13b-dev/image-to-video`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** video, ltx-video, image-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `ImageToVideoInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Text prompt to guide generation
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"worst quality, inconsistent motion, blurry, jittery, distorted"` вҖ” Negative prompt for generation
- **`loras`** *(list<LoRAWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” LoRA weights to use for generation
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” Resolution of the generated video.
  Possible values: `480p`, `720p`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the video.
  Possible values: `9:16`, `1:1`, `16:9`, `auto`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for generation
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `121` вҖ” The number of frames in the video.
  Range: min: 9, max: 1441
- **`first_pass_num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” Number of inference steps during the first pass.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50
- **`second_pass_num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” Number of inference steps during the second pass.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50
- **`second_pass_skip_initial_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `17` вҖ” The number of inference steps to skip in the initial steps of the second pass. By skipping some steps at the beginning, the second pass can focus on smaller details instead of larger changes.
  Range: min: 0, max: 49
- **`frame_rate`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `24` вҖ” The frame rate of the video.
  Range: min: 1, max: 60
- **`expand_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to expand the prompt using a language model.
- **`reverse_video`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to reverse the video.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker.
- **`enable_detail_pass`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to use a detail pass. If True, the model will perform a second pass to refine the video and enhance details. This incurs a 2.0x cost multiplier on the base price.
- **`temporal_adain_factor`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” The factor for adaptive instance normalization (AdaIN) applied to generated video chunks after the first. This can help deal with a gradual increase in saturation/contrast in the generated video by normalizing the color distribution across the video. A high value will ensure the color distribution is more consistent across the video, while a low value will allow for more variation in color distribution.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`tone_map_compression_ratio`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” The compression ratio for tone mapping. This is used to compress the dynamic range of the video to improve visual quality. A value of 0.0 means no compression, while a value of 1.0 means maximum compression.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” Image URL for Image-to-Video task
- **`constant_rate_factor`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `29` вҖ” The constant rate factor (CRF) to compress input media with. Compressed input media more closely matches the model's training data, which can improve motion quality.
  Range: min: 0, max: 51

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `ImageToVideoOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generation.

---

## fal-ai/ltx-video-13b-distilled/image-to-video

**Title:** LTX Video-0.9.7 13B Distilled
**Description:** Generate videos from prompts and images using LTX Video-0.9.7 13B Distilled and custom LoRA
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ltx-video-13b-distilled/image-to-video`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** video, ltx-video, image-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `DistilledImageToVideoInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Text prompt to guide generation
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"worst quality, inconsistent motion, blurry, jittery, distorted"` вҖ” Negative prompt for generation
- **`loras`** *(list<LoRAWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” LoRA weights to use for generation
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” Resolution of the generated video.
  Possible values: `480p`, `720p`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the video.
  Possible values: `9:16`, `1:1`, `16:9`, `auto`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for generation
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `121` вҖ” The number of frames in the video.
  Range: min: 9, max: 1441
- **`first_pass_num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `8` вҖ” Number of inference steps during the first pass.
  Range: min: 2, max: 12
- **`second_pass_num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `8` вҖ” Number of inference steps during the second pass.
  Range: min: 2, max: 12
- **`second_pass_skip_initial_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” The number of inference steps to skip in the initial steps of the second pass. By skipping some steps at the beginning, the second pass can focus on smaller details instead of larger changes.
  Range: min: 1, max: 11
- **`frame_rate`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `24` вҖ” The frame rate of the video.
  Range: min: 1, max: 60
- **`expand_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to expand the prompt using a language model.
- **`reverse_video`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to reverse the video.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker.
- **`enable_detail_pass`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to use a detail pass. If True, the model will perform a second pass to refine the video and enhance details. This incurs a 2.0x cost multiplier on the base price.
- **`temporal_adain_factor`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” The factor for adaptive instance normalization (AdaIN) applied to generated video chunks after the first. This can help deal with a gradual increase in saturation/contrast in the generated video by normalizing the color distribution across the video. A high value will ensure the color distribution is more consistent across the video, while a low value will allow for more variation in color distribution.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`tone_map_compression_ratio`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” The compression ratio for tone mapping. This is used to compress the dynamic range of the video to improve visual quality. A value of 0.0 means no compression, while a value of 1.0 means maximum compression.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`constant_rate_factor`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `29` вҖ” The constant rate factor (CRF) to compress input media with. Compressed input media more closely matches the model's training data, which can improve motion quality.
  Range: min: 0, max: 51
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” Image URL for Image-to-Video task

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `ImageToVideoOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generation.

---

## fal-ai/ltx-video-lora/image-to-video

**Title:** LTX Video-0.9.7 LoRA
**Description:** Generate videos from prompts and images using LTX Video-0.9.7 and custom LoRA
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ltx-video-lora/image-to-video`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** video, ltx-video, image-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `ImageToVideoInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate the video from.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"blurry, low quality, low resolution, inconsistent motion, jittery, distorted"` вҖ” The negative prompt to use.
- **`loras`** *(list<LoRAWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” The LoRA weights to use for generation.
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The resolution of the video.
  Possible values: `480p`, `720p`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the video.
  Possible values: `16:9`, `1:1`, `9:16`, `auto`
- **`number_of_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `89` вҖ” The number of frames in the video.
  Range: min: 9, max: 161
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” The number of inference steps to use.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`frames_per_second`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `25` вҖ” The frame rate of the video.
  Range: min: 1, max: 60
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed to use for generation.
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to expand the prompt using the LLM.
- **`reverse_video`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to reverse the video.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker.
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to use as input.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `ImageToVideoOutput`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generation.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video.

- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed to use for random number generation.
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” The number of inference steps to take.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3` вҖ” The guidance scale to use.
  Range: max: 10
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to generate the video from.

- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for random number generation.

This can help deal with a gradual increase in saturation/contrast in the generated video by normalizing the color distribution across the video. ## fal-ai/luma-dream-machine/ray-2-flash/image-to-video

**Title:** Luma Ray 2 Flash (Image to Video)
**Description:** Ray2 Flash is a fast video generative model capable of creating realistic visuals with natural, coherent motion.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/luma-dream-machine/ray-2-flash/image-to-video`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** motion, transformation

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `Ray2ImageToVideoRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)*
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” Initial image to start the video from. Can be used together with end_image_url.
- **`end_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” Final image to end the video with. Can be used together with image_url.
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `16:9`, `9:16`, `4:3`, `3:4`, `21:9`, `9:21`
- **`loop`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether the video should loop (end of video is blended with the beginning)
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"540p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video (720p costs 2x more, 1080p costs 4x more)
  Possible values: `540p`, `720p`, `1080p`
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"5s"` вҖ” The duration of the generated video
  Possible values: `5s`, `9s`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Ray2I2VOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” URL of the generated video

---

- **`end_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” Final image to end the video with. Can be used together with image_url.
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `16:9`, `9:16`, `4:3`, `3:4`, `21:9`, `9:21`
- **`loop`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether the video should loop (end of video is blended with the beginning)
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"540p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video (720p costs 2x more, 1080p costs 4x more)
  Possible values: `540p`, `720p`, `1080p`

## fal-ai/magi-distilled/image-to-video

**Title:** MAGI-1 (Distilled)
**Description:** MAGI-1 distilled generates videos faster from images with exceptional understanding of physical interactions and prompting
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/magi-distilled/image-to-video`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** image-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `MagiImageToVideoRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt to guide video generation.
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the input image to represent the first frame of the video. If the input image does not match the chosen aspect ratio, it is resized and center cropped.
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `96` вҖ” Number of frames to generate. Must be between 96 and 192 (inclusive). Each additional 24 frames beyond 96 incurs an additional billing unit.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. If None, a random seed is chosen.
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” Resolution of the generated video (480p or 720p). 480p is 0.5 billing units, and 720p is 1 billing unit.
  Possible values: `480p`, `720p`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `16` вҖ” Number of inference steps for sampling. Higher values give better quality but take longer.
  Possible values: `4`, `8`, `16`, `32`
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” Aspect ratio of the generated video. If 'auto', the aspect ratio will be determined automatically based on the input image.
  Possible values: `auto`, `16:9`, `9:16`, `1:1`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `MagiImageToVideoResponse`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.

---

## fal-ai/magi/image-to-video

**Title:** MAGI-1
**Description:** MAGI-1 generates videos from images with exceptional understanding of physical interactions and prompting
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/magi/image-to-video`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** image-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `MagiImageToVideoRequest`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt to guide video generation.
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the input image to represent the first frame of the video. If the input image does not match the chosen aspect ratio, it is resized and center cropped.
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `96` вҖ” Number of frames to generate. Must be between 96 and 192 (inclusive). Each additional 24 frames beyond 96 incurs an additional billing unit.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. If None, a random seed is chosen.
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” Resolution of the generated video (480p or 720p). 480p is 0.5 billing units, and 720p is 1 billing unit.
  Possible values: `480p`, `720p`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `16` вҖ” Number of inference steps for sampling. Higher values give better quality but take longer.
  Possible values: `4`, `8`, `16`, `32`, `64`
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” Aspect ratio of the generated video. If 'auto', the aspect ratio will be determined automatically based on the input image.
  Possible values: `auto`, `16:9`, `9:16`, `1:1`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `MagiImageToVideoResponse`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.

**Title:** MiniMax Hailuo 2.3 [Standard] (Image to Video)
**Description:** MiniMax Hailuo-2.3 Image To Video API (Standard, 768p): Advanced image-to-video generation model with 768p resolution
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/minimax/hailuo-2.3/standard/image-to-video`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** image-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `StandardImageToVideoHailuo23Input`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Text prompt for video generation
- **`prompt_optimizer`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to use the model's prompt optimizer
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"6"` вҖ” The duration of the video in seconds.
  Possible values: `6`, `10`
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the image to use as the first frame

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `StandardImageToVideoHailuo23Output`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video

---

## fal-ai/minimax/video-01-director/image-to-video

**Title:** MiniMax (Hailuo AI) Video 01 Director - Image to Video
**Description:** Generate video clips more accurately with respect to initial image, natural language descriptions, and using camera movement instructions for shot control.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/minimax/video-01-director/image-to-video`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** motion, transformation, camera-controls

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `ImageToVideoDirectorRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Text prompt for video generation. Camera movement instructions can be added using square brackets (e.g. [Pan left] or [Zoom in]). You can use up to 3 combined movements per prompt. Supported movements: Truck left/right, Pan left/right, Push in/Pull out, Pedestal up/down, Tilt up/down, Zoom in/out, Shake, Tracking shot, Static shot. For example: [Truck left, Pan right, Zoom in]. For a more detailed guide, refer https://sixth-switch-2ac.notion.site/T2V-01-Director-Model-Tutorial-with-camera-movement-1886c20a98eb80f395b8e05291ad8645
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the image to use as the first frame
- **`prompt_optimizer`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to use the model's prompt optimizer

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `I2VDirectorOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video

---

- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video

## fal-ai/ovi/image-to-video

**Title:** Ovi
**Description:** Ovi can generate videos with audio from image and text inputs.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ovi/image-to-video`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** image-to-audio-video, image-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `OviI2VRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt to guide video generation.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"jitter, bad hands, blur, distortion"` вҖ” Negative prompt for video generation.
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” The number of inference steps.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`audio_negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"robotic, muffled, echo, distorted"` вҖ” Negative prompt for audio generation.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. If None, a random seed is chosen.
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The image URL to guide video generation.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `OviI2VResponse`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.
- **`video`** *(?)* вҖ” The generated video file.

---

**Title:** Pika Effects (v1.5)
**Description:** Pika Effects are AI-powered video effects designed to modify objects, characters, and environments in a fun, engaging, and visually compelling manner.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/pika/v1.5/pikaffects`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** editing, effects, animation

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `PikaffectsRequest`
**Required fields:** `image_url`, `pikaffect`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the input image
- **`pikaffect`** *(enum)* вҖ” The Pikaffect to apply
  Possible values: `Cake-ify`, `Crumble`, `Crush`, `Decapitate`, `Deflate`, `Dissolve`, `Explode`, `Eye-pop`, `Inflate`, `Levitate`, `Melt`, `Peel`, `Poke`, `Squish`, `Ta-da`, `Tear`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Text prompt to guide the effect
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Negative prompt to guide the model
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `PikaffectsOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video with applied effect

## fal-ai/pika/v2.2/pikaframes

**Title:** Pika
**Description:** Discover ultimate control with Pikaframes key frame interpolation, a stunning image-to-video feature that allows you to upload up to 5 keyframes, customize their transition length and prompt, and see their images come to life as seamless videos.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/pika/v2.2/pikaframes`
**Category:** image-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `Pika22KeyframesToVideoRequest`
**Required fields:** `image_urls`

- **`image_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” URLs of keyframe images (2-5 images) to create transitions between
- **`transitions`** *(list<KeyframeTransition>)* вҖ” Configuration for each transition. Length must be len(image_urls) - 1. Total duration of all transitions must not exceed 25 seconds. If not provided, uses default 5-second transitions with the global prompt.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default prompt for all transitions. Individual transition prompts override this.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” A negative prompt to guide the model
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `720p`, `1080p`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Pika22KeyframesToVideoOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video with transitions between keyframes

---

## fal-ai/pika/v2.2/pikascenes

**Title:** Pika Scenes (v2.2)
**Description:** Pika Scenes v2.2 creates videos from a images with high quality output.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/pika/v2.2/pikascenes`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** editing, effects, animation

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `Pika22PikascenesRequest`
**Required fields:** `image_urls`, `prompt`

- **`image_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” URLs of images to combine into a video
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Text prompt describing the desired video
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"ugly, bad, terrible"` вҖ” A negative prompt to guide the model
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `16:9`, `9:16`, `1:1`, `4:5`, `5:4`, `3:2`, `2:3`
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1080p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `720p`, `1080p`
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” The duration of the generated video in seconds
  Possible values: `5`, `10`
- **`ingredients_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"precise"` вҖ” Mode for integrating multiple images. Precise mode is more accurate, creative mode is more creative.
  Possible values: `precise`, `creative`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Pika22PikascenesOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video combining multiple images

---

## fal-ai/pixverse/c1/image-to-video

**Title:** PixVerse C1 Image to Video
**Description:** Animate images into cinematic videos with PixVerse C1, supporting 1080p resolution and native audio generation.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/pixverse/c1/image-to-video`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** video-generation, image-to-video, pixverse, animation, 1080p, audio

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `ImageToVideoRequestC1`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)*
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `360p`, `540p`, `720p`, `1080p`
- **`duration`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” The duration of the generated video in seconds (1-15)
  Range: min: 1, max: 15
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same video every time.
        
- **`generate_audio_switch`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable audio generation (BGM, SFX, dialogue)
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the image to use as the first frame

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `I2VOutputC1`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file.

---

## fal-ai/pixverse/c1/reference-to-video

**Title:** PixVerse C1 Reference to Video
**Description:** Generate character-consistent videos from reference images using PixVerse C1, with subject and background references.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/pixverse/c1/reference-to-video`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** video-generation, reference-to-video, pixverse, character-consistency, 1080p, audio

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `ReferenceToVideoRequestC1`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_references`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt for the reference-to-video generation. Use @ref_name to refer to uploaded references.
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `16:9`, `4:3`, `1:1`, `3:4`, `9:16`, `2:3`, `3:2`, `21:9`
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `360p`, `540p`, `720p`, `1080p`
- **`duration`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” The duration of the generated video in seconds (1-15)
  Range: min: 1, max: 15
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same video every time.
        
- **`generate_audio_switch`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable audio generation (BGM, SFX, dialogue)
- **`image_references`** *(list<ImageReference>)* вҖ” List of reference images with type and name. Use @ref_name in the prompt to refer to each reference.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `ReferenceOutputC1`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file.

---

## fal-ai/pixverse/c1/transition

**Title:** PixVerse C1 Transition
**Description:** Create seamless cinematic transitions between two images with PixVerse C1, with native audio and up to 1080p.

**Required fields:** `prompt`, `first_image_url`

- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `16:9`, `4:3`, `1:1`, `3:4`, `9:16`, `2:3`, `3:2`, `21:9`
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `360p`, `540p`, `720p`, `1080p`
- **`duration`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” The duration of the generated video in seconds (1-15)
  Range: min: 1, max: 15
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same video every time.
        
- **`generate_audio_switch`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable audio generation (BGM, SFX, dialogue)
- **`first_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the image to use as the first frame
- **`end_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the image to use as the last frame

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `TransitionOutputC1`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file.

## fal-ai/pixverse/swap

**Title:** Pixverse
**Description:** Generate high quality video clips by swapping person, objects and background using Pixverse Swap.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/pixverse/swap`
**Category:** image-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `SwapRequest`
**Required fields:** `video_url`, `image_url`

- **`video_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the external video to swap
- **`mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"person"` вҖ” The swap mode to use
  Possible values: `person`, `object`, `background`
- **`keyframe_id`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The keyframe ID to use for face/object mapping. The input video is normalized to 24 FPS before processing, so keyframe 1 = first frame, keyframe 24 = 1 second in, etc. Valid range: 1 to (duration_seconds * 24).
  Range: min: 1
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the target image for swapping
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The output resolution (1080p not supported)
  Possible values: `360p`, `540p`, `720p`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for generation
- **`original_sound_switch`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to keep the original audio

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `SwapOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated swapped video

---

**Title:** PixVerse v3.5: Effects
**Description:** Generate high quality video clips with different effects using PixVerse v3.5

  Possible values: `Kiss Me AI`, `Kiss`, `Muscle Surge`, `Warmth of Jesus`, `Anything, Robot`, `The Tiger Touch`, `Hug`, `Holy Wings`, `Microwave`, `Zombie Mode`, `Squid Game`, `Baby Face`, `Black Myth: Wukong`, `Long Hair Magic`, `Leggy Run`, `Fin-tastic Mermaid`, `Punch Face`, `Creepy Devil Smile`, `Thunder God`, `Eye Zoom Challenge`, `Who's Arrested?`, `Baby Arrived`, `Werewolf Rage`, `Bald Swipe`, `BOOM DROP`, `Huge Cutie`, `Liquid Metal`, `Sharksnap!`, `Dust Me Away`, `3D Figurine Factor`, `Bikini Up`, `My Girlfriends`, `My Boyfriends`, `Subject 3 Fever`, `Earth Zoom`, `Pole Dance`, `Vroom Dance`, `GhostFace Terror`, `Dragon Evoker`, `Skeletal Bae`, `Summoning succubus`, `Halloween Voodoo Doll`, `3D Naked-Eye AD`, `Package Explosion`, `Dishes Served`, `Ocean ad`, `Supermarket AD`, `Tree doll`, `Come Feel My Abs`, `The Bicep Flex`, `London Elite Vibe`, `Flora Nymph Gown`, `Christmas Costume`, `It's Snowy`, `Reindeer Cruiser`, `Snow Globe Maker`, `Pet Christmas Outfit`, `Adopt a Polar Pal`, `Cat Christmas Box`, `Starlight Gift Box`, `Xmas Poster`, `Pet Christmas Tree`, `City Santa Hat`, `Stocking Sweetie`, `Christmas Night`, `Xmas Front Page Karma`, `Grinch's Xmas Hijack`, `Giant Product`, `Truck Fashion Shoot`, `Beach AD`, `Shoal Surround`, `Mechanical Assembly`, `Lighting AD`, `Billboard AD`, `Product close-up`, `Parachute Delivery`, `Dreamlike Cloud`, `Macaron Machine`, `Poster AD`, `Truck AD`, `Graffiti AD`, `3D Figurine Factory`, `The Exclusive First Class`, `Art Zoom Challenge`, `I Quit`, `Hitchcock Dolly Zoom`, `Smell the Lens`, `I believe I can fly`, `Strikout Dance`, `Pixel World`, `Mint in Box`, `Hands up, Hand`, `Flora Nymph Go`, `Somber Embrace`, `Beam me up`, `Suit Swagger`
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” Optional URL of the image to use as the first frame. If not provided, generates from text
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video.
  Possible values: `360p`, `540p`, `720p`, `1080p`
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"5"` вҖ” The duration of the generated video in seconds

  Possible values: `360p`, `540p`, `720p`, `1080p`

  Possible values: `5`, `8`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Negative prompt to be used for the generation
- **`style`** *(string)* вҖ” The style of the generated video
  Possible values: `anime`, `3d_animation`, `clay`, `comic`, `cyberpunk`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same video every time.
        
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the image to use as the first frame

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `I2VOutput`

**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `360p`, `540p`, `720p`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Negative prompt to be used for the generation
- **`style`** *(string)* вҖ” The style of the generated video
  Possible values: `anime`, `3d_animation`, `clay`, `comic`, `cyberpunk`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same video every time.
        
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the image to use as the first frame

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `I2VOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video

## fal-ai/pixverse/v3.5/transition

- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `360p`, `540p`, `720p`, `1080p`
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"5"` вҖ” The duration of the generated video in seconds
  Possible values: `5`, `8`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Negative prompt to be used for the generation
- **`style`** *(string)* вҖ” The style of the generated video
  Possible values: `anime`, `3d_animation`, `clay`, `comic`, `cyberpunk`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same video every time.
        
- **`first_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the image to use as the first frame
- **`end_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the image to use as the last frame

## fal-ai/pixverse/v4.5/image-to-video

**Title:** Pixverse
**Description:** Generate high quality video clips from text and image prompts using PixVerse v4.5
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/pixverse/v4.5/image-to-video`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** stylized, transform

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `ImageToVideoRequestV4`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)*
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `360p`, `540p`, `720p`, `1080p`
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"5"` вҖ” The duration of the generated video in seconds. 8s videos cost double. 1080p videos are limited to 5 seconds
  Possible values: `5`, `8`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Negative prompt to be used for the generation
- **`style`** *(string)* вҖ” The style of the generated video
  Possible values: `anime`, `3d_animation`, `clay`, `comic`, `cyberpunk`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same video every time.
        
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the image to use as the first frame
- **`camera_movement`** *(string)* вҖ” The type of camera movement to apply to the video
  Possible values: `horizontal_left`, `horizontal_right`, `vertical_up`, `vertical_down`, `zoom_in`, `zoom_out`, `crane_up`, `quickly_zoom_in`, `quickly_zoom_out`, `smooth_zoom_in`, `camera_rotation`, `robo_arm`, `super_dolly_out`, `whip_pan`, `hitchcock`, `left_follow`, `right_follow`, `pan_left`, `pan_right`, `fix_bg`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `I2VOutputV4`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video

---

**Title:** Pixverse
**Description:** Generate high quality video clips from text and image prompts using PixVerse v5.5

  Possible values: `360p`, `540p`, `720p`, `1080p`

  Possible values: `5`, `8`, `10`

- **`style`** *(string)* вҖ” The style of the generated video

- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same video every time.
        
- **`generate_audio_switch`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable audio generation (BGM, SFX, dialogue)

- **`thinking_type`** *(string)* вҖ” Prompt optimization mode: 'enabled' to optimize, 'disabled' to turn off, 'auto' for model decision

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `I2VOutputV5_5`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video

## fal-ai/pixverse/v5.6/transition

**Title:** Pixverse
**Description:** Use the latest pixverse v5.6 model to turn your texts and images into amazing videos.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/pixverse/v5.6/transition`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** image-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TransitionRequestV5_6`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `first_image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt for the transition
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `16:9`, `4:3`, `1:1`, `3:4`, `9:16`
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `360p`, `540p`, `720p`, `1080p`
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"5"` вҖ” The duration of the generated video in seconds. 1080p videos are limited to 5 or 8 seconds
  Possible values: `5`, `8`, `10`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Negative prompt to be used for the generation
- **`style`** *(string)* вҖ” The style of the generated video
  Possible values: `anime`, `3d_animation`, `clay`, `comic`, `cyberpunk`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same video every time.
        
- **`generate_audio_switch`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable audio generation (BGM, SFX, dialogue)
- **`thinking_type`** *(string)* вҖ” Prompt optimization mode: 'enabled' to optimize, 'disabled' to turn off, 'auto' for model decision
  Possible values: `enabled`, `disabled`, `auto`
- **`first_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the image to use as the first frame
- **`end_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the image to use as the last frame

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `TransitionOutputV5_5`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video

---

**Title:** Pixverse
**Description:** Generate high quality video clips with different effects using PixVerse v5

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” Optional URL of the image to use as the first frame. If not provided, generates from text
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video.
  Possible values: `360p`, `540p`, `720p`, `1080p`
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"5"` вҖ” The duration of the generated video in seconds
  Possible values: `5`, `8`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Negative prompt to be used for the generation

## fal-ai/sadtalker

**Title:** Sad Talker
**Description:** Learning Realistic 3D Motion Coefficients for Stylized Audio-Driven Single Image Talking Face Animation
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/sadtalker`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** animation

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `SadTalkerInput`
**Required fields:** `source_image_url`, `driven_audio_url`

- **`source_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the source image
- **`driven_audio_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the driven audio
- **`pose_style`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” The style of the pose
  Range: min: 0, max: 45
- **`face_model_resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"256"` вҖ” The resolution of the face model
  Possible values: `256`, `512`
- **`expression_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The scale of the expression
  Range: min: 0, max: 3
- **`face_enhancer`** *(string)* вҖ” The type of face enhancer to use
- **`still_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to use still mode. Fewer head motion, works with preprocess `full`.
- **`preprocess`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"crop"` вҖ” The type of preprocessing to use
  Possible values: `crop`, `extcrop`, `resize`, `full`, `extfull`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `SadTalkerOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” URL of the generated video

---

## fal-ai/sadtalker/reference

**Title:** Sad Talker
**Description:** Learning Realistic 3D Motion Coefficients for Stylized Audio-Driven Single Image Talking Face Animation

- **`face_model_resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"256"` вҖ” The resolution of the face model
  Possible values: `256`, `512`
- **`expression_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The scale of the expression
  Range: min: 0, max: 3
- **`face_enhancer`** *(string)* вҖ” The type of face enhancer to use
- **`still_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to use still mode. Fewer head motion, works with preprocess `full`.
- **`preprocess`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"crop"` вҖ” The type of preprocessing to use
  Possible values: `crop`, `extcrop`, `resize`, `full`, `extfull`

## fal-ai/skyreels-i2v

**Title:** Skyreels V1 (Image-to-Video)
**Description:** SkyReels V1 is the first and most advanced open-source human-centric video foundation model. By fine-tuning HunyuanVideo on O(10M) high-quality film and television clips
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/skyreels-i2v`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** motion

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `SkyreelsI2VRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate the video from.
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the image input.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for generation. If not provided, a random seed will be used.
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `6` вҖ” Guidance scale for generation (between 1.0 and 20.0)
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” Number of denoising steps (between 1 and 50). Higher values give better quality but take longer.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Negative prompt to guide generation away from certain attributes.
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” Aspect ratio of the output video
  Possible values: `16:9`, `9:16`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `SkyreelsI2VResponse`
- **`video`** *()*
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation

---

## fal-ai/sora-2/characters

**Title:** Sora 2
**Description:** Generate character ids to use with Sora 2 generations
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/sora-2/characters`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** 

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `CreateCharacterInput`
**Required fields:** `video_url`, `name`

- **`video_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of an MP4 video (minimum 720p, max ~2.67:1 aspect ratio) to define the character. Videos exceeding 1080p are automatically scaled down. Non-standard aspect ratios are automatically padded to 16:9 (landscape) or 9:16 (portrait). Videos longer than 4 seconds are trimmed to the first 4 seconds.
- **`name`** *(string)* вҖ” Name for the character (1вҖ“80 characters). Refer to this name in prompts when using the character.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `CreateCharacterOutput`
- **`name`** *(string)* вҖ” The character name
- **`id`** *(string)* вҖ” API character ID (format char_...). Use this in character_ids when generating video.

---

## fal-ai/sora-2/image-to-video

**Title:** Sora 2
**Description:** Image-to-video endpoint for Sora 2, OpenAI's state-of-the-art video model capable of creating richly detailed, dynamic clips with audio from natural language or images.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/sora-2/image-to-video`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** image-to-video, audio, sora

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `ImageToVideoInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt describing the video you want to generate
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `auto`, `720p`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `auto`, `9:16`, `16:9`
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” Duration of the generated video in seconds
  Possible values: `4`, `8`, `12`, `16`, `20`
- **`delete_video`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to delete the video after generation for privacy reasons. If True, the video cannot be used for remixing and will be permanently deleted.
- **`model`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"sora-2"` вҖ” The model to use for the generation. When the default model is selected, the latest snapshot of the model will be used - otherwise, select a specific snapshot of the model.
  Possible values: `sora-2`, `sora-2-2025-12-08`, `sora-2-2025-10-06`
- **`detect_and_block_ip`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If enabled, the prompt (and image for image-to-video) will be checked for known intellectual property references and the request will be blocked if any are detected.
- **`character_ids`** *(array)* вҖ” Up to two character IDs (from create-character) to use in the video. Refer to characters by name in the prompt. When set, only the OpenAI provider is used.
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to use as the first frame

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `ImageToVideoOutput`
- **`thumbnail`** *(?)* вҖ” Thumbnail image for the video
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video
- **`spritesheet`** *(?)* вҖ” Spritesheet image for the video
- **`video_id`** *(string)* вҖ” The ID of the generated video

---

**Description:** Image-to-video endpoint for Sora 2 Pro, OpenAI's state-of-the-art video model capable of creating richly detailed, dynamic clips with audio from natural language or images.

  Possible values: `auto`, `720p`, `1080p`, `true_1080p`

  Possible values: `auto`, `9:16`, `16:9`
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” Duration of the generated video in seconds
  Possible values: `4`, `8`, `12`, `16`, `20`
- **`delete_video`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to delete the video after generation for privacy reasons. If True, the video cannot be used for remixing and will be permanently deleted.
- **`detect_and_block_ip`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If enabled, the prompt (and image for image-to-video) will be checked for known intellectual property references and the request will be blocked if any are detected.
- **`character_ids`** *(array)* вҖ” Up to two character IDs (from create-character) to use in the video. Refer to characters by name in the prompt. When set, only the OpenAI provider is used.
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to use as the first frame

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `ProImageToVideoOutput`
- **`thumbnail`** *(?)* вҖ” Thumbnail image for the video
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video
- **`spritesheet`** *(?)* вҖ” Spritesheet image for the video
- **`video_id`** *(string)* вҖ” The ID of the generated video

## fal-ai/stable-video

**Title:** High Quality Stable Video Diffusion
**Description:** Generate short video clips from your images using SVD v1.1
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/stable-video`
**Category:** image-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `ImageInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to use as a starting point for the generation.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`motion_bucket_id`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `127` вҖ” 
            The motion bucket id determines the motion of the generated video. The
            higher the number, the more motion there will be.
        
  Range: min: 1, max: 255
- **`cond_aug`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.02` вҖ” 
            The conditoning augmentation determines the amount of noise that will be
            added to the conditioning frame. The higher the number, the more noise
            there will be, and the less the video will look like the initial image.
            Increase it for more motion.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 10
- **`fps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `25` вҖ” The frames per second of the generated video.
  Range: min: 10, max: 100

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `VideoOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Seed for random number generator
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” Generated video

---

## fal-ai/veo2/image-to-video

**Title:** Veo 2 (Image to Video)
**Description:** Veo 2 creates videos from images with realistic motion and very high quality output.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/veo2/image-to-video`
**Category:** image-to-video
**Tags:** motion, transformation

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `ImageToVideoInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt describing how the image should be animated
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the input image to animate. Should be 720p or higher resolution in 16:9 or 9:16 aspect ratio. If the image is not in 16:9 or 9:16 aspect ratio, it will be cropped to fit.
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"5s"` вҖ” The duration of the generated video in seconds
  Possible values: `5s`, `6s`, `7s`, `8s`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `ImageToVideoOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video

---

## fal-ai/veo3.1/fast/first-last-frame-to-video

**Title:** Veo 3.1 Fast
**Description:** Generate videos from a first/last frame using Google's Veo 3.1 Fast
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/veo3.1/fast/first-last-frame-to-video`
**Category:** image-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `Veo31FirstLastFrameToVideoInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `first_frame_url`, `last_frame_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt describing the video you want to generate
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video.
  Possible values: `auto`, `16:9`, `9:16`
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"8s"` вҖ” The duration of the generated video.
  Possible values: `4s`, `6s`, `8s`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” A negative prompt to guide the video generation.
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video.
  Possible values: `720p`, `1080p`, `4k`
- **`generate_audio`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to generate audio for the video.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator.
- **`auto_fix`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to automatically attempt to fix prompts that fail content policy or other validation checks by rewriting them.
- **`safety_tolerance`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"4"` вҖ” The safety tolerance level for content moderation. 1 is the most strict (blocks most content), 6 is the least strict.
  Possible values: `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`, `6`
- **`first_frame_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the first frame of the video
- **`last_frame_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the last frame of the video

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Veo31FirstLastFrameToVideoOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video.

## fal-ai/veo3.1/fast/image-to-video

**Title:** Veo 3.1 Fast
**Description:** Generate videos from your image prompts using Veo 3.1 fast.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/veo3.1/fast/image-to-video`
**Category:** image-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `Veo31ImageToVideoInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt describing the video you want to generate
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video. Only 16:9 and 9:16 are supported.
  Possible values: `auto`, `16:9`, `9:16`
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"8s"` вҖ” The duration of the generated video.
  Possible values: `4s`, `6s`, `8s`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” A negative prompt to guide the video generation.
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video.
  Possible values: `720p`, `1080p`, `4k`
- **`generate_audio`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to generate audio for the video.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator.
- **`auto_fix`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to automatically attempt to fix prompts that fail content policy or other validation checks by rewriting them.
- **`safety_tolerance`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"4"` вҖ” The safety tolerance level for content moderation. 1 is the most strict (blocks most content), 6 is the least strict.
  Possible values: `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`, `6`
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the input image to animate. Should be 720p or higher resolution in 16:9 or 9:16 aspect ratio. If the image is not in 16:9 or 9:16 aspect ratio, it will be cropped to fit.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Veo31ImageToVideoOutput`

## fal-ai/vidu/image-to-video

**Description:** Vidu Image to Video generates high-quality videos with exceptional visual quality and motion diversity from a single image
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/vidu/image-to-video`

**Tags:** motion, image to video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `ImageToVideoRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Text prompt for video generation, max 1500 characters
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of the image to use as the first frame
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for generation
- **`movement_amplitude`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” The movement amplitude of objects in the frame
  Possible values: `auto`, `small`, `medium`, `large`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `VideoOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video
