## fal-ai/f-lite/standard

**Title:** F Lite
**Description:** F Lite is a 10B parameter diffusion model created by Fal and Freepik, trained exclusively on copyright-safe and SFW content.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/f-lite/standard`
**Category:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToImageInputStandard`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Negative Prompt for generation.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_4_3"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3.5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.

---

## fal-ai/fast-fooocus-sdxl

**Title:** Fooocus
**Description:** Fooocus extreme speed mode as a standalone app.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/fast-fooocus-sdxl`
**Category:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToImageFooocusInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use. Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `8` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 24
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `2` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`embeddings`** *(list<Embedding>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” The list of embeddings to use.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`safety_checker_version`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"v1"` вҖ” The version of the safety checker to use. v1 is the default CompVis safety checker. v2 uses a custom ViT model.
  Possible values: `v1`, `v2`
- **`expand_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the prompt will be expanded with additional prompts.
- **`format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`guidance_rescale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” The rescale factor for the CFG.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`enable_refiner`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, a smaller model will try to refine the output after it was processed.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        

---

## fal-ai/fast-fooocus-sdxl/image-to-image

**Title:** Fooocus
**Description:** Fooocus extreme speed mode as a standalone app.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/fast-fooocus-sdxl/image-to-image`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** stylized

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `ImageToImageFooocusInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`, `prompt`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the image to use as a starting point for the generation.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use.Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image. Leave it none to automatically infer from the prompt image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `8` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 24
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `2` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.95` вҖ” determines how much the generated image resembles the initial image
  Range: min: 0.05, max: 1
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`embeddings`** *(list<Embedding>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” The list of embeddings to use.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`safety_checker_version`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"v1"` вҖ” The version of the safety checker to use. v1 is the default CompVis safety checker. v2 uses a custom ViT model.
  Possible values: `v1`, `v2`
- **`expand_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the prompt will be expanded with additional prompts.
- **`format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`guidance_rescale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” The rescale factor for the CFG.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`enable_refiner`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, a smaller model will try to refine the output after it was processed.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.

            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want

## fal-ai/fast-lightning-sdxl

**Title:** Stable Diffusion XL Lightning
**Description:** Run SDXL at the speed of light
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/fast-lightning-sdxl`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** diffusion, lightning, real-time

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToImageLightningInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`embeddings`** *(list<Embedding>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” The list of embeddings to use.
- **`safety_checker_version`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"v1"` вҖ” The version of the safety checker to use. v1 is the default CompVis safety checker. v2 uses a custom ViT model.
  Possible values: `v1`, `v2`
- **`expand_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the prompt will be expanded with additional prompts.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Possible values: `1`, `2`, `4`, `8`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`request_id`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            An id bound to a request, can be used with response to identify the request
            itself.
        
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `null` вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
        

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.

---

## fal-ai/fast-sdxl

**Title:** Stable Diffusion XL
**Description:** Run SDXL at the speed of light
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/fast-sdxl`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** diffusion, lora, embeddings, high-res, style

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `7.5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`expand_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the prompt will be expanded with additional prompts.
- **`safety_checker_version`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"v1"` вҖ” The version of the safety checker to use. v1 is the default CompVis safety checker. v2 uses a custom ViT model.
  Possible values: `v1`, `v2`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`loras`** *(list<LoraWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” The list of LoRA weights to use.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `25` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`request_id`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            An id bound to a request, can be used with response to identify the request
            itself.
        
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `null` вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use. Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`embeddings`** *(list<Embedding>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” The list of embeddings to use.
- **`format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        

---

## fal-ai/fast-sdxl-controlnet-canny

**Title:** ControlNet SDXL
**Description:** Generate Images with ControlNet.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/fast-sdxl-controlnet-canny`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** diffusion, controlnet, manipulation

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToImageControlNetInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `control_image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
- **`control_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The URL of the control image.
- **`controlnet_conditioning_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” The scale of the controlnet conditioning.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use. Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image. Leave it none to automatically infer from the control image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `25` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`enable_deep_cache`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” 
            If set to true, DeepCache will be enabled. TBD
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `7.5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” 
            If set to true, the function will wait for the image to be generated and uploaded
            before returning the response. This will increase the latency of the function but
            it allows you to get the image directly in the response without going through the CDN.
        
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`loras`** *(list<LoraWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” The list of LoRA weights to use.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`expand_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the prompt will be expanded with additional prompts.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.

## fal-ai/flux-1/dev

**Title:** FLUX.1 [dev]
**Description:** FLUX.1 [dev] is a 12 billion parameter flow transformer that generates high-quality images from text. It is suitable for personal and commercial use.

**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/flux-1/dev`
**Category:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `BaseFlux1Input`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_4_3"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
        The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
        will output the same image every time.
    
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3.5` вҖ” 
        The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
        the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
    
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” The speed of the generation. The higher the speed, the faster the generation.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.

## fal-ai/flux-2

**Title:** Flux 2
**Description:** Text-to-image generation with FLUX.2 [dev] from Black Forest Labs. Enhanced realism, crisper text generation, and native editing capabilities.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/flux-2`
**Category:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `Flux2TextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `2.5` вҖ” Guidance Scale is a measure of how close you want the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed to use for the generation. If not provided, a random seed will be used.
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 4, max: 50
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_4_3"` вҖ” The size of the image to generate. The width and height must be between 512 and 2048 pixels.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” The acceleration level to use for the image generation.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the prompt will be expanded for better results.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Flux2T2IOutput`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`images`** *(list<ImageFile>)* вҖ” The generated images
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`timings`** *(object)*

---

## fal-ai/flux-2-flex

**Title:** Flux 2 Flex
**Description:** Text-to-image generation with FLUX.2 [flex] from Black Forest Labs. Features adjustable inference steps and guidance scale for fine-tuned control. Enhanced typography and text rendering capabilities.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/flux-2-flex`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** stylized, transform

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `Flux2FlexTextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_4_3"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed to use for the generation.
- **`safety_tolerance`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"2"` вҖ” The safety tolerance level for the generated image. 1 being the most strict and 5 being the most permissive.
  Possible values: `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3.5` вҖ” The guidance scale to use for the generation.
  Range: min: 1.5, max: 10
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Flux2FlexOutput`
- **`images`** *(list<ImageFile>)* вҖ” The generated images.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for the generation.

## fal-ai/flux-2-lora-gallery/ballpoint-pen-sketch

**Title:** Flux 2 Lora Gallery
**Description:** Ballpoint pen sketch drawing style
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/flux-2-lora-gallery/ballpoint-pen-sketch`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** stylized, transform

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `BallpointPenSketchInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate a ballpoint pen sketch style image. Use 'b4llp01nt' trigger word for best results.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_4_3"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `2.5` вҖ” The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale. Controls how closely the model follows the prompt.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `40` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 4, max: 50
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” Acceleration level for image generation. 'regular' balances speed and quality.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. Same seed with same prompt will produce same result.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and won't be saved in history.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker for the generated image.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the output image
  Possible values: `png`, `jpeg`, `webp`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`lora_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The strength of the ballpoint pen sketch effect.
  Range: min: 0, max: 2

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `BallpointPenSketchOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generation
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated ballpoint pen sketch style images

## fal-ai/flux-2-pro

**Title:** Flux 2 Pro
**Description:** Image editing with FLUX.2 [pro] from Black Forest Labs. Ideal for high-quality image manipulation, style transfer, and sequential editing workflows
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/flux-2-pro`
**Category:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `Flux2ProTextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_4_3"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed to use for the generation.
- **`safety_tolerance`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"2"` вҖ” The safety tolerance level for the generated image. 1 being the most strict and 5 being the most permissive.
  Possible values: `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Flux2ProOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for the generation.
- **`images`** *(list<ImageFile>)* вҖ” The generated images.

## fal-ai/flux-2/flash

**Title:** Flux 2
**Description:** Text-to-image generation with FLUX.2 [dev] from Black Forest Labs. Enhanced realism, crisper text generation, and native editing capabilitiesвҖ” in a flash.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/flux-2/flash`
**Category:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `Flux2FlashTextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `2.5` вҖ” Guidance Scale is a measure of how close you want the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed to use for the generation. If not provided, a random seed will be used.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_4_3"` вҖ” The size of the image to generate. The width and height must be between 512 and 2048 pixels.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the prompt will be expanded for better results.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Flux2FlashT2IOutput`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`images`** *(list<ImageFile>)* вҖ” The generated images
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`timings`** *(object)*

---

## fal-ai/flux-2/klein/4b/base/lora

**Title:** FLUX.2 [klein] 4B Base LoRA
**Description:** Text-to-image generation with LoRA support for FLUX.2 [klein] 4B Base from Black Forest Labs. Custom style adaptation and fine-tuned model variations.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/flux-2/klein/4b/base/lora`
**Category:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `KleinBaseLoRAInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Negative prompt for classifier-free guidance. Describes what to avoid in the image.
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” Guidance scale for classifier-free guidance.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed to use for the generation. If not provided, a random seed will be used.
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 4, max: 50
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_4_3"` вҖ” The size of the image to generate.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” The acceleration level to use for image generation.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI. Output is not stored when this is True.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`
- **`loras`** *(list<fal-ai_flux-2-klein_LoRAInput>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” List of LoRA weights to apply (maximum 3).

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `KleinT2IOutput`
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`images`** *(list<ImageFile>)* вҖ” The generated images
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.

- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 4, max: 50
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_4_3"` вҖ” The size of the image to generate.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” The acceleration level to use for image generation.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI. Output is not stored when this is True.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`
- **`loras`** *(list<fal-ai_flux-2-klein_LoRAInput>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” List of LoRA weights to apply (maximum 3).

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `KleinT2IOutput`
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`images`** *(list<ImageFile>)* вҖ” The generated images
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.

## fal-ai/flux-2/lora

**Title:** Flux 2
**Description:** Text-to-image generation with LoRA support for FLUX.2 [dev] from Black Forest Labs. Custom style adaptation and fine-tuned model variations.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/flux-2/lora`
**Category:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `Flux2TextToImageLoRAInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `2.5` вҖ” Guidance Scale is a measure of how close you want the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed to use for the generation. If not provided, a random seed will be used.
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 4, max: 50
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_4_3"` вҖ” The size of the image to generate. The width and height must be between 512 and 2048 pixels.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” The acceleration level to use for the image generation.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the prompt will be expanded for better results.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`
- **`loras`** *(list<LoRAInput>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” List of LoRA weights to apply (maximum 3). Each LoRA can be a URL, HuggingFace repo ID, or local path.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Flux2T2ILoRAOutput`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`images`** *(list<ImageFile>)* вҖ” The generated images
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`timings`** *(object)*

## fal-ai/flux-control-lora-canny

**Title:** FLUX.1 [dev] Control LoRA Canny
**Description:** FLUX Control LoRA Canny is a high-performance endpoint that uses a control image to transfer structure to the generated image, using a Canny edge map.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/flux-control-lora-canny`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** lora, style transfer

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `DepthLoraInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `control_lora_image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of image to use for image-to-image generation.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_4_3"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`loras`** *(list<LoraWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” 
            The LoRAs to use for the image generation. You can use any number of LoRAs
            and they will be merged together to generate the final image.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3.5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 35
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`control_lora_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” 
            The image to use for control lora. This is used to control the style of the generated image.
        
- **`control_lora_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The strength of the control lora.
  Range: min: 0, max: 2
- **`preprocess_depth`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” 
            If set to true, the input image will be preprocessed to extract depth information.
            This is useful for generating depth maps from images.
        

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`timings`** *(object)*

---

- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.

  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`control_lora_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” 
            The image to use for control lora. This is used to control the style of the generated image.
        
- **`control_lora_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The strength of the control lora.

## fal-ai/flux-general

**Title:** FLUX.1 [dev] with Controlnets and Loras
**Description:** A versatile endpoint for the FLUX.1 [dev] model that supports multiple AI extensions including LoRA, ControlNet conditioning, and IP-Adapter integration, enabling comprehensive control over image generation through various guidance methods.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/flux-general`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** lora, controlnet, ip-adapter

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`loras`** *(list<LoraWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” 
            The LoRAs to use for the image generation. You can use any number of LoRAs
            and they will be merged together to generate the final image.
        
- **`control_loras`** *(list<ControlLoraWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” 
            The LoRAs to use for the image generation which use a control image. You can use any number of LoRAs
            and they will be merged together to generate the final image.
        
- **`controlnets`** *(list<ControlNet>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” 
            The controlnets to use for the image generation. Only one controlnet is supported at the moment.
        
- **`controlnet_unions`** *(list<ControlNetUnion>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” 
            The controlnet unions to use for the image generation. Only one controlnet is supported at the moment.
        
- **`ip_adapters`** *(list<IPAdapter>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” 
        IP-Adapter to use for image generation.
        
- **`easycontrols`** *(list<EasyControlWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” 
        EasyControl Inputs to use for image generation.
        
- **`fill_image`** *(?)* вҖ” Use an image input to influence the generation. Can be used to fill images in masked areas.
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3.5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`real_cfg_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3.5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 5
- **`use_real_cfg`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” 
            Uses classical CFG as in SD1.5, SDXL, etc. Increases generation times and price when set to be true.
            If using XLabs IP-Adapter v1, this will be turned on!.
        
- **`use_cfg_zero`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” 
            Uses CFG-zero init sampling as in https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.18886.
        
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate. This is always set to 1 for streaming output.
  Range: min: 1, max: 10
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`reference_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of Image for Reference-Only
- **`reference_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.65` вҖ” Strength of reference_only generation. Only used if a reference image is provided.
  Range: min: -3, max: 3
- **`reference_start`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” 
            The percentage of the total timesteps when the reference guidance is to bestarted.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`reference_end`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” 
            The percentage of the total timesteps when the reference guidance is to be ended.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`base_shift`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” Base shift for the scheduled timesteps
  Range: min: 0.01, max: 5
- **`max_shift`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1.15` вҖ” Max shift for the scheduled timesteps
  Range: min: 0.01, max: 5
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`use_beta_schedule`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Specifies whether beta sigmas ought to be used.
- **`sigma_schedule`** *(string)* вҖ” Sigmas schedule for the denoising process.
- **`scheduler`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"euler"` вҖ” Scheduler for the denoising process.
  Possible values: `euler`, `dpmpp_2m`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            Negative prompt to steer the image generation away from unwanted features.
            By default, we will be using NAG for processing the negative prompt.
        
- **`nag_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3` вҖ” 
            The scale for NAG. Higher values will result in a image that is more distant
            to the negative prompt.
        
  Range: max: 10
- **`nag_tau`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `2.5` вҖ” 
            The tau for NAG. Controls the normalization of the hidden state.
            Higher values will result in a less aggressive normalization,
            but may also lead to unexpected changes with respect to the original image.
            Not recommended to change this value.
        
- **`nag_alpha`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.25` вҖ” 
            The alpha value for NAG. This value is used as a final weighting
            factor for steering the normalized guidance (positive and negative prompts)
            in the direction of the positive prompt. Higher values will result in less
            steering on the normalized guidance where lower values will result in
            considering the positive prompt guidance more.
        
  Range: max: 1
- **`nag_end`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.25` вҖ” 
            The proportion of steps to apply NAG. After the specified proportion
            of steps has been iterated, the remaining steps will use original
            attention processors in FLUX.
        
  Range: max: 1

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.

---

## fal-ai/flux-kontext-lora/text-to-image

**Title:** Flux Kontext Lora
**Description:** Super fast text-to-image endpoint for the FLUX.1 Kontext [dev] model with LoRA support, enabling rapid and high-quality image generation using pre-trained LoRA adaptations for personalization, specific styles, brand identities, and product-specific outputs.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/flux-kontext-lora/text-to-image`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `BaseKontextInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate the image with
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_4_3"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 10, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `2.5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`loras`** *(list<LoraWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” 
            The LoRAs to use for the image generation. You can use any number of LoRAs
            and they will be merged together to generate the final image.
        
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” The speed of the generation. The higher the speed, the faster the generation.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `KontextT2IOutput`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.

## fal-ai/flux-krea-lora

**Title:** FLUX.1 Krea [dev] with LoRAs
**Description:** Super fast endpoint for the FLUX.1 [dev] model with LoRA support, enabling rapid and high-quality image generation using pre-trained LoRA adaptations for personalization, specific styles, brand identities, and product-specific outputs.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/flux-krea-lora`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** lora, personalization

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_4_3"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`loras`** *(list<LoraWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” 
            The LoRAs to use for the image generation. You can use any number of LoRAs
            and they will be merged together to generate the final image.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3.5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 35
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate. This is always set to 1 for streaming output.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” Acceleration level for image generation. 'regular' balances speed and quality.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `InpaintInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`, `mask_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`loras`** *(list<LoraWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” 
            The LoRAs to use for the image generation. You can use any number of LoRAs
            and they will be merged together to generate the final image.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3.5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 35
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.

  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” Acceleration level for image generation. 'regular' balances speed and quality.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of image to use for inpainting. or img2img
- **`strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.85` вҖ” The strength to use for inpainting/image-to-image. Only used if the image_url is provided. 1.0 is completely remakes the image while 0.0 preserves the original.
  Range: min: 0.01, max: 1
- **`mask_url`** *(string)* вҖ” 
            The mask to area to Inpaint in.

## fal-ai/flux-pro/v1.1-ultra-finetuned

**Title:** FLUX1.1 [pro] ultra Fine-tuned
**Description:** FLUX1.1 [pro] ultra fine-tuned is the newest version of FLUX1.1 [pro] with a fine-tuned LoRA, maintaining professional-grade image quality while delivering up to 2K resolution with improved photo realism.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/flux-pro/v1.1-ultra-finetuned`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** high-res, realism

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `FluxProUltraTextToImageFinetunedInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `finetune_id`, `finetune_strength`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`safety_tolerance`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"2"` вҖ” The safety tolerance level for the generated image. 1 being the most strict and 5 being the most permissive.
  Possible values: `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`, `6`
- **`enhance_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to enhance the prompt for better results.
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The image URL to generate an image from.
- **`image_prompt_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.1` вҖ” The strength of the image prompt, between 0 and 1.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(string | string)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated image.
  Possible values: `21:9`, `16:9`, `4:3`, `3:2`, `1:1`, `2:3`, `3:4`, `9:16`, `9:21`
- **`raw`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Generate less processed, more natural-looking images.
- **`finetune_id`** *(string)* вҖ” References your specific model
- **`finetune_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” 
        Controls finetune influence.
        Increase this value if your target concept isn't showing up strongly enough.
        The optimal setting depends on your finetune and prompt
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 2

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`images`** *(list<registry__image__fast_sdxl__models__Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.

## fal-ai/flux-subject

**Title:** FLUX.1 Subject
**Description:** Super fast endpoint for the FLUX.1 [schnell] model with subject input capabilities, enabling rapid and high-quality image generation for personalization, specific styles, brand identities, and product-specific outputs.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/flux-subject`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** personalization, customization

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `FluxSubjectInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of image of the subject
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `8` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3.5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” 
            If set to true, the function will wait for the image to be generated and uploaded
            before returning the response. This will increase the latency of the function but
            it allows you to get the image directly in the response without going through the CDN.
        
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `BaseInput`

- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_4_3"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.

        The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want

- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.

## fal-ai/fooocus

**Title:** Fooocus
**Description:** Default parameters with automated optimizations and quality improvements.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/fooocus`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** stylized

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `FooocusLegacyInput`
**Required fields:** _none_

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use. Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`styles`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” Default: `["Fooocus Sharp","Fooocus Enhance","Fooocus V2"]` вҖ” 
            The style to use.
        
- **`performance`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"Extreme Speed"` вҖ” 
            You can choose Speed or Quality
        
  Possible values: `Speed`, `Quality`, `Extreme Speed`, `Lightning`
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 1, max: 30
- **`sharpness`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `2` вҖ” 
            The sharpness of the generated image. Use it to control how sharp the generated
            image should be. Higher value means image and texture are sharper.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 30
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"1024x1024"` вҖ” 
            The size of the generated image. You can choose between some presets or
            custom height and width that **must be multiples of 8**.
        
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” 
            Number of images to generate in one request
        
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`loras`** *(list<LoraWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[{"scale":0.1,"path":"https://huggingface.co/stabilityai/stable-diffusion-xl-base-1.0/resolve/main/sd_xl_offset_example-lora_1.0.safetensors"}]` вҖ” 
            The LoRAs to use for the image generation. You can use up to 5 LoRAs
            and they will be merged together to generate the final image.
        
- **`refiner_model`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"None"` вҖ” Refiner (SDXL or SD 1.5)
  Possible values: `None`, `realisticVisionV60B1_v51VAE.safetensors`
- **`refiner_switch`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.8` вҖ” 
            Use 0.4 for SD1.5 realistic models; 0.667 for SD1.5 anime models
            0.8 for XL-refiners; or any value for switching two SDXL models.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `png`, `jpeg`, `webp`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`control_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The image to use as a reference for the generated image.
- **`control_type`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"PyraCanny"` вҖ” The type of image control
  Possible values: `ImagePrompt`, `PyraCanny`, `CPDS`, `FaceSwap`
- **`control_image_weight`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” 
            The strength of the control image. Use it to control how much the generated image
            should look like the control image.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 2
- **`control_image_stop_at`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” 
            The stop at value of the control image. Use it to control how much the generated image
            should look like the control image.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`inpaint_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The image to use as a reference for inpainting.
- **`mask_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The image to use as a mask for the generated image.
- **`mixing_image_prompt_and_inpaint`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false`
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to false, the safety checker will be disabled.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `FooocusOutput`
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`timings`** *(object)* вҖ” The time taken for the generation process.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image file info.

---

            The LoRAs to use for the image generation. You can use up to 5 LoRAs
            and they will be merged together to generate the final image.
        
- **`refiner_model`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"None"` вҖ” Refiner (SDXL or SD 1.5)
  Possible values: `None`, `realisticVisionV60B1_v51VAE.safetensors`
- **`refiner_switch`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.8` вҖ” 
            Use 0.4 for SD1.5 realistic models; 0.667 for SD1.5 anime models
            0.8 for XL-refiners; or any value for switching two SDXL models.

  Possible values: `png`, `jpeg`, `webp`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`image_prompt_1`** *()*
- **`image_prompt_2`** *()*
- **`image_prompt_3`** *()*
- **`image_prompt_4`** *()*
- **`inpaint_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The image to use as a reference for inpainting.
- **`mask_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The image to use as a mask for the generated image.
- **`inpaint_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"Inpaint or Outpaint (default)"` вҖ” The mode to use for inpainting.
  Possible values: `Inpaint or Outpaint (default)`, `Improve Detail (face, hand, eyes, etc.)`, `Modify Content (add objects, change background, etc.)`
- **`inpaint_additional_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Describe what you want to inpaint.
- **`outpaint_selections`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” The directions to outpaint.
- **`mixing_image_prompt_and_inpaint`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Mixing Image Prompt and Inpaint
- **`uov_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The image to upscale or vary.
- **`uov_method`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"Disabled"` вҖ” The method to use for upscaling or varying.
  Possible values: `Disabled`, `Vary (Subtle)`, `Vary (Strong)`, `Upscale (1.5x)`, `Upscale (2x)`, `Upscale (Fast 2x)`
- **`mixing_image_prompt_and_vary_upscale`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Mixing Image Prompt and Vary/Upscale
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to false, the safety checker will be disabled.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `FooocusOutput`
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`timings`** *(object)* вҖ” The time taken for the generation process.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image file info.

---

## fal-ai/fooocus/inpaint

**Title:** Fooocus Inpainting
**Description:** Default parameters with automated optimizations and quality improvements.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/fooocus/inpaint`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** stylized, editing

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `FooocusInpaintInput`
**Required fields:** `inpaint_image_url`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use. Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`styles`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” Default: `["Fooocus Sharp","Fooocus Enhance","Fooocus V2"]` вҖ” 
            The style to use.
        
- **`performance`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"Extreme Speed"` вҖ” 
            You can choose Speed or Quality
        
  Possible values: `Speed`, `Quality`, `Extreme Speed`, `Lightning`
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 1, max: 30
- **`sharpness`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `2` вҖ” 
            The sharpness of the generated image. Use it to control how sharp the generated
            image should be. Higher value means image and texture are sharper.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 30
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"1024x1024"` вҖ” 
            The size of the generated image. You can choose between some presets or
            custom height and width that **must be multiples of 8**.
        
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” 
            Number of images to generate in one request
        
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`loras`** *(list<LoraWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[{"scale":0.1,"path":"https://huggingface.co/stabilityai/stable-diffusion-xl-base-1.0/resolve/main/sd_xl_offset_example-lora_1.0.safetensors"}]` вҖ” 
            The LoRAs to use for the image generation. You can use up to 5 LoRAs
            and they will be merged together to generate the final image.
        
- **`refiner_model`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"None"` вҖ” Refiner (SDXL or SD 1.5)
  Possible values: `None`, `realisticVisionV60B1_v51VAE.safetensors`
- **`refiner_switch`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.8` вҖ” 
            Use 0.4 for SD1.5 realistic models; 0.667 for SD1.5 anime models
            0.8 for XL-refiners; or any value for switching two SDXL models.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `png`, `jpeg`, `webp`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`inpaint_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The image to use as a reference for inpainting.
- **`mask_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” The image to use as a mask for the generated image.
- **`inpaint_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"Inpaint or Outpaint (default)"` вҖ” The mode to use for inpainting.
  Possible values: `Inpaint or Outpaint (default)`, `Improve Detail (face, hand, eyes, etc.)`, `Modify Content (add objects, change background, etc.)`
- **`inpaint_additional_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Describe what you want to inpaint.
- **`outpaint_selections`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” The directions to outpaint.
- **`override_inpaint_options`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” 
            If set to true, the advanced inpaint options ('inpaint_disable_initial_latent',
            'inpaint_engine', 'inpaint_strength', 'inpaint_respective_field',
            'inpaint_erode_or_dilate') will be overridden.
            Otherwise, the default values will be used.
        
- **`inpaint_disable_initial_latent`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the initial preprocessing will be disabled.
- **`inpaint_engine`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"v2.6"` вҖ” Version of Fooocus inpaint model
  Possible values: `None`, `v1`, `v2.5`, `v2.6`
- **`inpaint_strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” 
            Same as the denoising strength in A1111 inpaint. Only used in inpaint, not
            used in outpaint. (Outpaint always use 1.0)
        
  Range: max: 1
- **`inpaint_respective_field`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.618` вҖ” 
            The area to inpaint. Value 0 is same as "Only Masked" in A1111. Value 1 is
            same as "Whole Image" in A1111. Only used in inpaint, not used in outpaint.
            (Outpaint always use 1.0)
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`inpaint_erode_or_dilate`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” 
            Positive value will make white area in the mask larger, negative value will
            make white area smaller. (default is 0, always process before any mask
            invert)
        
  Range: min: -64, max: 64
- **`invert_mask`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the mask will be inverted.
- **`image_prompt_1`** *()*
- **`image_prompt_2`** *()*
- **`image_prompt_3`** *()*
- **`image_prompt_4`** *()*
- **`mixing_image_prompt_and_inpaint`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Mixing Image Prompt and Inpaint
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to false, the safety checker will be disabled.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `FooocusOutput`
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`timings`** *(object)* вҖ” The time taken for the generation process.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image file info.

---

## fal-ai/glm-image

**Title:** Glm Image
**Description:** Create high-quality images with accurate text rendering and rich knowledge detailsвҖ”supports editing, style transfer, and maintaining consistent characters across multiple images.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/glm-image`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `GlmImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Text prompt for image generation.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” Output image size.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`, `portrait_3_2`, `landscape_3_2`, `portrait_hd`, `landscape_hd`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” Number of diffusion denoising steps. More steps generally produce higher quality images.
  Range: min: 10, max: 100
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1.5` вҖ” Classifier-free guidance scale. Higher values make the model follow the prompt more closely.
  Range: min: 1, max: 10
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. The same seed with the same prompt will produce the same image.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Enable NSFW safety checking on the generated images.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” Output image format.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If True, the image will be returned as a base64 data URI instead of a URL.
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If True, the prompt will be enhanced using an LLM for more detailed and higher quality results.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `GlmImageOutput`
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” List of URLs to the generated images.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.

---

  Possible values: `auto`, `1024x1024`, `1536x1024`, `1024x1536`
- **`background`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” Background for the generated image
  Possible values: `auto`, `transparent`, `opaque`
- **`quality`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” Quality for the generated image
  Possible values: `auto`, `low`, `medium`, `high`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” Output format for the images
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `DevInput`

            The negative prompt to use. Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `{"width":1024,"height":1024}` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
