**Category:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use. Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `{"width":1024,"height":1024}` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `50` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`loras`** *(array)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” A list of LoRAs to apply to the model. Each LoRA specifies its path, scale, and optional weight name.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.

---

## fal-ai/hunyuan-image/v2.1/text-to-image

**Title:** Hunyuan Image
**Description:** Use the amazing capabilities of hunyuan image 2.1 to generate images that express the feelings of your text.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/hunyuan-image/v2.1/text-to-image`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `HunyuanTextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt to generate an image from.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” The negative prompt to guide the image generation away from certain concepts.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” The desired size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” Number of denoising steps.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3.5` вҖ” Controls how much the model adheres to the prompt. Higher values mean stricter adherence.
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducible results. If None, a random seed is used.
- **`use_reprompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Enable prompt enhancement for potentially better results.
- **`use_refiner`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable the refiner model for improved image quality.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `HunyuanTextToImageOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The base seed used for the generation process.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” A list of the generated images.

- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” The desired size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” Number of denoising steps.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `7.5` вҖ” Controls how much the model adheres to the prompt. Higher values mean stricter adherence.

## fal-ai/ideogram/v3

**Title:** Ideogram Text to Image
**Description:** Generate high-quality images, posters, and logos with Ideogram V3. Features exceptional typography handling and realistic outputs optimized for commercial and creative use.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ideogram/v3`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** realism, typography

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `BaseTextToImageInputV3`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`image_urls`** *(array)* вҖ” A set of images to use as style references (maximum total size 10MB across all style references). The images should be in JPEG, PNG or WebP format
- **`rendering_speed`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"BALANCED"` вҖ” The rendering speed to use.
  Possible values: `TURBO`, `BALANCED`, `QUALITY`
- **`color_palette`** *(?)* вҖ” A color palette for generation, must EITHER be specified via one of the presets (name) or explicitly via hexadecimal representations of the color with optional weights (members)
- **`style_codes`** *(array)* вҖ” A list of 8 character hexadecimal codes representing the style of the image. Cannot be used in conjunction with style_reference_images or style
- **`style`** *(string)* вҖ” The style type to generate with. Cannot be used with style_codes.
  Possible values: `AUTO`, `GENERAL`, `REALISTIC`, `DESIGN`
- **`expand_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Determine if MagicPrompt should be used in generating the request or not.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Seed for the random number generator
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`style_preset`** *(string)* вҖ” Style preset for generation. The chosen style preset will guide the generation.
  Possible values: `80S_ILLUSTRATION`, `90S_NOSTALGIA`, `ABSTRACT_ORGANIC`, `ANALOG_NOSTALGIA`, `ART_BRUT`, `ART_DECO`, `ART_POSTER`, `AURA`, `AVANT_GARDE`, `BAUHAUS`, `BLUEPRINT`, `BLURRY_MOTION`, `BRIGHT_ART`, `C4D_CARTOON`, `CHILDRENS_BOOK`, `COLLAGE`, `COLORING_BOOK_I`, `COLORING_BOOK_II`, `CUBISM`, `DARK_AURA`, `DOODLE`, `DOUBLE_EXPOSURE`, `DRAMATIC_CINEMA`, `EDITORIAL`, `EMOTIONAL_MINIMAL`, `ETHEREAL_PARTY`, `EXPIRED_FILM`, `FLAT_ART`, `FLAT_VECTOR`, `FOREST_REVERIE`, `GEO_MINIMALIST`, `GLASS_PRISM`, `GOLDEN_HOUR`, `GRAFFITI_I`, `GRAFFITI_II`, `HALFTONE_PRINT`, `HIGH_CONTRAST`, `HIPPIE_ERA`, `ICONIC`, `JAPANDI_FUSION`, `JAZZY`, `LONG_EXPOSURE`, `MAGAZINE_EDITORIAL`, `MINIMAL_ILLUSTRATION`, `MIXED_MEDIA`, `MONOCHROME`, `NIGHTLIFE`, `OIL_PAINTING`, `OLD_CARTOONS`, `PAINT_GESTURE`, `POP_ART`, `RETRO_ETCHING`, `RIVIERA_POP`, `SPOTLIGHT_80S`, `STYLIZED_RED`, `SURREAL_COLLAGE`, `TRAVEL_POSTER`, `VINTAGE_GEO`, `VINTAGE_POSTER`, `WATERCOLOR`, `WEIRD`, `WOODBLOCK_PRINT`
- **`prompt`** *(string)*
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated image
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Description of what to exclude from an image. Descriptions in the prompt take precedence to descriptions in the negative prompt.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `OutputV3`
- **`images`** *(list<File>)*
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Seed used for the random number generator

---

## fal-ai/ideogram/v3/generate-transparent

  Possible values: `1:3`, `3:1`, `1:2`, `2:1`, `9:16`, `16:9`, `10:16`, `16:10`, `2:3`, `3:2`, `3:4`, `4:3`, `4:5`, `5:4`, `1:1`
- **`rendering_speed`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"BALANCED"` вҖ” The rendering speed to use.
  Possible values: `FLASH`, `TURBO`, `BALANCED`, `QUALITY`
- **`expand_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Determine if MagicPrompt should be used in generating the request or not.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Description of what to exclude from an image. Descriptions in the prompt take precedence to descriptions in the negative prompt.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Seed for the random number generator

## fal-ai/illusion-diffusion

**Title:** Illusion Diffusion
**Description:** Create illusions conditioned on image.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/illusion-diffusion`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** composition, stylized

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `IllusionDiffusionInput`
**Required fields:** `image_url`, `prompt`

- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” Input image url.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use. Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `7.5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: max: 50
- **`controlnet_conditioning_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The scale of the ControlNet.
- **`control_guidance_start`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0`
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`control_guidance_end`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1`
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`scheduler`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"Euler"` вҖ” Scheduler / sampler to use for the image denoising process.
  Possible values: `DPM++ Karras SDE`, `Euler`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `40` вҖ” 
            Increasing the amount of steps tells Stable Diffusion that it should take more steps
            to generate your final result which can increase the amount of detail in your image.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 80
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” 
            The size of the generated image. You can choose between some presets or
            custom height and width that **must be multiples of 8**.
        
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `IllusionDiffusionOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`image`** *()* вҖ” The generated image file info.

---

## fal-ai/imagen4/preview

**Title:** Imagen 4
**Description:** GoogleвҖҷs highest quality image generation model
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/imagen4/preview`
**Category:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `Imagen4TextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt to generate an image from.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator.
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1:1"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated image.
  Possible values: `1:1`, `16:9`, `9:16`, `4:3`, `3:4`
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`
- **`safety_tolerance`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"4"` вҖ” The safety tolerance level for content moderation. 1 is the most strict (blocks most content), 6 is the least strict.
  Possible values: `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`, `6`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1K"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated image.
  Possible values: `1K`, `2K`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Imagen4TextToImageOutput`
- **`images`** *(list<ImageFile>)* вҖ” The generated images.
- **`description`** *(string)* вҖ” The description of the generated images.

## fal-ai/imagen4/preview/fast

**Title:** Imagen 4
**Description:** GoogleвҖҷs highest quality image generation model
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/imagen4/preview/fast`
**Category:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `Imagen4TextToImageFastInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt to generate an image from.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator.
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1:1"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated image.
  Possible values: `1:1`, `16:9`, `9:16`, `4:3`, `3:4`
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`
- **`safety_tolerance`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"4"` вҖ” The safety tolerance level for content moderation. 1 is the most strict (blocks most content), 6 is the least strict.
  Possible values: `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`, `6`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Imagen4TextToImageFastOutput`
- **`images`** *(list<ImageFile>)* вҖ” The generated images.
- **`description`** *(string)* вҖ” The description of the generated images.

## fal-ai/janus

**Title:** DeepSeek Janus-Pro
**Description:** DeepSeek Janus-Pro is a novel text-to-image model that unifies multimodal understanding and generation through an autoregressive framework
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/janus`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** stylized

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `JanusInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`temperature`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Controls randomness in the generation. Higher values make output more random.
  Range: min: 0.1, max: 2
- **`cfg_weight`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” Classifier Free Guidance scale - how closely to follow the prompt.
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate in parallel.
  Range: min: 1, max: 16
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducible generation.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.

## fal-ai/kling-image/o3/text-to-image

**Title:** Kling Image
**Description:** Kling Omni 3: Top-tier text-to-image with flawless consistency.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/kling-image/o3/text-to-image`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `O3TextToImageRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Text prompt for image generation. Max 2500 characters.
- **`elements`** *(array)* вҖ” Optional: Elements (characters/objects) for face control. Reference in prompt as @Element1, @Element2, etc.
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1K"` вҖ” Image generation resolution. 1K: standard, 2K: high-res, 4K: ultra high-res.
  Possible values: `1K`, `2K`, `4K`
- **`result_type`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"single"` вҖ” Result type. 'single' for one image, 'series' for a series of related images.
  Possible values: `single`, `series`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate (1-9). Only used when result_type is 'single'.
  Range: min: 1, max: 9
- **`series_amount`** *(integer)* вҖ” Number of images in series (2-9). Only used when result_type is 'series'.
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” Aspect ratio of generated images.
  Possible values: `16:9`, `9:16`, `1:1`, `4:3`, `3:4`, `3:2`, `2:3`, `21:9`
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `T2IO3ImageOutput`
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” Generated images

---

## fal-ai/kling-image/v3/text-to-image

**Title:** Kling Image
**Description:** Kling V3: Latest Kling Image model
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/kling-image/v3/text-to-image`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `V3TextToImageRequest`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Text prompt for image generation. Max 2500 characters.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Negative text prompt. It is recommended to supplement negative prompt information through negative sentences directly within positive prompts.
- **`elements`** *(array)* вҖ” Optional: Elements (characters/objects) to include in the image for face control. Each element can have a frontal image and optionally reference images.
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1K"` вҖ” Image generation resolution. 1K: standard, 2K: high-res.
  Possible values: `1K`, `2K`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of images to generate (1-9).
  Range: min: 1, max: 9
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” Aspect ratio of generated images.
  Possible values: `16:9`, `9:16`, `1:1`, `4:3`, `3:4`, `3:2`, `2:3`, `21:9`
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `T2IV3ImageOutput`
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” Generated images

## fal-ai/kolors

**Title:** Kolors
**Description:** Photorealistic Text-to-Image
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/kolors`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** realism, diffusion

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `KolorsInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” 
            The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible
            for best results.
        
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use. Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small
            details (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show
            you.
        
  Range: min: 1, max: 10
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `50` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 150
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Seed
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” 
            If set to true, the function will wait for the image to be generated and
            uploaded before returning the response. This will increase the latency of
            the function but it allows you to get the image directly in the response
            without going through the CDN.
        
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Enable safety checker.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`scheduler`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"EulerDiscreteScheduler"` вҖ” The scheduler to use for the model.
  Possible values: `EulerDiscreteScheduler`, `EulerAncestralDiscreteScheduler`, `DPMSolverMultistepScheduler`, `DPMSolverMultistepScheduler_SDE_karras`, `UniPCMultistepScheduler`, `DEISMultistepScheduler`
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        

---

## fal-ai/layer-diffusion

**Title:** Layer Diffusion XL
**Description:** SDXL with an alpha channel.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/layer-diffusion`
**Category:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `Input`
**Required fields:** _none_

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"text, watermark"` вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the negative image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `8` вҖ” The guidance scale for the model.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `20` вҖ” The number of inference steps for the model.
  Range: min: 10, max: 40
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to false, the safety checker will be disabled.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`image`** *()* вҖ” The URL of the generated image.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used to generate the image.

## fal-ai/lcm

**Title:** Latent Consistency (SDXL & SDv1.5)
**Description:** Produce high-quality images with minimal inference steps.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/lcm`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** diffusion, lcm, real-time

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `LCMInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`model`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"sdv1-5"` вҖ” The model to use for generating the image.
  Possible values: `sdxl`, `sdv1-5`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” 
        The base image to use for guiding the image generation on image-to-image
        generations. If the either width or height of the image is larger than 1024
        pixels, the image will be resized to 1024 pixels while keeping the aspect ratio.
        
- **`mask_url`** *(string)* вҖ” 
        The mask to use for guiding the image generation on image
        inpainting. The model will focus on the mask area and try to fill it with
        the most relevant content.

        The mask must be a black and white image where the white area is the area
        that needs to be filled and the black area is the area that should be
        ignored.

        The mask must have the same dimensions as the image passed as `image_url`.
        
- **`strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.8` вҖ” 
        The strength of the image that is passed as `image_url`. The strength
        determines how much the generated image will be similar to the image passed as
        `image_url`. The higher the strength the more model gets "creative" and
        generates an image that's different from the initial image. A strength of 1.0
        means that the initial image is more or less ignored and the model will try to
        generate an image that's as close as possible to the prompt.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use.Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 8
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” 
            The number of inference steps to use for generating the image. The more steps
            the better the image will be but it will also take longer to generate.
        
  Range: min: 1, max: 12
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” 
            The size of the generated image. You can choose between some presets or
            custom height and width that **must be multiples of 8**.

            If not provided:
            - For text-to-image generations, the default size is 512x512.
            - For image-to-image generations, the default size is the same as the input image.
            - For inpainting generations, the default size is the same as the input image.
        
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” 
            If set to true, the function will wait for the image to be generated and uploaded
            before returning the response. This will increase the latency of the function but
            it allows you to get the image directly in the response without going through the CDN.
        
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” 
            The number of images to generate. The function will return a list of images
            with the same prompt and negative prompt but different seeds.
        
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`enable_safety_checks`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” 
            If set to true, the resulting image will be checked whether it includes any
            potentially unsafe content. If it does, it will be replaced with a black
            image.
        
- **`request_id`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            An id bound to a request, can be used with response to identify the request
            itself.
        
- **`inpaint_mask_only`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” 
            If set to true, the inpainting pipeline will only inpaint the provided mask
            area. Only effective for inpainting pipelines.
        
- **`controlnet_inpaint`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” 
            If set to true, the inpainting pipeline will use controlnet inpainting.
            Only effective for inpainting pipelines.
        
- **`lora_url`** *(string)* вҖ” 
            The url of the lora server to use for image generation.
        
- **`lora_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” 
            The scale of the lora server to use for image generation.
        

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `LCMOutput`
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`request_id`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            An id bound to a request, can be used with response to identify the request
            itself.
        
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” 
            Number of inference steps used to generate the image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the default one in case none was passed.
        
- **`nsfw_content_detected`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” 
            A list of booleans indicating whether the generated image contains any
            potentially unsafe content. If the safety check is disabled, this field
            will all will be false.
        

---

## fal-ai/lightning-models

**Title:** Lightning Models
**Description:** Collection of SDXL Lightning models.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/lightning-models`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** diffusion, lightning

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `LightningModelsTextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`model_name`** *(string)* вҖ” The Lightning model to use.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"(worst quality, low quality, normal quality, lowres, low details, oversaturated, undersaturated, overexposed, underexposed, grayscale, bw, bad photo, bad photography, bad art:1.4), (watermark, signature, text font, username, error, logo, words, letters, digits, autograph, trademark, name:1.2), (blur, blurry, grainy), morbid, ugly, asymmetrical, mutated malformed, mutilated, poorly lit, bad shadow, draft, cropped, out of frame, cut off, censored, jpeg artifacts, out of focus, glitch, duplicate, (airbrushed, cartoon, anime, semi-realistic, cgi, render, blender, digital art, manga, amateur:1.3), (3D ,3D Game, 3D Game Scene, 3D Character:1.1), (bad hands, bad anatomy, bad body, bad face, bad teeth, bad arms, bad legs, deformities:1.3)"` вҖ” The negative prompt to use. Use it to address details that you don't want in the image.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `{"height":1024,"width":1024}`
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 12
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `2` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 2
- **`loras`** *(list<LoraWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” The list of LoRA weights to use.
- **`embeddings`** *(list<Embedding>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” The list of embeddings to use.
- **`scheduler`** *(enum)* вҖ” Scheduler / sampler to use for the image denoising process.
  Possible values: `DPM++ 2M`, `DPM++ 2M Karras`, `DPM++ 2M SDE`, `DPM++ 2M SDE Karras`, `DPM++ SDE`, `DPM++ SDE Karras`, `KDPM 2A`, `Euler`, `Euler (trailing timesteps)`, `Euler A`, `LCM`, `EDMDPMSolverMultistepScheduler`, `TCDScheduler`
- **`expand_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the prompt will be expanded with additional prompts.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” 
            If set to true, the function will wait for the image to be generated and uploaded
            before returning the response. This will increase the latency of the function but
            it allows you to get the image directly in the response without going through the CDN.
        
- **`format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`safety_checker_version`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"v1"` вҖ” The version of the safety checker to use. v1 is the default CompVis safety checker. v2 uses a custom ViT model.
  Possible values: `v1`, `v2`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.

## fal-ai/longcat-image

**Title:** Longcat Image
**Description:** LongCat image is a 6B parameter model excelling at multilingual text rendering, photorealism and deployment efficiency.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/longcat-image`
**Category:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_4_3"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `4.5` вҖ” The guidance scale to use for the image generation.
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” The acceleration level to use.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `TextToImageOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.

---

## fal-ai/lora

**Title:** Stable Diffusion with LoRAs
**Description:** Run Any Stable Diffusion model with customizable LoRA weights.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/lora`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** diffusion, lora, customization

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `model_name`, `prompt`

- **`model_name`** *(string)* вҖ” URL or HuggingFace ID of the base model to generate the image.
- **`unet_name`** *(string)* вҖ” URL or HuggingFace ID of the custom U-Net model to use for the image generation.
- **`variant`** *(string)* вҖ” The variant of the model to use for huggingface models, e.g. 'fp16'.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use.Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`prompt_weighting`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” 
            If set to true, the prompt weighting syntax will be used.
            Additionally, this will lift the 77 token limit by averaging embeddings.
        
- **`loras`** *(list<LoraWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” 
            The LoRAs to use for the image generation. You can use any number of LoRAs
            and they will be merged together to generate the final image.
        
- **`embeddings`** *(list<Embedding>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” 
            The embeddings to use for the image generation. Only a single embedding is supported at the moment.
            The embeddings will be used to map the tokens in the prompt to the embedding weights.
        
- **`controlnets`** *(list<ControlNet>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” 
            The control nets to use for the image generation. You can use any number of control nets
            and they will be applied to the image at the specified timesteps.
        
- **`controlnet_guess_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” 
            If set to true, the controlnet will be applied to only the conditional predictions.
        
- **`ip_adapter`** *(list<IPAdapter>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” 
            The IP adapter to use for the image generation.
        
- **`image_encoder_path`** *(string)* вҖ” 
            The path to the image encoder model to use for the image generation.
        
- **`image_encoder_subfolder`** *(string)* вҖ” 
            The subfolder of the image encoder model to use for the image generation.
        
- **`image_encoder_weight_name`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"pytorch_model.bin"` вҖ” 
            The weight name of the image encoder model to use for the image generation.
        
- **`ic_light_model_url`** *(string)* вҖ” 
            The URL of the IC Light model to use for the image generation.
        
- **`ic_light_model_background_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” 
            The URL of the IC Light model background image to use for the image generation.
            Make sure to use a background compatible with the model.
        
- **`ic_light_image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” 
            The URL of the IC Light model image to use for the image generation.
        
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” 
            The size of the generated image. You can choose between some presets or custom height and width
            that **must be multiples of 8**.
        
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” 
            Increasing the amount of steps tells Stable Diffusion that it should take more steps
            to generate your final result which can increase the amount of detail in your image.
        
  Range: min: 1, max: 150
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `7.5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`clip_skip`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” 
            Skips part of the image generation process, leading to slightly different results.
            This means the image renders faster, too.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 2
- **`scheduler`** *(string)* вҖ” Scheduler / sampler to use for the image denoising process.
  Possible values: `DPM++ 2M`, `DPM++ 2M Karras`, `DPM++ 2M SDE`, `DPM++ 2M SDE Karras`, `Euler`, `Euler A`, `Euler (trailing timesteps)`, `LCM`, `LCM (trailing timesteps)`, `DDIM`, `TCD`
- **`timesteps`** *()* вҖ” Default: `{"array":[],"method":"default"}` вҖ” 
            Optionally override the timesteps to use for the denoising process. Only works with schedulers which support the `timesteps` argument in their `set_timesteps` method.
            Defaults to not overriding, in which case the scheduler automatically sets the timesteps based on the `num_inference_steps` parameter.
            If set to a custom timestep schedule, the `num_inference_steps` parameter will be ignored. Cannot be set if `sigmas` is set.
        
- **`sigmas`** *()* вҖ” Default: `{"array":[],"method":"default"}` вҖ” 
            Optionally override the sigmas to use for the denoising process. Only works with schedulers which support the `sigmas` argument in their `set_sigmas` method.
            Defaults to not overriding, in which case the scheduler automatically sets the sigmas based on the `num_inference_steps` parameter.
            If set to a custom sigma schedule, the `num_inference_steps` parameter will be ignored. Cannot be set if `timesteps` is set.
        
- **`prediction_type`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"epsilon"` вҖ” 
            The type of prediction to use for the image generation.
            The `epsilon` is the default.
        
  Possible values: `v_prediction`, `epsilon`
- **`rescale_betas_snr_zero`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” 
            Whether to set the rescale_betas_snr_zero option or not for the sampler
        
- **`image_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” 
            Number of images to generate in one request. Note that the higher the batch size,
            the longer it will take to generate the images.
        
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`tile_width`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `4096` вҖ” The size of the tiles to be used for the image generation.
  Range: min: 128, max: 4096
- **`tile_height`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `4096` вҖ” The size of the tiles to be used for the image generation.
  Range: min: 128, max: 4096
- **`tile_stride_width`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `2048` вҖ” The stride of the tiles to be used for the image generation.
  Range: min: 64, max: 2048
- **`tile_stride_height`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `2048` вҖ” The stride of the tiles to be used for the image generation.
  Range: min: 64, max: 2048
- **`eta`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” The eta value to be used for the image generation.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`debug_latents`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the latents will be saved for debugging.
- **`debug_per_pass_latents`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the latents will be saved for debugging per pass.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `OutputParameters`
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`debug_per_pass_latents`** *(?)* вҖ” The latents saved for debugging per pass.
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`debug_latents`** *(?)* вҖ” The latents saved for debugging.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        

---

## fal-ai/luma-photon

**Title:** Luma Photon
**Description:** Generate images from your prompts using Luma Photon. Photon is the most creative, personalizable, and intelligent visual models for creatives, bringing a step-function change in the cost of high-quality image generation.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/luma-photon`
**Category:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToImageRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)*
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1:1"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `16:9`, `9:16`, `1:1`, `4:3`, `3:4`, `21:9`, `9:21`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `T2IOutput`
- **`images`** *(list<File>)* вҖ” The generated image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToImageRequest`

- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1:1"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video

## fal-ai/lumina-image/v2

**Title:** Lumina Image 2
**Description:** Lumina-Image-2.0 is a 2 billion parameter flow-based diffusion transforer which features improved performance in image quality, typography, complex prompt understanding, and resource-efficiency.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/lumina-image/v2`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** diffusion, typography, style

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_4_3"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use. Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`system_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"You are an assistant designed to generate superior images with the superior degree of image-text alignment based on textual prompts or user prompts."` вҖ” The system prompt to use.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`cfg_normalization`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to apply normalization-based guidance scale.
- **`cfg_trunc_ratio`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The ratio of the timestep interval to apply normalization-based guidance scale.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `ImageOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated images
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.

  Range: min: 1, max: 9
- **`prompt_optimizer`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to enable automatic prompt optimization

## fal-ai/nucleus-image

**Title:** Nucleus Image
**Description:** Nucleus-Image is a text-to-image generation model built on a sparse mixture-of-experts (MoE) diffusion transformer architecture.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/nucleus-image`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** stylized, transform, typography

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `NucleusImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the image.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” The negative prompt to use for generation.
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1:1"` вҖ” The output aspect ratio. Nucleus-Image supports a fixed set of aspect-ratio presets.
  Possible values: `1:1`, `16:9`, `9:16`, `4:3`, `3:4`, `3:2`, `2:3`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `50` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 100
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `8` вҖ” The classifier-free guidance scale.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Seed for reproducible generation.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 2
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, return media as data URIs instead of persisted CDN files.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.

## fal-ai/omnigen-v1

**Title:** OmniGen v1
**Description:** OmniGen is a unified image generation model that can generate a wide range of images from multi-modal prompts. It can be used for various tasks such as Image Editing, Personalized Image Generation, Virtual Try-On, Multi Person Generation and more!
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/omnigen-v1`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** multimodal, editing, try-on

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`input_image_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” URL of images to use while generating the image, Use <img><|image_1|></img> for the first image and so on.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `50` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`img_guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1.6` вҖ” 
            The Image Guidance scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your input image when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.

---

## fal-ai/omnigen-v2

**Title:** Omnigen V2
**Description:** OmniGen is a unified image generation model that can generate a wide range of images from multi-modal prompts. It can be used for various tasks such as Image Editing, Personalized Image Generation, Virtual Try-On, Multi Person Generation and more!
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/omnigen-v2`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** multimodal, editing, try-on

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate or edit an image. Use specific language like 'Add the bird from image 1 to the desk in image 2' for better results.
- **`input_image_urls`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” URLs of input images to use for image editing or multi-image generation. Support up to 3 images.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `50` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 20, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`text_guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” 
            The Text Guidance scale controls how closely the model follows the text prompt.
            Higher values make the model stick more closely to the prompt.
        
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`image_guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `2` вҖ” 
            The Image Guidance scale controls how closely the model follows the input images.
            For image editing: 1.3-2.0, for in-context generation: 2.0-3.0
        
  Range: min: 1, max: 3
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"(((deformed))), blurry, over saturation, bad anatomy, disfigured, poorly drawn face, mutation, mutated, (extra_limb), (ugly), (poorly drawn hands), fused fingers, messy drawing, broken legs censor, censored, censor_bar"` вҖ” Negative prompt to guide what should not be in the image.
- **`cfg_range_start`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” CFG range start value.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`cfg_range_end`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” CFG range end value.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`scheduler`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"euler"` вҖ” The scheduler to use for the diffusion process.
  Possible values: `euler`, `dpmsolver`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.

---

## fal-ai/ovis-image

**Title:** Ovis Image
**Description:** Ovis-Image is a 7B text-to-image model specifically optimized for quick, high quality text rendering.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ovis-image`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** ovis-image, artistic

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” The negative prompt to generate an image from.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_4_3"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” The guidance scale to use for the image generation.
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” The acceleration level to use.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `OvisImageOutput`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.

---

## fal-ai/patina/material

**Title:** PATINA
**Description:** Generate complete seamlessly tiling PBR materials including normal, roughness, basecolor, height and metalness maps up to 8K
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/patina/material`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** material, pbr, displacement, metalness, normal, roughness, basecolor, albedo, height, 

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `MaterialInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt describing the material/texture to generate.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” Output texture dimensions in pixels.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `8` вҖ” Number of denoising steps for texture generation.
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducible generation.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Number of texture images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Expand prompt with an LLM for richer detail. Adds ~0.0025 credits.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Enable the safety checker for generated images.
- **`tiling_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"both"` вҖ” Tiling direction: 'both' (omnidirectional), 'horizontal', or 'vertical'.
  Possible values: `both`, `horizontal`, `vertical`
- **`tile_size`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `128` вҖ” Tile size in latent space (64 = 512px, 128 = 1024px).
  Range: min: 32, max: 256
- **`tile_stride`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `64` вҖ” Tile stride in latent space.
  Range: min: 16, max: 128
- **`image_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of an input image for image-to-image or inpainting. When provided without mask_url, performs image-to-image; with mask_url, performs inpainting.
- **`mask_url`** *(string)* вҖ” URL of a mask image for inpainting. White regions are regenerated, black regions are preserved. Requires image_url.
- **`strength`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.75` вҖ” How much to transform the input image. Only used when image_url is provided.
  Range: max: 1
- **`maps`** *(list<string>)* вҖ” Default: `["basecolor","normal","roughness","metalness","height"]` вҖ” Which PBR maps to predict. Deselect all to skip PBR estimation entirely. Defaults to all five.
- **`upscale_factor`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Upscale factor for predicted PBR maps via SeedVR seamless upscaling. 0 = no upscaling, 2 = 2Г— resolution, 4 = 4Г— resolution. The base texture image is not upscaled.
  Possible values: `0`, `2`, `4`
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” Output image format for textures and PBR maps.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `MaterialOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Seed used for texture generation.
- **`images`** *(list<any>)* вҖ” Generated tileable texture image(s) from z-image and predicted PBR material maps from PATINA.
- **`timings`** *(object)* вҖ” End-to-end timing breakdown (seconds).
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for texture generation (possibly expanded).

---

## fal-ai/piflow

**Title:** Piflow
**Description:** Use the faster speed of piflow to generate images with same quality to that of slower models.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/piflow`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `PiQwenInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate an image from.
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” 
            The size of the generated image. You can choose between some presets or custom height and width
            that **must be multiples of 8**.
        
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `8` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducible generation. If set to None, a random seed will be used.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `PiQwenOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The URLs of the generated images.

---

## fal-ai/pixart-sigma

**Title:** PixArt-ОЈ
**Description:** Weak-to-Strong Training of Diffusion Transformer for 4K Text-to-Image Generation
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/pixart-sigma`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** diffusion

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `PixArtSigmaInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use. Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`style`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"(No style)"` вҖ” The style to apply to the image.
  Possible values: `(No style)`, `Cinematic`, `Photographic`, `Anime`, `Manga`, `Digital Art`, `Pixel art`, `Fantasy art`, `Neonpunk`, `3D Model`
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `35` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 5, max: 50
- **`scheduler`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"DPM-SOLVER"` вҖ” The scheduler to use for the model.
  Possible values: `DPM-SOLVER`, `SA-SOLVER`
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `4.5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 1, max: 10
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” 
            If set to true, the function will wait for the image to be generated and uploaded
            before returning the response. This will increase the latency of the function but
            it allows you to get the image directly in the response without going through the CDN.
        
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `PixArtSigmaOutput`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`timings`** *(object)* вҖ” The timings of the different steps of the generation process.
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        

---

**Title:** Playground v2.5
**Description:** State-of-the-art open-source model in aesthetic quality

**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** artistic, style

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToImagePlaygroundv25Input`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to use for generating the image. Be as descriptive as possible for best results.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            The negative prompt to use. Use it to address details that you don't want
            in the image. This could be colors, objects, scenery and even the small details
            (e.g. moustache, blurry, low resolution).
        
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `25` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of Stable Diffusion
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 8
- **`embeddings`** *(list<Embedding>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” The list of embeddings to use.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`safety_checker_version`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"v1"` вҖ” The version of the safety checker to use. v1 is the default CompVis safety checker. v2 uses a custom ViT model.
  Possible values: `v1`, `v2`
- **`expand_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the prompt will be expanded with additional prompts.
- **`format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`guidance_rescale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” The rescale factor for the CFG.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`request_id`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” 
            An id bound to a request, can be used with response to identify the request
            itself.
        

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.

- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed to use for generating images

- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"jpeg"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`

- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated images
- **`timings`** *(object)*

## fal-ai/qwen-image

**Title:** Qwen Image
**Description:** Qwen-Image is an image generation foundation model in the Qwen series that achieves significant advances in complex text rendering and precise image editing. 
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/qwen-image`
**Category:** text-to-image
**Tags:** text-to-image

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `BaseQwenImageInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate the image with
- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_4_3"` вҖ” The size of the generated image.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 2, max: 250
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same image every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `2.5` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related image to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `" "` вҖ” The negative prompt for the generation
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” Acceleration level for image generation. Options: 'none', 'regular', 'high'. Higher acceleration increases speed. 'regular' balances speed and quality. 'high' is recommended for images without text.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`
- **`loras`** *(list<LoraWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” 
            The LoRAs to use for the image generation. You can use up to 3 LoRAs
            and they will be merged together to generate the final image.
        
- **`use_turbo`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable turbo mode for faster generation with high quality. When enabled, uses optimized settings (10 steps, CFG=1.2).

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `QwenImageOutput`
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated Image. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        
- **`has_nsfw_concepts`** *(list<boolean>)* вҖ” Whether the generated images contain NSFW concepts.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the image.
- **`images`** *(list<Image>)* вҖ” The generated image files info.

- **`image_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"square_hd"` вҖ” The size of the generated image. Total number of pixels must be between 512x512 and 2048x2048.

- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Enable LLM prompt optimization for better results.

- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Enable content moderation for input and output.
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`num_images`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The number of images to generate.
  Range: min: 1, max: 4
- **`output_format`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"png"` вҖ” The format of the generated image.
  Possible values: `jpeg`, `png`, `webp`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `QwenImage2ProTextToImageOutput`
- **`images`** *(list<File>)* вҖ” Generated images
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation

## fal-ai/qwen-image-2512/lora

**Title:** Qwen Image 2512
**Description:** LoRA inference endpoint for Qwen Image 2512, an improved version of Qwen Image with better text rendering, finer natural textures, and more realistic human generation.
