- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable prompt expansion.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker.
- **`video_output_type`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"X264 (.mp4)"` вҖ” The output type of the generated video.
  Possible values: `X264 (.mp4)`, `VP9 (.webm)`, `PRORES4444 (.mov)`, `GIF (.gif)`
- **`video_quality`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"high"` вҖ” The quality of the generated video.
  Possible values: `low`, `medium`, `high`, `maximum`
- **`video_write_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"balanced"` вҖ” The write mode of the generated video.
  Possible values: `fast`, `balanced`, `small`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`loras`** *(list<LoRAInput>)* вҖ” The LoRAs to use for the generation.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `LTX2TextToVideoOutput`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for the generation.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for the random number generator.
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video.

- **`camera_lora`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” The camera LoRA to use. This allows you to control the camera movement of the generated video more accurately than just prompting the model to move the camera.
  Possible values: `dolly_in`, `dolly_out`, `dolly_left`, `dolly_right`, `jib_up`, `jib_down`, `static`, `none`
- **`camera_lora_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The scale of the camera LoRA to use. This allows you to control the camera movement of the generated video more accurately than just prompting the model to move the camera.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"blurry, out of focus, overexposed, underexposed, low contrast, washed out colors, excessive noise, grainy texture, poor lighting, flickering, motion blur, distorted proportions, unnatural skin tones, deformed facial features, asymmetrical face, missing facial features, extra limbs, disfigured hands, wrong hand count, artifacts around text, inconsistent perspective, camera shake, incorrect depth of field, background too sharp, background clutter, distracting reflections, harsh shadows, inconsistent lighting direction, color banding, cartoonish rendering, 3D CGI look, unrealistic materials, uncanny valley effect, incorrect ethnicity, wrong gender, exaggerated expressions, wrong gaze direction, mismatched lip sync, silent or muted audio, distorted voice, robotic voice, echo, background noise, off-sync audio,incorrect dialogue, added dialogue, repetitive speech, jittery movement, awkward pauses, incorrect timing, unnatural transitions, inconsistent framing, tilted camera, flat lighting, inconsistent tone, cinematic oversaturation, stylized filters, or AI artifacts."` вҖ” The negative prompt to generate the video from.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator.
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable prompt expansion.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker.
- **`video_output_type`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"X264 (.mp4)"` вҖ” The output type of the generated video.
  Possible values: `X264 (.mp4)`, `VP9 (.webm)`, `PRORES4444 (.mov)`, `GIF (.gif)`
- **`video_quality`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"high"` вҖ” The quality of the generated video.
  Possible values: `low`, `medium`, `high`, `maximum`
- **`video_write_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"balanced"` вҖ” The write mode of the generated video.
  Possible values: `fast`, `balanced`, `small`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `LTX2TextToVideoOutput`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for the generation.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for the random number generator.
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video.

## fal-ai/ltx-2-19b/text-to-video/lora

**Title:** LTX-2 19B
**Description:** Generate video with audio from text using LTX-2 and custom LoRA
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ltx-2-19b/text-to-video/lora`
**Category:** text-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `LTX2LoRATextToVideoInput`
**Required fields:** `loras`, `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate the video from.
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `121` вҖ” The number of frames to generate.
  Range: min: 9, max: 481
- **`video_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_4_3"` вҖ” The size of the generated video.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`generate_audio`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to generate audio for the video.
- **`use_multiscale`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to use multi-scale generation. If True, the model will generate the video at a smaller scale first, then use the smaller video to guide the generation of a video at or above your requested size. This results in better coherence and details.
- **`fps`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `25` вҖ” The frames per second of the generated video.
  Range: min: 1, max: 60
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3` вҖ” The guidance scale to use.
  Range: min: 1, max: 10
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `40` вҖ” The number of inference steps to use.
  Range: min: 8, max: 50
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” The acceleration level to use.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`, `full`
- **`camera_lora`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” The camera LoRA to use. This allows you to control the camera movement of the generated video more accurately than just prompting the model to move the camera.
  Possible values: `dolly_in`, `dolly_out`, `dolly_left`, `dolly_right`, `jib_up`, `jib_down`, `static`, `none`
- **`camera_lora_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The scale of the camera LoRA to use. This allows you to control the camera movement of the generated video more accurately than just prompting the model to move the camera.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"blurry, out of focus, overexposed, underexposed, low contrast, washed out colors, excessive noise, grainy texture, poor lighting, flickering, motion blur, distorted proportions, unnatural skin tones, deformed facial features, asymmetrical face, missing facial features, extra limbs, disfigured hands, wrong hand count, artifacts around text, inconsistent perspective, camera shake, incorrect depth of field, background too sharp, background clutter, distracting reflections, harsh shadows, inconsistent lighting direction, color banding, cartoonish rendering, 3D CGI look, unrealistic materials, uncanny valley effect, incorrect ethnicity, wrong gender, exaggerated expressions, wrong gaze direction, mismatched lip sync, silent or muted audio, distorted voice, robotic voice, echo, background noise, off-sync audio,incorrect dialogue, added dialogue, repetitive speech, jittery movement, awkward pauses, incorrect timing, unnatural transitions, inconsistent framing, tilted camera, flat lighting, inconsistent tone, cinematic oversaturation, stylized filters, or AI artifacts."` вҖ” The negative prompt to generate the video from.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator.
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable prompt expansion.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker.
- **`video_output_type`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"X264 (.mp4)"` вҖ” The output type of the generated video.
  Possible values: `X264 (.mp4)`, `VP9 (.webm)`, `PRORES4444 (.mov)`, `GIF (.gif)`
- **`video_quality`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"high"` вҖ” The quality of the generated video.
  Possible values: `low`, `medium`, `high`, `maximum`
- **`video_write_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"balanced"` вҖ” The write mode of the generated video.
  Possible values: `fast`, `balanced`, `small`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`loras`** *(list<LoRAInput>)* вҖ” The LoRAs to use for the generation.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `LTX2TextToVideoOutput`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for the generation.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for the random number generator.
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video.

## fal-ai/ltx-2.3-22b/distilled/text-to-video

**Title:** LTX-2.3 22B Distilled
**Description:** Generate video with audio from text using LTX-2.3 Distilled
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ltx-2.3-22b/distilled/text-to-video`
**Category:** text-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `LTX23DistilledTextToVideoInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate the video from.
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `121` вҖ” The number of frames to generate.
  Range: min: 9, max: 481
- **`video_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_16_9"` вҖ” The size of the generated video.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`generate_audio`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to generate audio for the video.
- **`use_multiscale`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to use multi-scale generation. If True, the model will generate the video at a smaller scale first, then use the smaller video to guide the generation of a video at or above your requested size. This results in better coherence and details.
- **`fps`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `24` вҖ” The frames per second of the generated video.
  Range: min: 1, max: 60
- **`scheduler`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"ltx2"` вҖ” The scheduler to use.
  Possible values: `ltx2`, `linear_quadratic`, `beta`
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” The acceleration level to use.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`, `full`
- **`camera_lora`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” The camera LoRA to use. This allows you to control the camera movement of the generated video more accurately than just prompting the model to move the camera.
  Possible values: `dolly_in`, `dolly_out`, `dolly_left`, `dolly_right`, `jib_up`, `jib_down`, `static`, `none`
- **`camera_lora_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The scale of the camera LoRA to use. This allows you to control the camera movement of the generated video more accurately than just prompting the model to move the camera.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"news broadcast, 3d animation, computer graphics, pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, watermark, logo, text, on screen text, subtitles, titles, signature, slowmo, static"` вҖ” The negative prompt to generate the video from.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator.
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable prompt expansion.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker.
- **`video_output_type`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"X264 (.mp4)"` вҖ” The output type of the generated video.
  Possible values: `X264 (.mp4)`, `VP9 (.webm)`, `PRORES4444 (.mov)`, `GIF (.gif)`
- **`video_quality`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"high"` вҖ” The quality of the generated video.
  Possible values: `low`, `medium`, `high`, `maximum`
- **`video_write_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"balanced"` вҖ” The write mode of the generated video.
  Possible values: `fast`, `balanced`, `small`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`distill_lora_second_pass_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” The scale of the distill LoRA to use for the second and subsequent passes.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `LTX23TextToVideoOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for the random number generator.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for the generation.

## fal-ai/ltx-2.3-22b/text-to-video

**Title:** LTX-2.3 22B
**Description:** Generate video with audio from text using LTX-2.3
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ltx-2.3-22b/text-to-video`
**Category:** text-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `LTX23TextToVideoInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate the video from.
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `121` вҖ” The number of frames to generate.
  Range: min: 9, max: 481
- **`video_size`** *(? | string)* вҖ” Default: `"landscape_16_9"` вҖ” The size of the generated video.
  Possible values: `square_hd`, `square`, `portrait_4_3`, `portrait_16_9`, `landscape_4_3`, `landscape_16_9`
- **`generate_audio`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to generate audio for the video.
- **`use_multiscale`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to use multi-scale generation. If True, the model will generate the video at a smaller scale first, then use the smaller video to guide the generation of a video at or above your requested size. This results in better coherence and details.
- **`fps`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `24` вҖ” The frames per second of the generated video.
  Range: min: 1, max: 60
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `40` вҖ” The number of inference steps to use.
  Range: min: 8, max: 50
- **`video_cfg_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3` вҖ” The Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) scale for the video. Higher values result in more consistent and focused video content.
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`video_stg_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” The Spatiotemporal Guidance (STG) scale for the video. Higher values result in more consistent and focused video content.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`video_rescaling_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.7` вҖ” The rescaling scale for the video. Controls the ratio between classifier-free guidance and spatiotemporal guidance.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`video_modality_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3` вҖ” The modality scale for the video. Controls the ratio between video and audio modalities.
  Range: min: 0, max: 10
- **`audio_cfg_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `7` вҖ” The Classifier-Free Guidance (CFG) scale for the audio. Higher values result in more consistent and focused audio content.
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`audio_stg_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” The Spatiotemporal Guidance (STG) scale for the audio. Higher values result in more consistent and focused audio content.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`audio_rescaling_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.7` вҖ” The rescaling scale for the audio. Controls the ratio between classifier-free guidance and spatiotemporal guidance.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`audio_modality_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3` вҖ” The modality scale for the audio. Controls the ratio between video and audio modalities.
  Range: min: 0, max: 10
- **`gradient_estimation_gamma`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `2` вҖ” The gamma of gradient estimation during denoising. Set to 0 to disable.
  Range: min: 0, max: 10
- **`use_restart_sampling`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to use restart sampling. This will inject a small amount of noise during each denoising step, which can help improve the quality of the generated video.
- **`scheduler`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"ltx2"` вҖ” The scheduler to use.
  Possible values: `ltx2`, `linear_quadratic`, `beta`
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” The acceleration level to use.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`, `full`
- **`camera_lora`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” The camera LoRA to use. This allows you to control the camera movement of the generated video more accurately than just prompting the model to move the camera.
  Possible values: `dolly_in`, `dolly_out`, `dolly_left`, `dolly_right`, `jib_up`, `jib_down`, `static`, `none`
- **`camera_lora_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The scale of the camera LoRA to use. This allows you to control the camera movement of the generated video more accurately than just prompting the model to move the camera.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"news broadcast, 3d animation, computer graphics, pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, watermark, logo, text, on screen text, subtitles, titles, signature, slowmo, static"` вҖ” The negative prompt to generate the video from.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator.
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable prompt expansion.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker.
- **`video_output_type`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"X264 (.mp4)"` вҖ” The output type of the generated video.
  Possible values: `X264 (.mp4)`, `VP9 (.webm)`, `PRORES4444 (.mov)`, `GIF (.gif)`
- **`video_quality`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"high"` вҖ” The quality of the generated video.
  Possible values: `low`, `medium`, `high`, `maximum`
- **`video_write_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"balanced"` вҖ” The write mode of the generated video.
  Possible values: `fast`, `balanced`, `small`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`distill_lora_first_pass_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.2` вҖ” The scale of the distill LoRA to use for the first pass. Set to 0 to disable.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`distill_lora_second_pass_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” The scale of the distill LoRA to use for the second and subsequent passes.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `LTX23TextToVideoOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for the random number generator.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for the generation.

- **`gradient_estimation_gamma`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `2` вҖ” The gamma of gradient estimation during denoising. Set to 0 to disable.
  Range: min: 0, max: 10
- **`use_restart_sampling`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to use restart sampling. This will inject a small amount of noise during each denoising step, which can help improve the quality of the generated video.
- **`scheduler`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"ltx2"` вҖ” The scheduler to use.
  Possible values: `ltx2`, `linear_quadratic`, `beta`
- **`acceleration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"regular"` вҖ” The acceleration level to use.
  Possible values: `none`, `regular`, `high`, `full`
- **`camera_lora`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"none"` вҖ” The camera LoRA to use. This allows you to control the camera movement of the generated video more accurately than just prompting the model to move the camera.
  Possible values: `dolly_in`, `dolly_out`, `dolly_left`, `dolly_right`, `jib_up`, `jib_down`, `static`, `none`
- **`camera_lora_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” The scale of the camera LoRA to use. This allows you to control the camera movement of the generated video more accurately than just prompting the model to move the camera.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"news broadcast, 3d animation, computer graphics, pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, watermark, logo, text, on screen text, subtitles, titles, signature, slowmo, static"` вҖ” The negative prompt to generate the video from.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator.
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable prompt expansion.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker.
- **`video_output_type`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"X264 (.mp4)"` вҖ” The output type of the generated video.
  Possible values: `X264 (.mp4)`, `VP9 (.webm)`, `PRORES4444 (.mov)`, `GIF (.gif)`
- **`video_quality`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"high"` вҖ” The quality of the generated video.
  Possible values: `low`, `medium`, `high`, `maximum`
- **`video_write_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"balanced"` вҖ” The write mode of the generated video.
  Possible values: `fast`, `balanced`, `small`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.
- **`loras`** *(list<LoRAInput>)* вҖ” The LoRAs to use for the generation.
- **`distill_lora_first_pass_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.2` вҖ” The scale of the distill LoRA to use for the first pass. Set to 0 to disable.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`distill_lora_second_pass_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” The scale of the distill LoRA to use for the second and subsequent passes.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `LTX23TextToVideoOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for the random number generator.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for the generation.

---

## fal-ai/ltx-2.3/text-to-video

**Title:** LTX Video 2.3 Pro
**Description:** LTX-2.3 is a high-quality, fast AI video model available in Pro and Fast variants for text-to-video, image-to-video, and audio-to-video.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ltx-2.3/text-to-video`
**Category:** text-to-video
**Tags:** stylized, transform, lipsync

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `LTXV23TextToVideoRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to use for the generated video
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `6` вҖ” The duration of the generated video in seconds
  Possible values: `6`, `8`, `10`
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1080p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `1080p`, `1440p`, `2160p`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `16:9`, `9:16`
- **`fps`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `25` вҖ” The frames per second of the generated video
  Possible values: `24`, `25`, `48`, `50`
- **`generate_audio`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to generate audio for the generated video

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `LTXV23TextToVideoResponse`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file

---

## fal-ai/ltx-2.3/text-to-video/fast

**Title:** LTX 2.3 Video Fast
**Description:** LTX-2.3 is a high-quality, fast AI video model available in Pro and Fast variants for text-to-video, image-to-video, and audio-to-video.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ltx-2.3/text-to-video/fast`
**Category:** text-to-video
**Tags:** stylized, transform, lipsync

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `LTXV23TextToVideoFastRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to use for the generated video
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `6` вҖ” The duration of the generated video in seconds. The fast model supports 6-20 seconds. Note: Durations longer than 10 seconds (12, 14, 16, 18, 20) are only supported with 25 FPS and 1080p resolution.
  Possible values: `6`, `8`, `10`, `12`, `14`, `16`, `18`, `20`
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1080p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `1080p`, `1440p`, `2160p`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `16:9`, `9:16`
- **`fps`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `25` вҖ” The frames per second of the generated video
  Possible values: `24`, `25`, `48`, `50`
- **`generate_audio`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to generate audio for the generated video

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `LTXV23TextToVideoFastResponse`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file

---

- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed to use for random number generation.
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” The number of inference steps to take.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50

  Range: max: 10

## fal-ai/ltx-video-13b-dev

**Title:** LTX Video-0.9.7 13B
**Description:** Generate videos from prompts using LTX Video-0.9.7 13B and custom LoRA
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ltx-video-13b-dev`
**Category:** text-to-video
**Tags:** video, ltx-video, text-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToVideoInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Text prompt to guide generation
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"worst quality, inconsistent motion, blurry, jittery, distorted"` вҖ” Negative prompt for generation
- **`loras`** *(list<LoRAWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” LoRA weights to use for generation
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” Resolution of the generated video.
  Possible values: `480p`, `720p`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” Aspect ratio of the generated video.
  Possible values: `9:16`, `1:1`, `16:9`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for generation
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `121` вҖ” The number of frames in the video.
  Range: min: 9, max: 1441
- **`first_pass_num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” Number of inference steps during the first pass.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50
- **`second_pass_num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” Number of inference steps during the second pass.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50
- **`second_pass_skip_initial_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `17` вҖ” The number of inference steps to skip in the initial steps of the second pass. By skipping some steps at the beginning, the second pass can focus on smaller details instead of larger changes.
  Range: min: 0, max: 49
- **`frame_rate`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `24` вҖ” The frame rate of the video.
  Range: min: 1, max: 60
- **`expand_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to expand the prompt using a language model.
- **`reverse_video`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to reverse the video.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker.
- **`enable_detail_pass`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to use a detail pass. If True, the model will perform a second pass to refine the video and enhance details. This incurs a 2.0x cost multiplier on the base price.
- **`temporal_adain_factor`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” The factor for adaptive instance normalization (AdaIN) applied to generated video chunks after the first. This can help deal with a gradual increase in saturation/contrast in the generated video by normalizing the color distribution across the video. A high value will ensure the color distribution is more consistent across the video, while a low value will allow for more variation in color distribution.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`tone_map_compression_ratio`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” The compression ratio for tone mapping. This is used to compress the dynamic range of the video to improve visual quality. A value of 0.0 means no compression, while a value of 1.0 means maximum compression.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `TextToVideoOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generation.

---

## fal-ai/ltx-video-13b-distilled

**Title:** LTX Video-0.9.7 13B Distilled
**Description:** Generate videos from prompts using LTX Video-0.9.7 13B Distilled and custom LoRA
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ltx-video-13b-distilled`
**Category:** text-to-video
**Tags:** video, ltx-video, text-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `DistilledTextToVideoInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Text prompt to guide generation
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"worst quality, inconsistent motion, blurry, jittery, distorted"` вҖ” Negative prompt for generation
- **`loras`** *(list<LoRAWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” LoRA weights to use for generation
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” Resolution of the generated video.
  Possible values: `480p`, `720p`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” Aspect ratio of the generated video.
  Possible values: `9:16`, `1:1`, `16:9`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for generation
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `121` вҖ” The number of frames in the video.
  Range: min: 9, max: 1441
- **`first_pass_num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `8` вҖ” Number of inference steps during the first pass.
  Range: min: 2, max: 12
- **`second_pass_num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `8` вҖ” Number of inference steps during the second pass.
  Range: min: 2, max: 12
- **`second_pass_skip_initial_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” The number of inference steps to skip in the initial steps of the second pass. By skipping some steps at the beginning, the second pass can focus on smaller details instead of larger changes.
  Range: min: 1, max: 11
- **`frame_rate`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `24` вҖ” The frame rate of the video.
  Range: min: 1, max: 60
- **`expand_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to expand the prompt using a language model.
- **`reverse_video`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to reverse the video.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable the safety checker.
- **`enable_detail_pass`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to use a detail pass. If True, the model will perform a second pass to refine the video and enhance details. This incurs a 2.0x cost multiplier on the base price.
- **`temporal_adain_factor`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.5` вҖ” The factor for adaptive instance normalization (AdaIN) applied to generated video chunks after the first. This can help deal with a gradual increase in saturation/contrast in the generated video by normalizing the color distribution across the video. A high value will ensure the color distribution is more consistent across the video, while a low value will allow for more variation in color distribution.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`tone_map_compression_ratio`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” The compression ratio for tone mapping. This is used to compress the dynamic range of the video to improve visual quality. A value of 0.0 means no compression, while a value of 1.0 means maximum compression.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `TextToVideoOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generation.

---

## fal-ai/luma-dream-machine/ray-2

**Title:** Luma Ray 2
**Description:** Ray2 is a large-scale video generative model capable of creating realistic visuals with natural, coherent motion.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/luma-dream-machine/ray-2`
**Category:** text-to-video
**Tags:** motion, transformation

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `Ray2TextToVideoRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)*
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `16:9`, `9:16`, `4:3`, `3:4`, `21:9`, `9:21`
- **`loop`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether the video should loop (end of video is blended with the beginning)
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"540p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video (720p costs 2x more, 1080p costs 4x more)
  Possible values: `540p`, `720p`, `1080p`
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"5s"` вҖ” The duration of the generated video (9s costs 2x more)
  Possible values: `5s`, `9s`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Ray2T2VOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video

## fal-ai/magi

**Title:** MAGI-1
**Description:** MAGI-1 is a video generation model with exceptional understanding of physical interactions and cinematic prompts
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/magi`
**Category:** text-to-video
**Tags:** text-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `MagiTextToVideoRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt to guide video generation.
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `96` вҖ” Number of frames to generate. Must be between 96 and 192 (inclusive). Each additional 24 frames beyond 96 incurs an additional billing unit.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. If None, a random seed is chosen.
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” Resolution of the generated video (480p or 720p). 480p is 0.5 billing units, and 720p is 1 billing unit.
  Possible values: `480p`, `720p`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `16` вҖ” Number of inference steps for sampling. Higher values give better quality but take longer.
  Possible values: `4`, `8`, `16`, `32`, `64`
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” Aspect ratio of the generated video. If 'auto', the aspect ratio will be determined automatically based on the input image.
  Possible values: `auto`, `16:9`, `9:16`, `1:1`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `MagiResponse`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.

---

## fal-ai/magi-distilled

**Title:** MAGI-1 (Distilled)
**Description:** MAGI-1 distilled is a faster video generation model with exceptional understanding of physical interactions and cinematic prompts
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/magi-distilled`
**Category:** text-to-video
**Tags:** text-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `MagiTextToVideoRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt to guide video generation.
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `96` вҖ” Number of frames to generate. Must be between 96 and 192 (inclusive). Each additional 24 frames beyond 96 incurs an additional billing unit.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. If None, a random seed is chosen.
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” Resolution of the generated video (480p or 720p). 480p is 0.5 billing units, and 720p is 1 billing unit.
  Possible values: `480p`, `720p`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `16` вҖ” Number of inference steps for sampling. Higher values give better quality but take longer.
  Possible values: `4`, `8`, `16`, `32`
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"auto"` вҖ” Aspect ratio of the generated video. If 'auto', the aspect ratio will be determined automatically based on the input image.
  Possible values: `auto`, `16:9`, `9:16`, `1:1`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `MagiResponse`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.

---

## fal-ai/minimax/video-01-director

**Title:** MiniMax (Hailuo AI) Video 01 Director
**Description:** Generate video clips more accurately with respect to natural language descriptions and using camera movement instructions for shot control.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/minimax/video-01-director`
**Category:** text-to-video
**Tags:** motion, transformation, camera-controls

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToVideoDirectorRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Text prompt for video generation. Camera movement instructions can be added using square brackets (e.g. [Pan left] or [Zoom in]). You can use up to 3 combined movements per prompt. Supported movements: Truck left/right, Pan left/right, Push in/Pull out, Pedestal up/down, Tilt up/down, Zoom in/out, Shake, Tracking shot, Static shot. For example: [Truck left, Pan right, Zoom in]. For a more detailed guide, refer https://sixth-switch-2ac.notion.site/T2V-01-Director-Model-Tutorial-with-camera-movement-1886c20a98eb80f395b8e05291ad8645
- **`prompt_optimizer`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to use the model's prompt optimizer

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `T2VDirectorOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video

---

**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” The negative prompt for the video.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed to use for generating the video.
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable prompt expansion.

- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video

## fal-ai/multishot-master

**Title:** Multishot Master
**Description:** MultiShotMaster is a controllable multi-shot narrative video generation framework that supports text-driven inter-shot consistency, variable shot counts and shot durations, customized subject with motion control, and background-driven customized scene.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/multishot-master`
**Category:** text-to-video
**Tags:** text-to-video, multi-shot

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `MultiShotInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`, `shots`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Global story caption describing the overall scene, subjects, setting, and visual style. This provides inter-shot consistency.
- **`shots`** *(list<Shot>)* вҖ” List of shots to generate. Each shot has its own caption and frame count. Maximum 5 shots with a combined maximum of 308 frames.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"bright colors, overexposed, static, blurred details, subtitles, style, artwork, painting, picture, still, overall gray, worst quality, low quality, JPEG compression residue, ugly, incomplete, extra fingers, poorly drawn hands, poorly drawn faces, deformed, disfigured, malformed limbs, fused fingers, still picture, cluttered background, three legs, many people in the background, walking backwards"` вҖ” Negative prompt describing undesired content in the generated video.
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"480p"` вҖ” Resolution of the generated video.
  Possible values: `480p`, `720p`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” Aspect ratio of the generated video.
  Possible values: `16:9`, `9:16`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `50` вҖ” Number of denoising steps. Higher values produce better quality but take longer.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” Classifier-free guidance scale.
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility.
- **`frames_per_second`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `16` вҖ” Frames per second of the output video.
  Range: min: 5, max: 30
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Enable safety checker for input/output content.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `MultiShotOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated multi-shot narrative video.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.
- **`timings`** *(object)* вҖ” Performance timing information.

---

## fal-ai/ovi

**Title:** Ovi Text to Video
**Description:** A unified paradigm for audio-video generation
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/ovi`
**Category:** text-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `OviT2VRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt to guide video generation.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"jitter, bad hands, blur, distortion"` вҖ” Negative prompt for video generation.
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” The number of inference steps.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`audio_negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"robotic, muffled, echo, distorted"` вҖ” Negative prompt for audio generation.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. If None, a random seed is chosen.
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"992x512"` вҖ” Resolution of the generated video in W:H format. One of (512x992, 992x512, 960x512, 512x960, 720x720, or 448x1120).
  Possible values: `512x992`, `992x512`, `960x512`, `512x960`, `720x720`, `448x1120`, `1120x448`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `OviT2VResponse`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.
- **`video`** *(?)* вҖ” The generated video file.

## fal-ai/pixverse/c1/text-to-video

**Title:** PixVerse C1 Text to Video
**Description:** Generate film-grade videos from text prompts with native audio, up to 1080p and 15 seconds, using PixVerse C1.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/pixverse/c1/text-to-video`
**Category:** text-to-video
**Tags:** video-generation, text-to-video, pixverse, cinematic, film, 1080p, audio

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToVideoRequestC1`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)*
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `16:9`, `4:3`, `1:1`, `3:4`, `9:16`, `2:3`, `3:2`, `21:9`
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `360p`, `540p`, `720p`, `1080p`
- **`duration`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” The duration of the generated video in seconds (1-15)
  Range: min: 1, max: 15
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same video every time.
        
- **`generate_audio_switch`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable audio generation (BGM, SFX, dialogue)

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `VideoOutputC1`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file.

## fal-ai/pixverse/v3.5/text-to-video

**Title:** PixVerse v3.5
**Description:** Generate high quality video clips from text prompts using PixVerse v3.5
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/pixverse/v3.5/text-to-video`
**Category:** text-to-video

- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `16:9`, `4:3`, `1:1`, `3:4`, `9:16`
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `360p`, `540p`, `720p`, `1080p`
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"5"` вҖ” The duration of the generated video in seconds. 8s videos cost double. 1080p videos are limited to 5 seconds
  Possible values: `5`, `8`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Negative prompt to be used for the generation
- **`style`** *(string)* вҖ” The style of the generated video
  Possible values: `anime`, `3d_animation`, `clay`, `comic`, `cyberpunk`

            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same video every time.

- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video

- **`prompt`** *(string)*
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `16:9`, `4:3`, `1:1`, `3:4`, `9:16`
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `360p`, `540p`, `720p`, `1080p`

  Possible values: `5`, `8`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Negative prompt to be used for the generation
- **`style`** *(string)* вҖ” The style of the generated video
  Possible values: `anime`, `3d_animation`, `clay`, `comic`, `cyberpunk`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same video every time.
        

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `VideoOutputV4`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video

**Description:** Generate high quality and fast video clips from text and image prompts using PixVerse v4 fast

**Category:** text-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `FastTextToVideoRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)*
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `16:9`, `4:3`, `1:1`, `3:4`, `9:16`
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `360p`, `540p`, `720p`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Negative prompt to be used for the generation
- **`style`** *(string)* вҖ” The style of the generated video
  Possible values: `anime`, `3d_animation`, `clay`, `comic`, `cyberpunk`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same video every time.
        

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `VideoOutputV4`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video

## fal-ai/pixverse/v5.5/text-to-video

**Title:** Pixverse
**Description:** Generate high quality video clips from text and image prompts using PixVerse v5.5
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/pixverse/v5.5/text-to-video`
**Category:** text-to-video
**Tags:** text-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToVideoRequestV5_5`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)*
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `16:9`, `4:3`, `1:1`, `3:4`, `9:16`
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `360p`, `540p`, `720p`, `1080p`
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"5"` вҖ” The duration of the generated video in seconds. Longer durations cost more. 1080p videos are limited to 5 or 8 seconds
  Possible values: `5`, `8`, `10`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Negative prompt to be used for the generation
- **`style`** *(string)* вҖ” The style of the generated video
  Possible values: `anime`, `3d_animation`, `clay`, `comic`, `cyberpunk`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same video every time.
        
- **`generate_audio_switch`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable audio generation (BGM, SFX, dialogue)
- **`generate_multi_clip_switch`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Enable multi-clip generation with dynamic camera changes
- **`thinking_type`** *(string)* вҖ” Prompt optimization mode: 'enabled' to optimize, 'disabled' to turn off, 'auto' for model decision
  Possible values: `enabled`, `disabled`, `auto`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `VideoOutputV5_5`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video

---

- **`duration`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” The duration of the generated video in seconds. v6 supports values from 1 to 15 seconds
  Range: min: 1, max: 15
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Negative prompt to be used for the generation

  Possible values: `anime`, `3d_animation`, `clay`, `comic`, `cyberpunk`

            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model

## fal-ai/sana-video

**Title:** Sana Video
**Description:** Leverage Sana's ultra-fast processing speed to generate high-quality assets that transform your text prompts into production-ready videos
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/sana-video`
**Category:** text-to-video
**Tags:** text-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `SanaVideoInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt describing the video to generate.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"A chaotic sequence with misshapen, deformed limbs in heavy motion blur, sudden disappearance, jump cuts, jerky movements, rapid shot changes, frames out of sync, inconsistent character shapes, temporal artifacts, jitter, and ghosting effects, creating a disorienting visual experience."` вҖ” The negative prompt describing what to avoid in the generation.
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"480p"` вҖ” The resolution of the output video.
  Possible values: `480p`, `720p`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the output video. Only used when resolution is '720p'.
  Possible values: `16:9`, `9:16`, `4:3`, `3:4`, `1:1`
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `81` вҖ” Number of frames to generate.
  Range: min: 16, max: 200
- **`frames_per_second`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `16` вҖ” Frames per second for the output video.
  Range: min: 8, max: 30
- **`motion_score`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” Motion intensity score (higher = more motion).
  Range: min: 0, max: 100
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `6` вҖ” Guidance scale for generation (higher = more prompt adherence).
  Range: min: 1, max: 20
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `28` вҖ” Number of denoising steps.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducible generation. If not provided, a random seed will be used.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Enable safety checking of the generated video.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `SanaVideoOutput`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The random seed used for the generation process.
- **`timings`** *(object)* вҖ” Performance timing breakdown.
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” Generated video file.

---

## fal-ai/sora-2/text-to-video

**Title:** Sora 2
**Description:** Text-to-video endpoint for Sora 2, OpenAI's state-of-the-art video model capable of creating richly detailed, dynamic clips with audio from natural language or images.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/sora-2/text-to-video`
**Category:** text-to-video
**Tags:** text to video, audio, sora

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToVideoInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt describing the video you want to generate
- **`resolution`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `9:16`, `16:9`
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” Duration of the generated video in seconds
  Possible values: `4`, `8`, `12`, `16`, `20`
- **`delete_video`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to delete the video after generation for privacy reasons. If True, the video cannot be used for remixing and will be permanently deleted.
- **`model`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"sora-2"` вҖ” The model to use for the generation. When the default model is selected, the latest snapshot of the model will be used - otherwise, select a specific snapshot of the model.
  Possible values: `sora-2`, `sora-2-2025-12-08`, `sora-2-2025-10-06`
- **`detect_and_block_ip`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If enabled, the prompt (and image for image-to-video) will be checked for known intellectual property references and the request will be blocked if any are detected.
- **`character_ids`** *(array)* вҖ” Up to two character IDs (from create-character) to use in the video. Refer to characters by name in the prompt. When set, only the OpenAI provider is used.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `TextToVideoOutput`
- **`thumbnail`** *(?)* вҖ” Thumbnail image for the video
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video
- **`spritesheet`** *(?)* вҖ” Spritesheet image for the video
- **`video_id`** *(string)* вҖ” The ID of the generated video

---

## fal-ai/sora-2/text-to-video/pro

**Title:** Sora 2
**Description:** Text-to-video endpoint for Sora 2 Pro, OpenAI's state-of-the-art video model capable of creating richly detailed, dynamic clips with audio from natural language or images.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/sora-2/text-to-video/pro`
**Category:** text-to-video
**Tags:** text-to-video, audio, sora-2-pro

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `ProTextToVideoInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt describing the video you want to generate
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1080p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video
  Possible values: `720p`, `1080p`, `true_1080p`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `9:16`, `16:9`
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” Duration of the generated video in seconds
  Possible values: `4`, `8`, `12`, `16`, `20`
- **`delete_video`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to delete the video after generation for privacy reasons. If True, the video cannot be used for remixing and will be permanently deleted.
- **`detect_and_block_ip`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If enabled, the prompt (and image for image-to-video) will be checked for known intellectual property references and the request will be blocked if any are detected.
- **`character_ids`** *(array)* вҖ” Up to two character IDs (from create-character) to use in the video. Refer to characters by name in the prompt. When set, only the OpenAI provider is used.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `ProTextToVideoOutput`
- **`thumbnail`** *(?)* вҖ” Thumbnail image for the video
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video
- **`spritesheet`** *(?)* вҖ” Spritesheet image for the video
- **`video_id`** *(string)* вҖ” The ID of the generated video

## fal-ai/t2v-turbo

**Title:** T2V Turbo - Video Crafter
**Description:** Generate short video clips from your prompts
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/t2v-turbo`
**Category:** text-to-video
**Tags:** turbo

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `Input`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate images from
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed to use for the random number generator
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `4` вҖ” The number of steps to sample
  Range: min: 1, max: 12
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `7.5` вҖ” The guidance scale
  Range: min: 0.1, max: 30
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `16` вҖ” The number of frames to generate
  Range: min: 16, max: 32
- **`export_fps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `8` вҖ” The FPS of the exported video
  Range: min: 1, max: 24

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The URL to the generated video

## fal-ai/transpixar

**Title:** TransPixar V1
**Description:** Transform text into stunning videos with TransPixar - an AI model that generates both RGB footage and alpha channels, enabling seamless compositing and creative video effects.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/transpixar`
**Category:** text-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `BaseInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to generate the video from.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” The negative prompt to generate video from
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `24` вҖ” The number of inference steps to perform.
  Range: min: 1, max: 50
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            The same seed and the same prompt given to the same version of the model
            will output the same video every time.
        
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `7` вҖ” 
            The CFG (Classifier Free Guidance) scale is a measure of how close you want
            the model to stick to your prompt when looking for a related video to show you.
        
  Range: min: 0, max: 20
- **`export_fps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `8` вҖ” The target FPS of the video
  Range: min: 4, max: 32

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Output`
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generating the video.
- **`videos`** *(list<File>)* вҖ” The URL to the generated video
- **`timings`** *(object)*
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” 
            Seed of the generated video. It will be the same value of the one passed in the
            input or the randomly generated that was used in case none was passed.
        

---

  Possible values: `9:16`, `16:9`, `1:1`

  Possible values: `5s`, `6s`, `7s`, `8s`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” A negative prompt to guide the video generation
- **`enhance_prompt`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enhance the video generation
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” A seed to use for the video generation

- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” Aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `16:9`, `9:16`
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"8s"` вҖ” The duration of the generated video.
  Possible values: `4s`, `6s`, `8s`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” A negative prompt to guide the video generation.
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video.
  Possible values: `720p`, `1080p`
- **`generate_audio`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to generate audio for the video.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator.
- **`auto_fix`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to automatically attempt to fix prompts that fail content policy or other validation checks by rewriting them.
- **`safety_tolerance`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"4"` вҖ” The safety tolerance level for content moderation. 1 is the most strict (blocks most content), 6 is the least strict.
  Possible values: `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`, `6`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `Veo31LiteTextToVideoOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video.

- **`auto_fix`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to automatically attempt to fix prompts that fail content policy or other validation checks by rewriting them.
- **`safety_tolerance`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"4"` вҖ” The safety tolerance level for content moderation. 1 is the most strict (blocks most content), 6 is the least strict.

## fal-ai/wan-25-preview/text-to-video

**Title:** Wan 2.5 Text to Video
**Description:** Wan 2.5 text-to-video model.
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/wan-25-preview/text-to-video`
**Category:** text-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `TextToVideoInput`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt for video generation. Supports Chinese and English, max 800 characters.
- **`audio_url`** *(string)* вҖ” 
URL of the audio to use as the background music. Must be publicly accessible.
Limit handling: If the audio duration exceeds the duration value (5 or 10 seconds),
the audio is truncated to the first 5 or 10 seconds, and the rest is discarded. If
the audio is shorter than the video, the remaining part of the video will be silent.
For example, if the audio is 3 seconds long and the video duration is 5 seconds, the
first 3 seconds of the output video will have sound, and the last 2 seconds will be silent.
- Format: WAV, MP3.
- Duration: 3 to 30 s.
- File size: Up to 15 MB.

- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video
  Possible values: `16:9`, `9:16`, `1:1`
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"1080p"` вҖ” Video resolution tier
  Possible values: `480p`, `720p`, `1080p`
- **`duration`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"5"` вҖ” Duration of the generated video in seconds. Choose between 5 or 10 seconds.
  Possible values: `5`, `10`
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Negative prompt to describe content to avoid. Max 500 characters.
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable prompt rewriting using LLM. Improves results for short prompts but increases processing time.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. If None, a random seed is chosen.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `VideoOutput`
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation
- **`actual_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The actual prompt used if prompt rewriting was enabled

---

## fal-ai/wan-alpha

**Title:** Wan Alpha
**Description:** Generate videos with transparent backgrounds
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/wan-alpha`
**Category:** text-to-video
**Tags:** transparent, alpha

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `WanAlphaRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt to guide the video generation.
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `81` вҖ” The number of frames to generate.
  Range: min: 17, max: 121
- **`fps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `16` вҖ” The frame rate of the generated video.
  Range: min: 1, max: 60
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `8` вҖ” The number of inference steps to use.
  Range: min: 2, max: 16
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed for the random number generator.
- **`sampler`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"euler"` вҖ” The sampler to use.
  Possible values: `unipc`, `dpm++`, `euler`
- **`shift`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `10.5` вҖ” The shift of the generated video.
  Range: min: 1, max: 15
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"480p"` вҖ” The resolution of the generated video.
  Possible values: `240p`, `360p`, `480p`, `580p`, `720p`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” The aspect ratio of the generated video.
  Possible values: `16:9`, `1:1`, `9:16`
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to enable prompt expansion.
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” Whether to enable safety checker.
- **`mask_clamp_lower`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.1` вҖ” The lower bound of the mask clamping.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`mask_clamp_upper`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.75` вҖ” The upper bound of the mask clamping.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`binarize_mask`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to binarize the mask.
- **`mask_binarization_threshold`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `0.8` вҖ” The threshold for mask binarization. When binarize_mask is True, this threshold will be used to binarize the mask. This will also be used for transparency when the output type is `.webm`.
  Range: min: 0, max: 1
- **`video_output_type`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"VP9 (.webm)"` вҖ” The output type of the generated video.
  Possible values: `X264 (.mp4)`, `VP9 (.webm)`, `PRORES4444 (.mov)`, `GIF (.gif)`
- **`video_quality`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"high"` вҖ” The quality of the generated video.
  Possible values: `low`, `medium`, `high`, `maximum`
- **`video_write_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"balanced"` вҖ” The write mode of the generated video.
  Possible values: `fast`, `balanced`, `small`
- **`sync_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If `True`, the media will be returned as a data URI and the output data won't be available in the request history.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `WanAlphaResponse`
- **`video`** *(?)* вҖ” The generated video file.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The prompt used for generation.
- **`image`** *(?)* вҖ” The generated image file.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.
- **`mask`** *(?)* вҖ” The generated mask file.

---

- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. If None, a random seed is chosen.

## fal-ai/wan-t2v

**Title:** Wan-2.1 Text-to-Video
**Description:** Wan-2.1 is a text-to-video model that generates high-quality videos with high visual quality and motion diversity from text prompts
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/wan-t2v`
**Category:** text-to-video
**Tags:** text to video, motion

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `WanT2VRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt to guide video generation.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"bright colors, overexposed, static, blurred details, subtitles, style, artwork, painting, picture, still, overall gray, worst quality, low quality, JPEG compression residue, ugly, incomplete, extra fingers, poorly drawn hands, poorly drawn faces, deformed, disfigured, malformed limbs, fused fingers, still picture, cluttered background, three legs, many people in the background, walking backwards"` вҖ” Negative prompt for video generation.
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `81` вҖ” Number of frames to generate. Must be between 81 to 100 (inclusive).
- **`frames_per_second`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `16` вҖ” Frames per second of the generated video. Must be between 5 to 24.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. If None, a random seed is chosen.
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” Resolution of the generated video (480p, 580p, or 720p).
  Possible values: `480p`, `580p`, `720p`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” Aspect ratio of the generated video (16:9 or 9:16).
  Possible values: `9:16`, `16:9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” Number of inference steps for sampling. Higher values give better quality but take longer.
  Range: min: 2, max: 40
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to enable prompt expansion.
- **`turbo_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If true, the video will be generated faster with no noticeable degradation in the visual quality.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `WanT2VResponse`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file.

---

## fal-ai/wan-t2v-lora

**Title:** Wan-2.1 Text-to-Video with LoRAs
**Description:** Add custom LoRAs to Wan-2.1 is a text-to-video model that generates high-quality videos with high visual quality and motion diversity from images
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/wan-t2v-lora`
**Category:** text-to-video
**Tags:** "text to video", "motion", "lora"

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `WanLoRARequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt to guide video generation.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `"bright colors, overexposed, static, blurred details, subtitles, style, artwork, painting, picture, still, overall gray, worst quality, low quality, JPEG compression residue, ugly, incomplete, extra fingers, poorly drawn hands, poorly drawn faces, deformed, disfigured, malformed limbs, fused fingers, still picture, cluttered background, three legs, many people in the background, walking backwards"` вҖ” Negative prompt for video generation.
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `81` вҖ” Number of frames to generate. Must be between 81 to 100 (inclusive).
- **`frames_per_second`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `16` вҖ” Frames per second of the generated video. Must be between 5 to 24.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. If None, a random seed is chosen.
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"480p"` вҖ” Resolution of the generated video (480p, 580p, or 720p).
  Possible values: `480p`, `580p`, `720p`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” Aspect ratio of the generated video (16:9 or 9:16).
  Possible values: `9:16`, `16:9`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `30` вҖ” Number of inference steps for sampling. Higher values give better quality but take longer.
  Range: min: 2, max: 40
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, the safety checker will be enabled.
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to enable prompt expansion.
- **`turbo_mode`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If true, the video will be generated faster with no noticeable degradation in the visual quality.
- **`loras`** *(list<LoraWeight>)* вҖ” Default: `[]` вҖ” LoRA weights to be used in the inference.
- **`reverse_video`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If true, the video will be reversed.

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `WanT2VResponse`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file.

## fal-ai/wan/v2.2-5b/text-to-video

**Title:** Wan v2.2 5B
**Description:** Wan 2.2's 5B model produces up to 5 seconds of video 720p at 24FPS with fluid motion and powerful prompt understanding
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/wan/v2.2-5b/text-to-video`
**Category:** text-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `WanSmallT2VRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt to guide video generation.
- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Negative prompt for video generation.
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `81` вҖ” Number of frames to generate. Must be between 17 to 161 (inclusive).
  Range: min: 17, max: 161
- **`frames_per_second`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `24` вҖ” Frames per second of the generated video. Must be between 4 to 60. When using interpolation and `adjust_fps_for_interpolation` is set to true (default true,) the final FPS will be multiplied by the number of interpolated frames plus one. For example, if the generated frames per second is 16 and the number of interpolated frames is 1, the final frames per second will be 32. If `adjust_fps_for_interpolation` is set to false, this value will be used as-is.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. If None, a random seed is chosen.
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” Resolution of the generated video (580p or 720p).
  Possible values: `580p`, `720p`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” Aspect ratio of the generated video (16:9 or 9:16).
  Possible values: `16:9`, `9:16`, `1:1`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `40` вҖ” Number of inference steps for sampling. Higher values give better quality but take longer.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, input data will be checked for safety before processing.
- **`enable_output_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, output video will be checked for safety after generation.
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to enable prompt expansion. This will use a large language model to expand the prompt with additional details while maintaining the original meaning.
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3.5` вҖ” Classifier-free guidance scale. Higher values give better adherence to the prompt but may decrease quality.
  Range: min: 1, max: 10
- **`shift`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” Shift value for the video. Must be between 1.0 and 10.0.
  Range: min: 1, max: 10
- **`interpolator_model`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"film"` вҖ” The model to use for frame interpolation. If None, no interpolation is applied.
  Possible values: `none`, `film`, `rife`
- **`num_interpolated_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Number of frames to interpolate between each pair of generated frames. Must be between 0 and 4.
  Range: min: 0, max: 4
- **`adjust_fps_for_interpolation`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If true, the number of frames per second will be multiplied by the number of interpolated frames plus one. For example, if the generated frames per second is 16 and the number of interpolated frames is 1, the final frames per second will be 32. If false, the passed frames per second will be used as-is.
- **`video_quality`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"high"` вҖ” The quality of the output video. Higher quality means better visual quality but larger file size.
  Possible values: `low`, `medium`, `high`, `maximum`
- **`video_write_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"balanced"` вҖ” The write mode of the output video. Faster write mode means faster results but larger file size, balanced write mode is a good compromise between speed and quality, and small write mode is the slowest but produces the smallest file size.
  Possible values: `fast`, `balanced`, `small`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `WanSmallT2VResponse`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” The text prompt used for video generation.

---

## fal-ai/wan/v2.2-5b/text-to-video/distill

**Title:** Wan
**Description:** Wan 2.2's 5B distill model produces up to 5 seconds of video 720p at 24FPS with fluid motion and powerful prompt understanding
**Endpoint:** `https://fal.run/fal-ai/wan/v2.2-5b/text-to-video/distill`
**Category:** text-to-video

### рҹ“Ҙ Input Schema: `WanDistillT2VRequest`
**Required fields:** `prompt`

- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” The text prompt to guide video generation.
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `81` вҖ” Number of frames to generate. Must be between 17 to 161 (inclusive).
  Range: min: 17, max: 161
- **`frames_per_second`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `24` вҖ” Frames per second of the generated video. Must be between 4 to 60. When using interpolation and `adjust_fps_for_interpolation` is set to true (default true,) the final FPS will be multiplied by the number of interpolated frames plus one. For example, if the generated frames per second is 16 and the number of interpolated frames is 1, the final frames per second will be 32. If `adjust_fps_for_interpolation` is set to false, this value will be used as-is.
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” Random seed for reproducibility. If None, a random seed is chosen.
- **`resolution`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"720p"` вҖ” Resolution of the generated video (580p or 720p).
  Possible values: `580p`, `720p`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” Aspect ratio of the generated video (16:9 or 9:16).
  Possible values: `16:9`, `9:16`, `1:1`
- **`num_inference_steps`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `40` вҖ” Number of inference steps for sampling. Higher values give better quality but take longer.
  Range: min: 2, max: 50
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, input data will be checked for safety before processing.
- **`enable_output_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, output video will be checked for safety after generation.
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to enable prompt expansion. This will use a large language model to expand the prompt with additional details while maintaining the original meaning.
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `1` вҖ” Classifier-free guidance scale. Higher values give better adherence to the prompt but may decrease quality.
  Range: min: 1, max: 10
- **`shift`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `5` вҖ” Shift value for the video. Must be between 1.0 and 10.0.
  Range: min: 1, max: 10
- **`interpolator_model`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"film"` вҖ” The model to use for frame interpolation. If None, no interpolation is applied.
  Possible values: `none`, `film`, `rife`
- **`num_interpolated_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Number of frames to interpolate between each pair of generated frames. Must be between 0 and 4.
  Range: min: 0, max: 4
- **`adjust_fps_for_interpolation`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If true, the number of frames per second will be multiplied by the number of interpolated frames plus one. For example, if the generated frames per second is 16 and the number of interpolated frames is 1, the final frames per second will be 32. If false, the passed frames per second will be used as-is.
- **`video_quality`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"high"` вҖ” The quality of the output video. Higher quality means better visual quality but larger file size.
  Possible values: `low`, `medium`, `high`, `maximum`
- **`video_write_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"balanced"` вҖ” The write mode of the output video. Faster write mode means faster results but larger file size, balanced write mode is a good compromise between speed and quality, and small write mode is the slowest but produces the smallest file size.
  Possible values: `fast`, `balanced`, `small`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `WanSmallT2VResponse`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” The text prompt used for video generation.

---

- **`negative_prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” Negative prompt for video generation.
- **`num_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `81` вҖ” Number of frames to generate. Must be between 17 to 161 (inclusive).

When using interpolation and `adjust_fps_for_interpolation` is set to true (default true,) the final FPS will be multiplied by the number of interpolated frames plus one. For example, if the generated frames per second is 16 and the number of interpolated frames is 1, the final frames per second will be 32. If `adjust_fps_for_interpolation` is set to false, this value will be used as-is.

  Possible values: `480p`, `580p`, `720p`
- **`aspect_ratio`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"16:9"` вҖ” Aspect ratio of the generated video (16:9 or 9:16).
  Possible values: `16:9`, `9:16`, `1:1`
- **`enable_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, input data will be checked for safety before processing.
- **`enable_output_safety_checker`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” If set to true, output video will be checked for safety after generation.
- **`enable_prompt_expansion`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `false` вҖ” Whether to enable prompt expansion. This will use a large language model to expand the prompt with additional details while maintaining the original meaning.
- **`guidance_scale`** *(number)* вҖ” Default: `3.5` вҖ” Classifier-free guidance scale. Higher values give better adherence to the prompt but may decrease quality.
  Range: min: 1, max: 10
- **`interpolator_model`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"film"` вҖ” The model to use for frame interpolation. If None, no interpolation is applied.
  Possible values: `none`, `film`, `rife`
- **`num_interpolated_frames`** *(integer)* вҖ” Default: `0` вҖ” Number of frames to interpolate between each pair of generated frames. Must be between 0 and 4.
  Range: min: 0, max: 4
- **`adjust_fps_for_interpolation`** *(boolean)* вҖ” Default: `true` вҖ” If true, the number of frames per second will be multiplied by the number of interpolated frames plus one. For example, if the generated frames per second is 16 and the number of interpolated frames is 1, the final frames per second will be 32. If false, the passed frames per second will be used as-is.
- **`video_quality`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"high"` вҖ” The quality of the output video. Higher quality means better visual quality but larger file size.
  Possible values: `low`, `medium`, `high`, `maximum`
- **`video_write_mode`** *(enum)* вҖ” Default: `"balanced"` вҖ” The write mode of the output video. Faster write mode means faster results but larger file size, balanced write mode is a good compromise between speed and quality, and small write mode is the slowest but produces the smallest file size.
  Possible values: `fast`, `balanced`, `small`

### рҹ“Ө Output Schema: `WanSmallFastVideoT2VResponse`
- **`seed`** *(integer)* вҖ” The seed used for generation.
- **`video`** *()* вҖ” The generated video file.
- **`prompt`** *(string)* вҖ” Default: `""` вҖ” The text prompt used for video generation.
